name: President Trump
subject: Here’s what happened to Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
These changes might definitely affect you, so I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law!
| | | | |
---
## **_MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY!_**

[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Friend,
These changes might definitely affect you!
Here’s what happened to Social Security:
I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY!

**But don’t thank me yet.**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._
It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.

All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:
_**[DO YOU STAND WITH TRUMP ENDING TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY?](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)**_

[YES](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,

[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)

name: EMILYs List
subject: A quick survey we could use your input on, Peter
body:
ONE-THIRD of court rulings ignored?! |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112306965/560081670/832410179?sourceid=1056665&refcode=WUENE758_20250728_TrumpCourtSurvey_ALL_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEyZjZkYy0wZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rg-tliT4Adw3YcJsUXpNjgoX0wPOUJChndOK5cpliCk=&emci=8a1447d3-0e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a8a2f6dc-0e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934) Peter,

We had to send a note after reading this outrageous statistic uncovered by _The Washington Post_ : **The Trump administration has resisted (which is to say, defied)__34% of court orders filed against it this year__.** That's right — more than one-third of all legal rulings checking Trump's power, flagrantly ignored.

**It doesn't seem normal because it isn't normal.** This is a historic power grab by a U.S. president clearly attempting to ignore the rule of law and democracy in his own country.

This is a break-glass moment for Americans to stand up to this abuse of our fundamental institutions.

**We put together a brief survey for EMILYs List supporters, and we'd love your input, Peter. ** | **Trump Administration Survey — July 2025**
---
****What worries you most about the Trump administration's agenda?**** | [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112306966/560081671/832410179?sourceid=1056665&refcode=WUENE758_20250728_TrumpCourtSurvey_ALL_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGEyZjZkYy0wZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rg-tliT4Adw3YcJsUXpNjgoX0wPOUJChndOK5cpliCk=&emci=8a1447d3-0e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a8a2f6dc-0e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5177934)

name: John James
subject: This mission is off course
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
Help get us back on track| | | Dear Co-Pilot, __**Michigan is off course.**__ For years, we have suffered under leadership that has pushed our state into a pit of despair. **Here’s the reality of Michigan today:** \- Our economy is struggling.\- Manufacturing jobs, which are the lifeblood of Detroit, have vanished. \- Small businesses are collapsing.\- Families are being left behind. \- We now have the second-highest unemployment rate in the country. **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** I am stepping up to bring about a new golden age for Michigan. [**Will you join me?**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=da1898baea1a433987e3c2878bebbeec&_e=V7gn3hPUoKFcNCohczLptcktA6wX20nTxxvF_oXwzcNZqClNJuQaK36HPLWsnnwoyEWebCBSvLjD9sRV6gKNt8FufxjWdRc0fx0oUxVpy9S18vJQdd7isUm68xuR1x2jAT0OhXhHDx1rjaKJVUWCUD8VAt_joSkcQrjasQFWjbJSAzEJ_lNvITyYacGzknfFl5BCTs84JwkwUzm0-1Uo7RlJiIjDSHs-XZ94pEwcLFugQcL6Ag3HPjiL-0OGfQEisSjvY3olZGYF4LauZC3dUblDyYLJkhwZZHZ3K0TpxGN5VsXRf22Q1C_OJ8TQRwM-k7YZje2QtnYUitFSIEIkxfRcRrMjGAuXEwIZo08KXOM4xJO6mo8B5aBq9dUBD5hzXEU6BEPo1FuLIXOKwhn1pcQl4ufsiknVlxr8VVfCmYg%3D)

clean_body: Help get us back on track| | | Dear Co-Pilot, Michigan is off course. For years, we have suffered under leadership that has pushed our state into a pit of despair. Here’s the reality of Michigan today: \- Our economy is struggling.\- Manufacturing jobs, which are the lifeblood of Detroit, have vanished. \- Small businesses are collapsing.\- Families are being left behind. \- We now have the second-highest unemployment rate in the country. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! I am stepping up to bring about a new golden age for Michigan. I refuse to sit back and watch Michigan—a state that produces 20 percent of all U.S. automobiles—fall by the wayside. We need a leader with a proven track record of accomplishing tough missions. From war zones to Washington, I’ve made no excuses. This mission is about restoring opportunity, rebuilding our economy, and serving with the same commitment that I brought to the military. West Point taught me to lead with purpose. I am fighting for a future for you, for our children, and for our children’s children. I can’t complete this mission alone. Let's Fly, John James | | Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312 | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump targets YOU - look!!
body:
Donald Trump just signed an executive order targeting ActBlue — the platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in America.
He’s not going after billionaires or corporate PACs. He’s going after us — the small-dollar donors who power progressive candidates and movements.
This is a direct attack on the heart of our democracy. And if we don’t fight back now, he’ll keep going. Chip in NOW to stand against this blatant act of authoritarian rule >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
Trump has launched a direct attack on the grassroots. And if we don’t fight back now, there's no telling how far he'll take this.
Rush $7 to defend ActBlue and protect the future of small-dollar democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
CHIP IN NOW TO DEFEND ACTBLUE AGAINST TRUMP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
Imagine this:
You chip in $5 to support a pro-choice woman running for Congress. Or a first-time statehouse challenger. Or a school board candidate fighting book bans.
Now imagine the President of the United States signs an executive order to investigate — and dismantle — the platform you used to make that donation.
Not a right-wing conspiracy theory. Not a hypothetical.
That just happened.
Donald Trump is abusing executive power to go after ActBlue — the secure, trusted platform that powers nearly every grassroots Democratic campaign in the country.
He’s not targeting dark money. He’s not going after billionaire-funded super PACs. He’s coming after you — the small-dollar donors who fuel this movement.
We launched a $25,000 emergency fund to defend the platform that keeps this movement alive — but we’re still $13,000 short. And time is running out. If we don’t speak up, they’ll silence us. Chip in $7 or more to help us fight back before it’s too late: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=071825_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_3&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_3&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_3&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_3&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?express_lane=true&refcode=071825_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-twosenateseats?refcode=071825_3&amount=25]

1150 N Loop 1604 W

San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

Friend – While Americans are crushed by inflation, higher interest rates, and rising living costs, the Federal Reserve is busy turning its headquarters into a **$2.5 billion marble palace.** This isn’t just about “ _renovations._ ” It’s about arrogance. It’s about an institution that believes it’s untouchable. **The same Fed that manipulates our economy in the dark now wants rooftop terraces and premium stone finishes on[ _YOUR dime_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=59b2a2b5be89486b9b090118150e0659&_e=es17igAZeSL1j-c3CJUIvU-08Zx2dtVip98hwW0Jk6NFjWPh7fbZVm3DcAD24wYD5E6R9p8QUT3Bs___PArHKMCLiEutpnFIpf1XlMeb7Y8cMfbAfIsT7lNxa7xwU2o_An_6-dWovkbXNg6BEabq7I8RSvX3SzuZ6Msi6ypS0qV3fYvtVrLhd2FZw9C-odkzPTIYN044xJMNy8q8ZsJjPXR_duxWRi31wZQFPQ8eosWN0v-HIuIafEvKF7kGx7xaOFokKtrfGXYe__RmuSfr5_kv2Bvi7Wf7mJmi1NhFL7lvcu1aIHJs5752o2HegUv_XSXZyNe6AN-t_C5gXfEUdDNKlHBFJvasZ4NJ9KPLCR-e3cZpkTVq3kYC0Fd2g3ku5CuUWsfkADJsF8fD4i6uuxGRYkUhQ0ycGJ3FL6ytRAIRpeC3rRbMCwGpSgUUoDImOmFTaiNvv7LL-dj-LgJyzKVDGOPvoCX1PBsQ3w8mU7K8p8cJwdC6irm_LnPcdUYx9P6lrz0ZTri_plrRt2rcKwVulvgUGTJH9o7kQyBj1DS1WXBVKrTP-t1zbFZ1GnDU_1U-RqpazW8BjHapeatIdG7v4SIs6-I_VLWng40kcmxxHr6Lvz6PMlYGZanSp6s3nXpym9RM1aDi83tsDYWkm3e-MIvsi4l2iPhQL_rFHB0WPs3pC94uYd-ZQ9WLSbpA).** President Trump called it a fireable offense. He’s right. But firing one man won’t fix a corrupt machine. The truth is, the Federal Reserve doesn’t need a new coat of paint. **It needs an END date.** **_[I’m fighting for that. And I need you with me.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=59b2a2b5be89486b9b090118150e0659&_e=es17igAZeSL1j-c3CJUIvU-08Zx2dtVip98hwW0Jk6NFjWPh7fbZVm3DcAD24wYD5E6R9p8QUT3Bs___PArHKMCLiEutpnFIpf1XlMeb7Y8cMfbAfIsT7lNxa7xwU2o_An_6-dWovkbXNg6BEabq7I8RSvX3SzuZ6Msi6ypS0qV3fYvtVrLhd2FZw9C-odkzPTIYN044xJMNy8q8ZsJjPXR_duxWRi31wZQFPQ8eosUk0_rHzWqh0PYUD_9shfCSYnre8gEJpsIuGCM1k0epOp4fP-0rMiPVQcd3hB5DJpiDZiQ4AJSbje40ylKRLF90QzJTfDpW6APrItClzsua1pBHjXn51n3YV0JO3BCwxR29agnFNjlmHHoXviaL7FyPRdEJ-7Vpab9ihnZgrs4pNWQsuuyJ8oZfjqsljbLd1RfceX0_JZ3WOdG3zVcwL0oCLaOI_3qqydcKKZ3ls5CNjGEF6mR7jlpjHCK-FPevB0IgU3jD0lQN6_ddjzkXuViwaXso19eoS_ERQirFjzKwRyOga-fHHsvVYfJmqUANGI5m-vw5cunDCe0U4W3UD8XeX31XxzcqJAmY1ZAy9Gdkh24Jr3Q3N1St6bsjfN3S-tysUFONidnudllfhuKxJy2lDTZt9gKPc34TTIb23UBTTezYBfj2eaAY-6PKh1RWKNZxDvNR6_wKysmJ9CI76uEW)_**

Good evening, team! 👋

It’s Sonali here – finance director for Derek Tran’s campaign to keep CA-45 blue.

I’m reaching out because in just a few days, we’ll hit our next end-of-month fundraising deadline. **This is our first benchmark since a top Republican group pledged to spend $5 million in swing districts including this one.**

This attack comes at a tough time: We’re seeing a fundraising downturn. While a lot of our supporters are enjoying their summers, we’re laser-focused on building the groundwork to keep Derek fighting for us in Congress.

**[I need your help to finish the month with strength. Every dollar donated directly impacts our on-the-ground voter outreach. Here’s another reason why your support is critical: Derek refuses to accept money from Big Oil and Big Pharma. He’s in Congress to stand up for Orange and Los Angeles Counties, not special interests.

It makes him a target from the national GOP. They know this seat is key to expanding their House majority, and their early spending shows they are sparing no expense to flip CA-45 right back to red.

clean_body: | = Good evening, team! 👋 It’s Sonali here – finance director for Derek Tran’s campaign to keep CA-45 blue. I’m reaching out because in just a few days, we’ll hit our next end-of-month fundraising deadline. This is our first benchmark since a top Republican group pledged to spend $5 million in swing districts including this one. This attack comes at a tough time: We’re seeing a fundraising downturn. While a lot of our supporters are enjoying their summers, we’re laser-focused on building the groundwork to keep Derek fighting for us in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Here’s another reason why your support is critical: Derek refuses to accept money from Big Oil and Big Pharma. He’s in Congress to stand up for Orange and Los Angeles Counties, not special interests. It makes him a target from the national GOP. They know this seat is key to expanding their House majority, and their early spending shows they are sparing no expense to flip CA-45 right back to red. = Thank you, Sonali Finance Director = | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. clean_body: Democrats are defending rioters who OPENED FIRE on ICE agents. Peter , I never thought I'd have to say this, but apparently, it needs repeating: 👉 Assaulting ICE is NOT a winning issue. 👉 Shooting at our law enforcement isn't a " peaceful protest." 👉 Shielding human traffickers isn't " compassionate immigration reform." ICYMI, 361 illegal immigrants arrested. 14 children rescued from trafficking and forced labor. And what did the Radical Left do? They DIDN'T cheer for the children saved. They DIDN'T condemn the traffickers. They BLAMED ICE and called them " oppressors of strawberry farmers." Then it got worse. And it 's not an isolated incident: 🔻 ICE ambushed in Texas 🔻 Officer shot in the neck 🔻 Arson attacks on ICE facilities 🔻 An armed gunman stormed a CBP building at the border The Democrats? SILENT. Some even DEFENDED the rioters. And just like their nonstop attacks on President Trump, I sit on the House Oversight Committee. That 's why I'm asking you directly: Do you STAND with the brave men and women of ICE? Do you SUPPORT the arrest and prosecution of EVERY individual who attacks federal agents? Do you BELIEVE in law and order? ADD YOUR NAME if you support ICE and law enforcement Patriot, if we lose our majority by even ONE SEAT --this gets worse. The Left will DEFUND ICE. OPEN the border. And throw Trump allies in jail for trying to stop it. I need you on this team. Stand with ICE. Stand with Trump. Stand with me. For Liberty, Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807 "Eric Burlison for Congress"

### **THE BLUE LETTER**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3666e634-a2c8-447f-a340-49ba345f5048?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### _**Starting TODAY, ask me/David anything --untold political & personal stories; a backstage view of how Substack sausage made!**_
### _**BUT[YOU MUST BE A PAID COMMUNITY MEMBER!](https://substack.com/redirect/e319ff0e-42f1-4400-a921-4c02d0b30373?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
#### _Political news will always free. But private political stories, behind the scenes views, shout outs; all non-essential news will be behind a paywall_
#### _**And how about saving democracy/supporting our Soundcheck Fund?**_
[ Yes, Make Me A Paid Community Member!](https://substack.com/redirect/e319ff0e-42f1-4400-a921-4c02d0b30373?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Halle-freakin-lujah! Roy Cooper is jumping into the race for the open North Carolina Senate seat!
You may remember the seat was left open when Mr. 58-spoons-full-of-sugar to make a lb of crushed Adderall go down, Don-boy, insulted GOP Senator, Thom Tillis.
Tillis gave Trump damn near everything Trump ever wanted (ok, no sharks, batteries o porn stars). But Tillis wouldn't support his job-killing, debt-exploding _Big Barbaric Bill_ to starve children and kill Americans by confiscating their healthcare. So Trump, per usual, did the adult thing. He insulted Tillis, said he'd support a primary challenger. Tillis responded with a _stick it up your ***_ _I 'm out_. Whoops.
So we find ourselves here. With an open U.S. Senate seat in the swing state of North Carolina while Trump's numbers crash like he's Mel Gibson driving in Malibu with the blood alcohol level of Cognac, yelling "Jews start all the wars in the world."
Folks, Trump's polling isn't in the toilet. No, that doesn't do it justice. His numbers are stuck in the "500 yards of sh*t smelling foulness" that Andy Dufresne crawled through in _Shawshank_. Except Trump ain't coming out clean on the other side, even with the adult diaper.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8cc71edc-9c29-4b94-8abb-ef2f06cae716?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ok, back to the Tar Heel State (side note: what the hell is a tar heel?). This decision by Roy Cooper..it's honestly hard to explain **how huge it is**. An earthquake. Not a tremor. A tectonic shift that just cracked GOP's control of the Senate wide open. And I'm here to tell you why.
Cooper isn't just another name on a ballot. He's a _two-term North Carolina Governor_ , _former**four-term** NC Attorney General_. So, to quote Keith Olbermann, "if you're scoring at home--or even if you're alone,"he's run a lot in this state and **won**. The kinda Democrat who's successful in the South because he doesn't back down and doesn't play cute with half measures to make everyone happy.
Sure, he's a moderate that fits his state, but passionate about equality under the law and helping working people. He fought to expand Medicaid (nice contrast with GOP BBB ghouls), harshen penalties for domestic violence and tighten regulations on guns.
Cooper's so popular, one wonders what he could've done if MAGAs hadn't gerrymandered their way to state legislative control and stripped him of as much power as possible. Because--and you may know this--when Republicans lose, they cheat. Ya know, like Trump on a Scottish (or really any) golf course.
And the timing here is key. To reiterate, Trump's _cratering in the polls_ faster than a crypto scam after an SEC investigation. The stench of the Epstein files is growing stronger by the day--so inverse to JD Vance's VP portfolio--and voters are connecting the dots. Which dots?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f647def3-bc34-4b5e-bb30-89437dbdc8a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump, Epstein and the corrupt billionaire class of Musks, Thiels, Ellisons, Mercers, Uihleins, one Koch, one Adelson (the others are dead). You know, the predator class.
The billionaires destroying our democracy, the middle class, starving school-kids, disposing of workers, getting tax cuts on private-plane expenses while stealing Medicaid from people, throwing immigrants into concentration camps...
**And this all ties directly into the Epstein scandal, how?**
Because the heartless whores who robbed Americans of their jobs and healthcare _because they could_ , robbed young girls of their youth, trust and sometimes lives, _because they could_. They're repulsive. So react that way!
Don't poll test. Speak with passion. The righteous fury you **should** feel for the grotesque piles of rat-droppings in three-week-old Brie, covered in black tar and asparagus pee in the sun the past week in Death Valley, CA.
**This isn 't hard:** You wanna take power back from billionaires in secret rooms robbing us of our bank accounts, robbing girls of their youth, robbing our government blind and robbing America of all it's ever been? You wanna kick the GOP and their secret, billionaire club of grave robbers, America-haters and sexual assaulters to the curb?
Make **this** your narrative my fellow Democrats. Pummel them on **this** every single day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ab534944-2cc0-487a-b30c-dc2baab7b7e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Roy Cooper _can do this and do it well._ From Epstein to Bessent. Mar-a-Lago to Mike Johnson. Billionaires shielding pedophiles to billionaires writing our laws. Sexual abuse and cover-ups to the systematic destruction of the working and middle class.
And he can channel the old saying that "all politics is local," as Trump rejected full FEMA funding to North Carolina after Hurricane Helene, spitting in its face in its time of need. Then, for good measure, shared conspiracy theories about the funding disappearing to justify his cruelty.
Some North Carolians just may remember that kind of unnecessary d*kishness.
And Cooper will do all this in a way that _lands_. _Moves people_. _Changes the national conversation_. And with his name and profile, his getting in this race could not be more consequential. It will convince oft-way-too-cautious Democrats to get in races across the country. Remember, when Trump is 10-15% under water, good Democratic candidates can not only win in NC, but in Kansas and Kentucky, as they have.
You're already seeing the ripple effect. Colin Allred's going _full throttle_ in Texas, where a man who can match Trump crime for crime, Ken Paxton, is challenging incumbent Sen. John Cornyn. Paxton may beat him in a primary or severely weaken him.
Florida and Ohio--recently slipping into MAGA oblivion--_look winnable in polling._ Both have special U.S. Senate elections in November for open Rubio and Vance seats. If good Democrats step up--_and now that 's much more likely_--they can win.
Courage is contagious, as we often talk about here at Blue Amp. A popular, powerful six-term North Carolina executive jumping into this race sends a powerful message to Democratic candidates on the fence across America.
Democrats can also learn from Hallie Shoffner, [whom we talked to on "Amped Up."](https://substack.com/redirect/f91f6748-b6b3-47ce-a8b1-11049ec92d32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3df38a29-cef7-444b-8a85-e319740bc153?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A sixth generation farmer til MAGA policies wrecked her farm, [she's running vs Tom Cotton in Arkansas](https://substack.com/redirect/dce246d6-0535-418e-b514-4c5feff69608?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Yes, very tough territory. Yet Hallie's incredible, a real human and lifetime farmer, who rips Republicans **and** Democratic insiders for abandoning AR (she's right, when the 50-state strategy was stupidly dumped).
In a time when Trump's falling like he's Eric trying to walk across an invisible bridge, Shoffner goes straight after Tom Cotton votes _against the farm bill!_. Also, Cotton should learn to smile any day now.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/971ee554-cda9-4a0d-9930-ff7f0b44d92e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**This is Tom Cotton in every pic. Someone score him a valium, please**_
* * *
And if Democrats can learn how to message against insiders--Trump, Republicans but also Democratic insiders like Hoffner, they will have a shot in places they usually have none, with the right candidates.
So back to this huge decision by Roy Cooper: This is how waves start. Not with poll-tested slogans, but real-life leaders. With courage. With _clarity_ of purpose. **Roy Cooper just gave other Democrats permission to run like they mean it.** Like the future of democracy depends on it--because it does.
If we play this right, and if we support candidates who are ready to throw punches and tell the truth, we're not just looking at a good year. We're looking at a _realignment._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a9240916-0ca2-4c91-8a48-514f9a71f259?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the late and **great** Val Kilmer said as Doc Holliday in _Tombstone, "Why Johnny Ringo, it looks like somebody just walked over your grave."_
* * *
#### _**THIS WEEK ON AMPED UP!**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4d99542b-2e8d-43ee-b3a4-89df784e47e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/17009392-0c9c-440d-b532-f34da2aa5128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Hate is Trump's New Testament, Hypocrisy the Oxygen he Breathes](https://substack.com/redirect/17009392-0c9c-440d-b532-f34da2aa5128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/profile/31941177-cliff-schecter), [John Fugelsang](https://substack.com/profile/554718-john-fugelsang), and [DavidShuster](https://substack.com/profile/16891317-davidshuster)| | *

clean_body: "Better stand tall when they're callin' you out. Don't bend, don't break, baby, don't back down. It's my life, it's now or never - Bon Jovi, "It's My Life" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "Better stand tall when they're callin' you out. Don't bend, don't break, baby, don't back down. It's my life, it's now or never - Bon Jovi, "It's My Life" | Jul 29 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | THE BLUE LETTER | | ---|---|--- Starting TODAY, ask me/David anything --untold political & personal stories; a backstage view of how Substack sausage made! BUT Political news will always free. But private political stories, behind the scenes views, shout outs; all non-essential news will be behind a paywall And how about saving democracy/supporting our Soundcheck Fund? Halle-freakin-lujah! Roy Cooper is jumping into the race for the open North Carolina Senate seat! You may remember the seat was left open when Mr. 58-spoons-full-of-sugar to make a lb of crushed Adderall go down, Don-boy, insulted GOP Senator, Thom Tillis. Tillis gave Trump damn near everything Trump ever wanted (ok, no sharks, batteries o porn stars). But Tillis wouldn't support his job-killing, debt-exploding Big Barbaric Bill to starve children and kill Americans by confiscating their healthcare. So Trump, per usual, did the adult thing. He insulted Tillis, said he'd support a primary challenger. Tillis responded with a stick it up your * I 'm out. Whoops. So we find ourselves here. With an open U.S. Senate seat in the swing state of North Carolina while Trump's numbers crash like he's Mel Gibson driving in Malibu with the blood alcohol level of Cognac, yelling "Jews start all the wars in the world." Folks, Trump's polling isn't in the toilet. No, that doesn't do it justice. His numbers are stuck in the "500 yards of sht smelling foulness" that Andy Dufresne crawled through in Shawshank. Except Trump ain't coming out clean on the other side, even with the adult diaper. | | ---|---|--- Ok, back to the Tar Heel State (side note: what the hell is a tar heel?). This decision by Roy Cooper..it's honestly hard to explain how huge it is. An earthquake. Not a tremor. A tectonic shift that just cracked GOP's control of the Senate wide open. And I'm here to tell you why. Cooper isn't just another name on a ballot. He's a two-term North Carolina Governor , formerfour-term NC Attorney General. So, to quote Keith Olbermann, "if you're scoring at home--or even if you're alone,"he's run a lot in this state and won. The kinda Democrat who's successful in the South because he doesn't back down and doesn't play cute with half measures to make everyone happy. Sure, he's a moderate that fits his state, but passionate about equality under the law and helping working people. He fought to expand Medicaid (nice contrast with GOP BBB ghouls), harshen penalties for domestic violence and tighten regulations on guns. Cooper's so popular, one wonders what he could've done if MAGAs hadn't gerrymandered their way to state legislative control and stripped him of as much power as possible. Because--and you may know this--when Republicans lose, they cheat. Ya know, like Trump on a Scottish (or really any) golf course. And the timing here is key. To reiterate, Trump's cratering in the polls faster than a crypto scam after an SEC investigation. The stench of the Epstein files is growing stronger by the day--so inverse to JD Vance's VP portfolio--and voters are connecting the dots. Which dots? | | ---|---|--- Trump, Epstein and the corrupt billionaire class of Musks, Thiels, Ellisons, Mercers, Uihleins, one Koch, one Adelson (the others are dead). You know, the predator class. The billionaires destroying our democracy, the middle class, starving school-kids, disposing of workers, getting tax cuts on private-plane expenses while stealing Medicaid from people, throwing immigrants into concentration camps... And this all ties directly into the Epstein scandal, how? Because the heartless whores who robbed Americans of their jobs and healthcare because they could , robbed young girls of their youth, trust and sometimes lives, because they could. They're repulsive. So react that way! Don't poll test. Speak with passion. The righteous fury you should feel for the grotesque piles of rat-droppings in three-week-old Brie, covered in black tar and asparagus pee in the sun the past week in Death Valley, CA. This isn 't hard: You wanna take power back from billionaires in secret rooms robbing us of our bank accounts, robbing girls of their youth, robbing our government blind and robbing America of all it's ever been? You wanna kick the GOP and their secret, billionaire club of grave robbers, America-haters and sexual assaulters to the curb? Make this your narrative my fellow Democrats. Pummel them on this every single day. | | ---|---|--- Roy Cooper can do this and do it well. From Epstein to Bessent. Mar-a-Lago to Mike Johnson. Billionaires shielding pedophiles to billionaires writing our laws. Sexual abuse and cover-ups to the systematic destruction of the working and middle class. And he can channel the old saying that "all politics is local," as Trump rejected full FEMA funding to North Carolina after Hurricane Helene, spitting in its face in its time of need. Then, for good measure, shared conspiracy theories about the funding disappearing to justify his cruelty. Some North Carolians just may remember that kind of unnecessary dkishness. And Cooper will do all this in a way that lands. Moves people. Changes the national conversation. And with his name and profile, his getting in this race could not be more consequential. It will convince oft-way-too-cautious Democrats to get in races across the country. Remember, when Trump is 10-15% under water, good Democratic candidates can not only win in NC, but in Kansas and Kentucky, as they have. You're already seeing the ripple effect. Colin Allred's going full throttle in Texas, where a man who can match Trump crime for crime, Ken Paxton, is challenging incumbent Sen. John Cornyn. Paxton may beat him in a primary or severely weaken him. Florida and Ohio--recently slipping into MAGA oblivion--look winnable in polling. Both have special U.S. Senate elections in November for open Rubio and Vance seats. If good Democrats step up--and now that 's much more likely--they can win. Courage is contagious, as we often talk about here at Blue Amp. A popular, powerful six-term North Carolina executive jumping into this race sends a powerful message to Democratic candidates on the fence across America. Democrats can also learn from Hallie Shoffner, | | ---|---|--- A sixth generation farmer til MAGA policies wrecked her farm, . Yes, very tough territory. Yet Hallie's incredible, a real human and lifetime farmer, who rips Republicans and Democratic insiders for abandoning AR (she's right, when the 50-state strategy was stupidly dumped). In a time when Trump's falling like he's Eric trying to walk across an invisible bridge, Shoffner goes straight after Tom Cotton votes against the farm bill!. Also, Cotton should learn to smile any day now. | | ---|---|--- This is Tom Cotton in every pic. Someone score him a valium, please And if Democrats can learn how to message against insiders--Trump, Republicans but also Democratic insiders like Hoffner, they will have a shot in places they usually have none, with the right candidates. So back to this huge decision by Roy Cooper: This is how waves start. Not with poll-tested slogans, but real-life leaders. With courage. With clarity of purpose. Roy Cooper just gave other Democrats permission to run like they mean it. Like the future of democracy depends on it--because it does. If we play this right, and if we support candidates who are ready to throw punches and tell the truth, we're not just looking at a good year. We're looking at a realignment. | | ---|---|--- As the late and great Val Kilmer said as Doc Holliday in Tombstone, "Why Johnny Ringo, it looks like somebody just walked over your grave." THIS WEEK ON AMPED UP! | | | | | , , and | | ---|---|--- | Jul 24 | Ok folks, as promised, our new section forPaid Community Members! Ask anything of David & Cliff. We'll answer in a video we send on Friday. Best story about a famous politician? How I got banned from MSNBC? How David left MSNBC? How I was arrested in Kentucky? We 'll also get the DMs open to only paid subscribers and start a thread this week. Bonus: A random lottery! One paid subscriber will do a zoom/call with us next month! Hi there, It’s Eric Swalwell here. I wanted to make sure you heard that my friend, Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford, is running for Governor. His message is below: I’m running for one reason above all: **Too many Nevadans are working harder than ever and still getting nowhere, and I know we can change that.** I’ve spent my career fighting for families like mine because I’ve lived what so many people are facing right now. I come from a family that worked hard but struggled. Some nights, all we had to eat were stale candy bars. I became a dad during college, and a single dad not long after. I relied on food stamps and Medicaid to keep going. But I didn’t give up. I kept fighting. I became a public school math teacher. I earned five degrees. I raised four boys with my wife, Berna. I ran for State Senate, then became Majority Leader, then Attorney General – and every step of the way, I’ve carried one mission with me: **To fight for the Nevada Family. ** [**Will you split a donation of $5, $10, $20 — whatever you can — between my campaign and Eric Swalwell, to help kick off our campaign and build the grassroots movement we need to flip this seat blue? While I’ve been fighting to make life safer and more affordable for every Nevadan, Trump Republican Joe Lombardo has done the opposite – blocking housing reform, vetoing school meals and lower drug prices, and cheering on Donald Trump’s plan to gut education and health care. Unemployment is up, costs are through the roof, and working people are getting squeezed. Nothing’s gotten better under his watch – and that’s why I’m running to unseat him.
**The _Cook Political Report_ called Lombardo “the most vulnerable Republican governor in the country.” This isn’t just a top flip opportunity – it’s the flip opportunity. If we show up early and big, we can take this seat back. But if we don’t, we lose it. It’s that simple.**
[**I’m humbly asking: Will you give $15 or more now, split between my campaign and Eric Swalwell, to help me win in Nevada and restore real leadership to our state? I set a goal to raise $250,000 in the first 24 hours of this campaign, and it would mean the world to me to have you on my team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112307982/560101221/1860930471?refcode=E14362-20250728-FordSplit-SL-SplitSend&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2VmOTlhYy0xMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0wZ0Oy6SA5HkLnX2L0yHcbNe7DkOemMoAC2n24ZZG0=)
The right way ahead is forward. Thank you for joining this fight to help get us there.
Aaron Ford
* * *

Thanks for your support.
\- Eric

clean_body: | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Hi there, It’s Eric Swalwell here. I wanted to make sure you heard that my friend, Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford, is running for Governor. His message is below: I’m running for one reason above all: Too many Nevadans are working harder than ever and still getting nowhere, and I know we can change that. I’ve spent my career fighting for families like mine because I’ve lived what so many people are facing right now. I come from a family that worked hard but struggled. Some nights, all we had to eat were stale candy bars. I became a dad during college, and a single dad not long after. I relied on food stamps and Medicaid to keep going. But I didn’t give up. I kept fighting. I became a public school math teacher. I earned five degrees. I raised four boys with my wife, Berna. I ran for State Senate, then became Majority Leader, then Attorney General – and every step of the way, I’ve carried one mission with me: To fight for the Nevada Family. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = While I’ve been fighting to make life safer and more affordable for every Nevadan, Trump Republican Joe Lombardo has done the opposite – blocking housing reform, vetoing school meals and lower drug prices, and cheering on Donald Trump’s plan to gut education and health care. Unemployment is up, costs are through the roof, and working people are getting squeezed. Nothing’s gotten better under his watch – and that’s why I’m running to unseat him. The Cook Political Report_ called Lombardo “the most vulnerable Republican governor in the country.” This isn’t just a top flip opportunity – it’s the flip opportunity. If we show up early and big, we can take this seat back. But if we don’t, we lose it. It’s that simple. = The right way ahead is forward. Thank you for joining this fight to help get us there. Aaron Ford Thanks for your support. \- Eric | = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. =** Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: A MAGA extremist just entered the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**_Breaking News:**_

_MAGA extremist Mike Collins just entered the U.S. Senate race in Georgia_
**[Chip in today to stand with Jon Ossoff and ensure we have the resources to fight back >>>**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250728-2-full&t=1&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250728-2-full&t=2&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj)**
Peter,
This morning, MAGA extremist Mike Collins announced he’s running for U.S. Senate.
Let’s be clear: **Mike Collins would be an absolute disaster in the U.S. Senate, for Georgia and for our country.** It would basically be like electing Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Just scroll through his social media and you’ll see what we mean.
You’ll find video of him using an assault rifle to shoot a garbage can labeled “voting machine,” a suggestion that immigrants should be thrown to their death from helicopters, and more...
But Mike Collins wouldn’t just be a disaster because of his posts, or his obsession with Donald Trump.
In Congress, he pushed to raise the retirement age, voted against full Social Security benefits for first responders, and supported a federal abortion ban with no exceptions.
He’s stated that he wants Georgians to “get off of Medicaid” and “get off of Social Security” despite millions of Georgians relying on both of those programs.
And he supports fully repealing the _Affordable Care Act_ — kicking millions of Americans including 1 millions Georgians off their health care.
**[Peter, we’re going to do everything we can to get the word out far and wide about Mike Collins’ record. Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more to help us do it? Together, we’ll beat whoever the GOP nominee is, defend Georgia, and take back the Senate majority.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250728-2-full&t=3&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-july25.o6csNP&amount=5&refcode=em250728-2-full&t=4&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-july25.o6csNP&refcode=em250728-2-full&t=5&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj)**
---
****
Thanks for chipping in if you can, particularly today.
\- Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=6&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=592%2E5691347%2EPkCvTj) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

I have thought on it and prayed about it, and I have decided. I’m in. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOtOHdsv29RoW51tJGOGXf9D_esGxHeqkqF0lHnPAoiP0gzkasEHz2_mKpIsLVfil2fHJrpS--4gTioL-Cqcc8ps2YBqtbeMiTR13L0qZiO7-XAI_c8B4Z_5fgjUm7D3MjpuFh2SdV0hwq5kP-QnHy-UMMeDGsp-RxClw1z-Cb_ES3Ey0pomPHTbhW4_VXmvStEPTS6M3Zi3SbcIGxKTOpIP9zbTX_u5xvWrXMWYMOHXOQZn72BncIAVnOJo_-cjwhWOjZmWXG16Agdl444UdWnTV6ncytg8l57SNx4TLE6TNKIW0tFvA8Eh4PNDnkgb-y9PFfjRkWKYwLJkKKVF41LT8Va8i8Jr8B6vQMliLZZWlG7ogTf2pYgff0jb6lwrB8/4il/fHojtBeGRVGo34yHFSQZCQ/h0/h001.BVAnDBqW71K6cWO4GYovYdhU4V30haSe0ZMR2zxDeU4)
**[I’m Roy Cooper. I’m a proud Democrat. I’m also a former Governor and Attorney General from North Carolina. Today, I’m asking for your support to be the next United States Senator and help Democrats take BACK the Senate Majority in 2026. If you’re ready to join me in the fight, split a contribution between Able Dems and my campaign today >>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOtOHdsv29RoW51tJGOGXf9D_esGxHeqkqF0lHnPAoiP0GRvKoUV2z29gDmAffrWPqrDblnQyv048KS_mMfrQL1mzRzCYdOkEwFPiOQxisO_RZRTIuf-AY1s-OaEg_7Vi-iM8PnzEW0a4kUmSAT9K5Yl0_DDqeQI6EEIHftlxZZKL_Cmj6rwzfT8n90tSZiekcCpHJ3N8s_pL2W1y0wdHyepzCDNQdDpi1m3dYgZ_kio7ll__yfRzZAhhhBxWM_j9E38vLa6gntD3xdxh1V29mRdN1eYi9No8vdw0a6UAFmDZgEzUDDkdxtwXppwNDRM97ejtvTcu49hmGhQcqXbkXPsdbA4x5rZN8YHvUbI2d7-6DmdfxiW7CIxuVaL2H35Yz/4il/fHojtBeGRVGo34yHFSQZCQ/h1/h001.TpMXyizS40eO_jLWq5GOBL-qAvcJMJ9m0GxYiZgcnDM)** North Carolinians already know this about me, Friend: I’ve spent my life in service to our state, and my record shows that I will do everything in my power to deliver results for our people.
That’s why North Carolinians elected me Governor in some of the most competitive races in the nation — _twice_.
Now, this election is set to be the most competitive Senate race of 2026, and the national GOP will go to any lengths to defeat us. Everyone knows that the path to retaking the Senate Majority and STOPPING Washington Republicans starts here in NC.
**[If we’re going to win, we need Democrats from across this country to join our fight. I hope to see your name on the list of Founding Donors starting our campaign off strong, and just $10 will go a long way. Can I count on you to split a contribution of any size right away?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOtOHdsv29RoW51tJGOGXf9D_esGxHeqkqF0lHnPAoiP3OnHpNufE724cOVhGiyeTqOyF4QPv_MI3AG51Qfr7tKxHwWmSfeGLRq7bCpEGRufxlXaDBsnx-OcfXvuByagmNtnlXaITaSgsr_cT9el4StXcHsR-jdUHDUI4ZZu8RtBRZHwpUhgoIlmVTDev6P58wnPYZKIKwduW0kigBI4NfcajOUh8tpHapEIY2yG0tzCAIBu_PqqUKSMXKIKb5AuKDt5mFfN4PLLx0dU0s4m3fDg1T5ucByb1sUc6V4HB0jw5ShMA2p6vDSp-XTef1fan3yqAt7SslEdTOlbpZe_yAPUyhzvpKrp5CwtmxOZpRGV-3C5Xq1OLIm738UGrMuyLM/4il/fHojtBeGRVGo34yHFSQZCQ/h2/h001.2QxgwHN-5Da4_7UpvHj9a8IHnIVZvrHJZYBOM63vBx0)**
Friend, I have a long record of getting things done — from taking on big banks as Attorney General to getting Medicaid expansion passed when I was Governor.
I’m not afraid of doing hard work to make our country better. And I’m not afraid to speak out when politicians are doing something wrong, either.
Too many Republicans in Washington have lost all sense of duty to our people and our country. They see only the prospect of getting on Donald Trump’s wrong side and losing their power. **This cannot continue.**
Americans deserve leaders who will serve the people, not their own partisan agenda.
_Meanwhile, Donald Trump has handpicked a loyalist candidate to run against me._
As Senator, I will defend our democracy. I’ll stand up for voting rights, work hard to restore abortion access, advocate for policies that will protect our air and drinking water, and do everything possible to bring jobs and opportunity to our economy.
**[My promise to you is that I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great country. Friend, we can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does a $10 donation, split between our Senate campaign and Able Dems, fit in your budget today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOtOHdsv29RoW51tJGOGXf9D_esGxHeqkqF0lHnPAoiP02pte6resYrbbfxwfh8SnR6uzGLeA6zo6MuaFujc2HROh1WxSUaPmIiZ1kq16nHIgFHwvifhICmApfjFhKqx7rAGZk1Ao5AjCtlfACy2Q7H2KZP3WsmNe6nhvdx829kosEPjxM64vIwIQsPqJXJVer95wwxgwXqIUHBIuow43nCGhG-4DH8BIrR7rPElMy_ahzjPRLZ_euvffH3_HiALvERl4eSqiYsW9x3UEa7ibfNbIay4HXXQmioqOd_dc6HKOt_NQDljfnqsv2xZrWgoCuZkPap6z0K_kbWtQT9we9VPLFfeCkClwGQL8AVOVz2_AvuH5x2CZqUmizFcFo57Hr/4il/fHojtBeGRVGo34yHFSQZCQ/h3/h001.v9oVVJyEXBxJBj2AXtB5haIDAUQ4gJ8PwQmE_a1q-Qg)

subject: MAJOR news out of North Carolina!!!

body:
A new open seat. An upgraded rating. And a brand new Democratic candidate.
#

There are TWO U.S. Senate seats that we MUST flip in order to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year. **North Carolina and Maine.** **[If you’re ready to help us flip these seats, please consider chipping in now. Otherwise, please keep reading to learn more about both of these important races.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92821?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH)** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92821?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH)**
---

**— North Carolina —** _GOP U.S. Senator Thom Tillis announced that he will NOT seek re-election in 2026._ **After this news, Cook Political Report upgraded North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race from Leans Republican to a _TOSS UP!_** **And now, former Democratic governor of North Carolina, Roy Cooper, is officially running for the open seat!** _This Senate race will be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds next year._ **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue and restore our Democratic majority:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92821?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92822?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92822?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92821?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH)
---

**— Maine —** Republican U.S. Senator Susan Collins is running for re-election in 2026. **Maine will be one of the most _expensive_ and _competitive_ races in the country!** Cook Political Report AND the Center for Politics rate Maine’s U.S. Senate race as _Lean Republican._ But right now, with faith in the GOP at an all-time low, just about anything could tip the scales and make this race a TOSS UP! **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip Maine blue and restore our Democratic majority in the Senate:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92821?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92822?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=8&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92822?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=9&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92821?refcode=em20250728-9187&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9187%2E614464%2Es7A4RH)

name: American Patriot Daily
subject: Nancy Pelosi just agreed with Donald Trump on the last issue anyone ever expected
body:
Nancy Pelosi led two impeachment witch hunts against President Trump and tried to put him in jail.
---
[Mark as Spam](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihqpy9e6wplbrctq3xnct5q6ogs9r1ka9v66vw1j7en1v6mxjljw25u4oti90z90q3kukn04nsbwhhvjodho3sq2ik99l&__stmp=t052y9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmb8icvorwpihqpy9e6wplbrctq3xnct5q6ogs9r1ka9v66vw1j7en1v6mxjljw25u4oti90z90q3kukn04nsbwhhvjodho3sq2ik99l&__stmp=t052y9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Broadband Grant Now Open - Apply by August 1!
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170392.172632.128&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170392.172632.128&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170392.172632.128&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15050)
**Broadband Grant Now Open - Apply by August 1!** The Pennsylvania Broadband Development Authority (PBDA) is now accepting applications for the final round of the $1.16 billion Broadband Equity, Access, and Deployment (BEAD) Program. This opportunity is designed to expand affordable, reliable broadband access for Pennsylvanians, especially in underserved and rural communities. **Application Period:**
* NOW through August 1, 2025

**Eligible Applicants Include:**
* Cooperative organizations
* Not-for-profit organizations
* Public-private partnerships
* Private companies
* Public or private utility companies
* Public utility districts
* Municipalities or units of local government
* FCC-registered internet service providers

**How to Apply:**
* Visit the official PBDA grant portal to apply: [https://dced.pa.gov/programs/broadband-equity-access-and-deployment-bead-program/](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170392.172632.128&gen=1&mailing_linkid=15051)

As always, if you need help with the application process or have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our district office at 215-879-7777.
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---
District Office
2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778
| |

name: Jesse Binnall, The Kash Foundation
subject: Law enforcement officers are being handcuffed
body:
You, me, and every American should be terrified.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfbuf9diguitg69d0tmbcqsadcfhhj9l0k3e2l00_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
Friend,

You, me, and every American should be terrified.

Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country:
* In _**Los Angeles**_ , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots.

* In _**Washington, D.C.**_ , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement.

* In _**Chicago**_ , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.”

* In _**Texas**_ , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of _“whipping”_ illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted.

**You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge.**

But I have a plan to fight back.

My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation.

[The Kash Foundation, founded by Kash Patel, supports law enforcement who are being politically targeted, wrongfully prosecuted, and silenced for doing their jobs.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zarrpret0l6000orkmu3ehgsb68dtqm7m7832go0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

_Although Kash has been called to a new mission,_ the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability.

But we can’t do it alone.

[Please donate any amount you can afford to support the Kash Foundation’s mission today. We are looking to raise $56,000 this month to support our nation’s law enforcement. Click here to donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlcfa9jgfqaad5ugkjdr25kgmn38p5h7v6qufev8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf9553v863mk9akoneakg2f53vddil6cs2e1ona8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price.

This is what is at stake:
* **The radical Left is targeting law enforcement:** They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back.

* **Crime is spilling into every neighborhood:** Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities.

* **Emergency response is slowing down:** In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives.

Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country.

The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth.

And we’re asking you to join the force.

Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe.

[Please donate today because when law enforcement calls for backup, you answer!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlkseq0367mi4r6fq6erksepcgil3h835j1crntg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zni36v3p8uav77sm166pgr36s4udhdqm2bqglis8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
When others turned their backs, we stepped in.

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:

* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

And with your help, we’ll do even more.

**You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear.**

We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold.

[So with that in mind, if you can afford to send $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even more – I hope you do.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zic66crkm108ldl5b5boru6nbg99lbfrpbci5770_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
[DONATE $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0iokatst465q6a3haee27bfnuljkr41n8kuvo70_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

[DONATE $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z96cjgrbsufec9i1tfrr61ipiubjs1mhbbtt2tq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zllctfblgrtrc2il7fs5cle8qd5bpdnl0movm5p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc56qaitg21s8lvdmk79s4nl1al0cagk8goaelpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

[DONATE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq6ebu8kf8d4pa9sh1bjvvegeg691lvh9g0ib4i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv5q56u9t84aiti2439p2rvbsnoakk40funrrpr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z89h7vp2llhlha5c6caufdes7vmookffhl4cdi90_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
Thank you for answering the call and fighting with The Kash Foundation for a better future, promoting public interest, civil liberty protections, and real justice.

For law, order, and liberty,

Jesse Binnall
President
The Kash Foundation

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zradbu0nq41b4k68cir271sh5qphbpop7l8i1e38_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znoqslu0pm4ar4n9kpbeqqbr97dp6qattih0n3h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z15iq5tqu1o0ijh80n94s56oiq7iap8asod7q4ag_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbthe7b94pan9rvbkvpeiciqvjvmcmjmg41s2098_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj6cph2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They Want Me Silent—But I’m Fighting for Trump’s America. Will You Stand With Me?
body:
The mainstream media won’t touch the stories I uncover—they’re too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don’t care who’s in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that’s eating away at our country. And what I’ve found in recent weeks? It’s enough to make your blood boil.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j7ie6lv7d3iuaa25tnllc19l17h83tjlfjrct8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztq1ubi5v8kb9ijmn0tsrrtd0ksl4v2551maac6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is Laura Loomer, and I'm not your typical journalist. I don't sit in a cushy newsroom parroting talking points for the elite. I'm out there, in the trenches, exposing the corruption, betrayal, and deep-state sabotage that threatens everything President Trump has fought for--and everything we believe in. I'm a fighter, a patriot, and a relentless truth-teller. But right now, I'm writing to you [**because I can 't keep this fight alive without your help**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ok8roqjjnb21g3k1tbogmov2077ds6r4q304hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs).

Let me tell you why I do this. I've seen the lies, the cover-ups, and the cowardice firsthand. The mainstream media won't touch the stories I uncover--they're too busy protecting the Biden swamp and their globalist puppet masters. But I don't care who's in my way. I dig deeper, ask harder questions, and shine a light on the rot that's eating away at our country. And what I've found in recent weeks? **It 's enough to make your blood boil.**

**The Stories They Don 't Want You to Hear**

* **Summits of the Americas Turned Into a Woke Disaster**
Picture this: a gathering meant to strengthen America's position in the world, hijacked by Biden holdovers like Jennifer Showell and Thomas Hastings. These traitors are turning the Summits of the Americas into a pro-China, woke circus. I went down there myself, tracked their moves, and uncovered how they're undermining Trump's America First policies to cozy up to Communist China. They thought they could get away with it--but I'm making sure the world knows their names and their shame.

* **An Obama Loyalist Sabotaging Trump 's Iran Strategy**
Then there's Nathanael Swanson. This guy's an Obama-era relic, still slinking around the State Department's Iran negotiation team like a snake in the grass. Trump took a hard line against Iran--sanctions, strength, no compromise. But Swanson? He's working behind the scenes to unravel it all, putting our national security on the line. I've spent sleepless nights piecing together the paper trail of all Biden holdovers who remain inside the Trump admin, and I'm not stopping until they are all out of there for good.

* **Dan Goldman and the Democrat Cover-Up Machine**
Ever heard of Rep. Dan Goldman? He's a slick operator shielding violent Democrats like LaMonica McIver while orchestrating lawfare against Trump. I caught wind of this when I started digging into McIver's trail of chaos--Goldman's been running interference, protecting his own while the Democrats try to bury Trump under legal attacks. I've got the receipts, and I'm exposing their game one bombshell at a time.

* **Democrats Ignoring Pro-Hamas Violence**
Two Israeli diplomats were murdered in D.C. by a pro-Hamas terrorist. Two lives snuffed out, and what did Democrats like Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib do? Nothing. Not a word of condemnation. They're silent because they're complicit, enabling Jew hatred and Islamic terrorism while pretending to care about justice. I've been on the ground, talking to sources, documenting every disgusting detail. They can't hide from me--and I won't let them.

* **A DEI Judge Blocking Trump 's Vision**
And then there's Judge Myong J. Joun, a Biden appointee whose family rakes in cash from DEI consulting. This guy had the nerve to block Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education--a move that would've freed our kids from woke indoctrination. I dug into his family's financial ties, and it's clear: this isn't justice, it's a paycheck. I'm fighting to get that story out there, because our children deserve better.

**Why I Need You**

These aren't just stories--they're battles. Every day, I'm taking on the deep state, the media, and the woke mob. They hate me for it. They've tried to censor me, smear me, shut me down. But I don't flinch. I don't back off. Because this isn't about me--**it 's about you, your family, and the future of America**. It's about protecting Trump's America First agenda from the cowards and traitors trying to tear it apart.

Here's the raw truth: I don't have corporate sponsors or billionaire sugar daddies bankrolling me. I'm funded by people like you--patriots who see what's at stake and refuse to let the swamp win. [**Every dollar you donate keeps me in the fight**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcknnro4h8msq2krltbbpkp52sb4m7es1imih68_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs). It pays for my plane tickets to chase leads, my late-night research, the equipment I need to break these stories. [**Without you, I 'm grounded. Without you, the truth gets buried.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10i758a8p25mp6nljo9j1adcigbvspq7nndukto_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs)

**Stand With Me --Right Now**

[**I 'm asking you to join me.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3fldc6uivgion7eltvlfalnt8jtce3muav3dacg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs) Your donation isn't just money--it's fuel for the fire I'm lighting under these corrupt elites. It's a fist in the air against the liars and sellouts. It's a promise that we won't let them silence us. **[**Donate now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp898k2gii2ouh7mbir8fu5ieo8cp71vdrfbsil0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs)**[**and let 's hit them where it hurts--right in the open, with the truth.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1hg2ubl5h5otbgsa53j53povmq2og74sc61132o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs)

I'm not giving up. I've got more leads, more stories, more battles ahead. [**But I can 't do it alone**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ana0r15datle8rug60nltnfo540ahu4eihe8ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs). With you by my side, we can expose every single one of these rats and defend the America we love. [**Will you stand with me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjeki3l52fa93n01jasd2pk0l18tsdboubkrl9n0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgecoj7cdh2bs)

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

name: Hillsdale College via Great American Update
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr1uss8na5bmg503f5gp8jb0h1nuv3aftlo49cug_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgeao36cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z18982q2d2dsod4qdj6p32otg8uf03sgor3k388o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgeao36cth2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9cii6tl9n7a4mq72j8biipolmm5cpntb86heg20_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgeao36cth2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8j29bh092e1dupejmhqltb4i32sii3u9e1ispio_rp22sh2s8i6epb6ctgeao36cth2bs)
---

clean_body: Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link: | | Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
