| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebeccachaney/p/a-sacred-pilgrimage-of-heritage-honor?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0ee55ff-4f20-42bb-8d76-80b83c7e6099?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Our recent church-led historical tour was not merely an educational endeavor but a deeply meaningful and spiritual pilgrimage. We walked the grounds of Valley Forge, stood in reverent silence at Mount Vernon, marveled at the enduring legacy preserved in Philadelphia's Independence Hall, were humbled as we visited the White House and the great monuments of Washington, D.C., traced our fingers along the Vietnam Memorial wall to pay honor and respect to those who gave the last full measure, and we laid eyes on the original Constitution and Declaration of Independence--documents that changed the course of human history and continue to shape our moral responsibility as stewards of liberty. I do not name everything we got to see and bear witness to in this article; it was truly so much. We crammed in as much as we could in almost 40,000 steps in three days to see all we could and absorb every whit-stitch of history possible.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/820571bd-3b32-47d8-b9b0-0a33da2e3eea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For me as a homeschooling mother of ten years, this journey held paramount significance. I have long believed that the best education is found outside the confines of institutional systems through self-education, biblical foundation, and the pursuit of truth. In this way, I've followed in the footsteps of our nation's first president, George Washington, who was self-taught and divinely equipped with unprecedented foresight. His leadership remains unsurpassed, and his life is a testament to the power of independent thought, God-centered conviction, and moral resolve.

Education is not merely about subjects--it is about the formation of the soul. True education follows the biblical model: knowledge, understanding, and wisdom--the trivium of grammar, dialectic, and rhetoric. It is through this lens that we see God not as a compartmentalized subject but as the center and sustaining Life source of all things. When we begin with God at the center, we are freed to see the divine order in everything, and to recognize our calling to steward our gifts, our time, and our nation with moral courage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6e17795e-4e3f-4f2f-9a8e-94d2891e0ec5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One of the most unforgettable moments of the trip was witnessing my daughter take part in the laying of the wreath at the tomb of George and Martha Washington.
It was a sacred, awe-filled memory we will carry forever. Alongside us were veteran friends who saluted our nation's original Commander in Chief--an image that left many in tears. It was a moment of profound honor, respect, and unity.
At Mt. Vernon, we were able to be part of the Resident Drum and Fifer's class. Don Franscisco, a solid man of faith in God, a member of the Sons of the American Revolution, and a masterful and classically trained musician, took us for a class on all the types of flutes made and shared incredible history about how music played a crucial role in times of victory, sorrow, worship, and how it brought hope to so many. Music is such a deeply connective fabric within humanity and transcends time. We were able to worship with him to old hymns and participate in singing old, patriotic songs. What a phenomenal, patriotic human that will leave an indelible mark on each of us. Some moments in life are just profoundly affecting; that was definitely one of them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9cffa1b5-822c-4220-a293-b8d0804aa4f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The further society drifts from the truths of Eden, the more broken and hollow it becomes. Since the grievous fall in the Garden, mankind has struggled with the weight of sin, pride, and forgetfulness of the divine order. Yet, I pray with all my heart that God will redeem what is fractured and use my humble offering--my life, my motherhood, my teaching--for His glory. My desire is to point all people to Christ, to help them see that He alone is King, and that every person is called to take inventory of their life before Him.

No one has been perfect but King Jesus. May we be willing to sacrifice comfort, answer His call, and carry Freedom's Flame wherever He leads. I've had the honor of teaching Constitution classes across Mississippi and helping ignite a grassroots movement of civic education rooted in biblical truth and moral conscience.
I pray my children will one day understand that their mother gave her all to keep liberty alive in their hearts--from homeschooling to my current full-time job with the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security. I do not sit back and wait for someone else to preserve my liberties and freedoms. It is my sacred duty and honor to serve.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fe577891-db8d-42eb-81d8-181e7ff469e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I highly encourage every American to take a pilgrimage of sorts to as many founding sites as possible--to renew their reverence and awe of what it took, life by life,
to allow us the opportunity to be where we are today. May we not squander one moment but maximize the time we have left so that generations to come may reap the rewards of a truly free nation.

I feel a deep stirring in my spirit that God is preparing something great. I stand in hopeful anticipation, with eyes fixed on Him. My prayer is that revival sweeps this land--beginning not in politics or programs, but in each one of us. May the weight of His glory fall on us, and may we respond with obedience, humility, and a resolve to do the next right thing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a5f68fb9-a5ae-45fc-bfb5-79e1cc46424d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A heartfelt thank you to Bro. Scott Carter, pastor of Flora Methodist Church, for being a pastor who understands the times we are living in--who sees clearly the patterns of current culture and is able to powerfully apply the brilliance and providence of our nation's founding to the unchanging truth of Scripture. His vision for connecting our national history with our calling as citizens of both heaven and earth is a gift to us all. We are grateful for his leadership and the way he shepherds our church family with conviction, truth, and grace. We also thank Flora Methodist Church for making this trip extra possible with so many fund raisers, donations, and blessings of prayer and vision to see it through.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aa922036-bbd4-457e-bc30-37a49cfd3e65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/305c4bb6-fe82-4dc2-88da-50a8db9382cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1061d975-e8df-48ed-ae18-41b940d6e7c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Rebecca Chaney is the Director for Restore Liberty Mississippi and a former board Member for the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. She is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship classes and Constitutional Classes since 2020. She has helped start these classes all over the state of Mississippi. She is a homeschool Mom of ten years to her son and daughter. Rebecca is employed by the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security as the statewide Targeted Violence and Terrorism and Threat Prevention Trainer and is a community liaison for the MOHS between civilians, community, and law enforcement. She holds many credentials and certifications throughout the education and behavioral arenas as well as for the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security.**(The views presented in this article are those of the author and do not represent the views of the Mississippi Department of Public Safety (DPS) or the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security (MOHS).**_

[](https://substack.com/redirect/65092bbd-0480-484b-9b8a-d248ffbd2303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..gsu39g5z00TyCnWQDphlnyOke_1ffCVXuWrtpPyR85o?)
clean_body: | | ---|---|--- | | | | | cross-posted a post from ---|---|--- | | | Dana CriswellJul 29 Dana Criswell ---|---|--- Rebecca has great insight and knowledge into our American heritage. Definitely worth the read. | | | Jul 29 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Our recent church-led historical tour was not merely an educational endeavor but a deeply meaningful and spiritual pilgrimage. We walked the grounds of Valley Forge, stood in reverent silence at Mount Vernon, marveled at the enduring legacy preserved in Philadelphia's Independence Hall, were humbled as we visited the White House and the great monuments of Washington, D.C., traced our fingers along the Vietnam Memorial wall to pay honor and respect to those who gave the last full measure, and we laid eyes on the original Constitution and Declaration of Independence--documents that changed the course of human history and continue to shape our moral responsibility as stewards of liberty. I do not name everything we got to see and bear witness to in this article; it was truly so much. We crammed in as much as we could in almost 40,000 steps in three days to see all we could and absorb every whit-stitch of history possible. | | ---|---|--- For me as a homeschooling mother of ten years, this journey held paramount significance. I have long believed that the best education is found outside the confines of institutional systems through self-education, biblical foundation, and the pursuit of truth. In this way, I've followed in the footsteps of our nation's first president, George Washington, who was self-taught and divinely equipped with unprecedented foresight. His leadership remains unsurpassed, and his life is a testament to the power of independent thought, God-centered conviction, and moral resolve. Education is not merely about subjects--it is about the formation of the soul. True education follows the biblical model: knowledge, understanding, and wisdom--the trivium of grammar, dialectic, and rhetoric. It is through this lens that we see God not as a compartmentalized subject but as the center and sustaining Life source of all things. When we begin with God at the center, we are freed to see the divine order in everything, and to recognize our calling to steward our gifts, our time, and our nation with moral courage. | | ---|---|--- One of the most unforgettable moments of the trip was witnessing my daughter take part in the laying of the wreath at the tomb of George and Martha Washington. It was a sacred, awe-filled memory we will carry forever. Alongside us were veteran friends who saluted our nation's original Commander in Chief--an image that left many in tears. It was a moment of profound honor, respect, and unity. At Mt. Vernon, we were able to be part of the Resident Drum and Fifer's class. Don Franscisco, a solid man of faith in God, a member of the Sons of the American Revolution, and a masterful and classically trained musician, took us for a class on all the types of flutes made and shared incredible history about how music played a crucial role in times of victory, sorrow, worship, and how it brought hope to so many. Music is such a deeply connective fabric within humanity and transcends time. We were able to worship with him to old hymns and participate in singing old, patriotic songs. What a phenomenal, patriotic human that will leave an indelible mark on each of us. Some moments in life are just profoundly affecting; that was definitely one of them. | | ---|---|--- The further society drifts from the truths of Eden, the more broken and hollow it becomes. Since the grievous fall in the Garden, mankind has struggled with the weight of sin, pride, and forgetfulness of the divine order. Yet, I pray with all my heart that God will redeem what is fractured and use my humble offering--my life, my motherhood, my teaching--for His glory. My desire is to point all people to Christ, to help them see that He alone is King, and that every person is called to take inventory of their life before Him. No one has been perfect but King Jesus. May we be willing to sacrifice comfort, answer His call, and carry Freedom's Flame wherever He leads. I've had the honor of teaching Constitution classes across Mississippi and helping ignite a grassroots movement of civic education rooted in biblical truth and moral conscience. I pray my children will one day understand that their mother gave her all to keep liberty alive in their hearts--from homeschooling to my current full-time job with the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security. I do not sit back and wait for someone else to preserve my liberties and freedoms. It is my sacred duty and honor to serve. | | ---|---|--- I highly encourage every American to take a pilgrimage of sorts to as many founding sites as possible--to renew their reverence and awe of what it took, life by life, to allow us the opportunity to be where we are today. May we not squander one moment but maximize the time we have left so that generations to come may reap the rewards of a truly free nation. I feel a deep stirring in my spirit that God is preparing something great. I stand in hopeful anticipation, with eyes fixed on Him. My prayer is that revival sweeps this land--beginning not in politics or programs, but in each one of us. May the weight of His glory fall on us, and may we respond with obedience, humility, and a resolve to do the next right thing. | | ---|---|--- A heartfelt thank you to Bro. Scott Carter, pastor of Flora Methodist Church, for being a pastor who understands the times we are living in--who sees clearly the patterns of current culture and is able to powerfully apply the brilliance and providence of our nation's founding to the unchanging truth of Scripture. His vision for connecting our national history with our calling as citizens of both heaven and earth is a gift to us all. We are grateful for his leadership and the way he shepherds our church family with conviction, truth, and grace. We also thank Flora Methodist Church for making this trip extra possible with so many fund raisers, donations, and blessings of prayer and vision to see it through. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Rebecca Chaney is the Director for Restore Liberty Mississippi and a former board Member for the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. She is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship classes and Constitutional Classes since 2020. She has helped start these classes all over the state of Mississippi. She is a homeschool Mom of ten years to her son and daughter. Rebecca is employed by the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security as the statewide Targeted Violence and Terrorism and Threat Prevention Trainer and is a community liaison for the MOHS between civilians, community, and law enforcement. She holds many credentials and certifications throughout the education and behavioral arenas as well as for the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security.(The views presented in this article are those of the author and do not represent the views of the Mississippi Department of Public Safety (DPS) or the Mississippi Office of Homeland Security (MOHS).** Thanks for reading The Spirit and The Letter ! This post is public so feel free to share it. | | | | | | | | Originally posted on | | | | Yarborough Chaney ---|---|--- | ? Civil Stewardship from a Biblical Worldview (C) 2025 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

_“This is a political consultant’s dream, because your message is just one thing,**and that’s ‘No.’** ”_

**That was a direct quote from a Republican political consultant regarding the retention elections for three PA Supreme Court justices set to take place in November, fellow activist. **

As a reminder, three PA Supreme Court justices (elected as Democrats) are seeking to retain their seats after their ten-year term. PA has non-partisan judicial retention elections. On Election Day in PA, voters will vote “yes” or “no” to decide whether to keep these justices on the bench. If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign, the PA Supreme Court could have three vacancies until the Governor can appoint and confirm their replacements (which is unlikely, as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027.

As _Metro Philadelphia_ recently reported, **Republicans see these elections as their best chance to reverse our Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court and establish a MAGA-controlled court.** This would have a drastic impact on the future of PA: “This would pave the way for very different judicial decisions. Many of the court’s recent election-related rulings were made on narrow 4-3 votes that could swing differently if the composition of the court changes.”

State supreme courts are critical – which is why the GOP is working overtime to replace Democrat-elected justices ahead of the 2026 presidential elections. State supreme courts impact everything from voting rights to reproductive rights, environmental protections, redistricting, and much more. There are only 100 days left until Election Day, and we need to ensure that voters in PA understand what’s at stake.

**We have good news: thanks to a generous donor, all donations of up to $50,000 from now until the end of the month will be doubled to help us reach our centered communities in these final months. We will need all hands on deck to reach historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth, and ensure they have everything they need to make their voices heard. **
[**Will you rush a doubled donation now to support our critical voter education and mobilization work ahead of this year’s judicial elections?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR-2F-2BsGqrbQ23aFzSDWcFvVwGKyx9QuJslIPj5jLKud7LKGG5-2BtNXJJLXPqatepk1Lb7h5QhUsC-2BSda2YEYBk9rs8-3DYm6D_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYZASoYoPXDM2fQrIpAmEeMgcbF3VfV-2BUY7ut5-2FmkjB1cNIbD71msMkZskoUS2N3kNm49tIbUgB-2FwTerC-2F24leT0hXWk49TZ1w7l4k67FEy8q2gAzrlDE9yZTSkMC6v3C7v4bHeJYhYUvZ111vM6ySQzfcK32sq2RaG2IdVfvi4NJUQoRjI1HHv1JZLi5DkbC7)

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | “This is a political consultant’s dream, because your message is just one thing,and that’s ‘No.’ ” That was a direct quote from a Republican political consultant regarding the retention elections for three PA Supreme Court justices set to take place in November, fellow activist. As a reminder, three PA Supreme Court justices (elected as Democrats) are seeking to retain their seats after their ten-year term. PA has non-partisan judicial retention elections. On Election Day in PA, voters will vote “yes” or “no” to decide whether to keep these justices on the bench. If MAGA is successful with their anti-retention campaign, the PA Supreme Court could have three vacancies until the Governor can appoint and confirm their replacements (which is unlikely, as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027. As Metro Philadelphia recently reported, Republicans see these elections as their best chance to reverse our Democratic majority on the PA Supreme Court and establish a MAGA-controlled court. This would have a drastic impact on the future of PA: “This would pave the way for very different judicial decisions. Many of the court’s recent election-related rulings were made on narrow 4-3 votes that could swing differently if the composition of the court changes.” State supreme courts are critical – which is why the GOP is working overtime to replace Democrat-elected justices ahead of the 2026 presidential elections. State supreme courts impact everything from voting rights to reproductive rights, environmental protections, redistricting, and much more. There are only 100 days left until Election Day, and we need to ensure that voters in PA understand what’s at stake. We have good news: thanks to a generous donor, all donations of up to $50,000 from now until the end of the month will be doubled to help us reach our centered communities in these final months. We will need all hands on deck to reach historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth, and ensure they have everything they need to make their voices heard. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: It’s up to us to protect the independence of our state courts. We are grateful to have your support in this fight. Thank you, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). name: AMAC Action
subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5eh6g2aq2t7nveoiq8nf7g6q2ofe2uiboaa54vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh3l7g0cj4nd9qe9hagd5per6hrdp3pfe8o6ekg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2cv2c0vvs0gu69l15s9vac9f0uan1tp7lh0malg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7p1roi64qdb19ijo8nqdtfk3flno0gjv52393qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk8o8ascic108nnlek0lp7lg0embmoo3jcpeno68_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn8h4i59ek98rdsbnnvs9ei3f50k71kaj5mb5970_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zif3ov665ctasuf7qrsq19ehq15dj07v4tfrkdag_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv0uc3r9md5df0h9bnp7rpdpjpsrag2n647bcv0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6db4o92tvoo538mmnjfas0fv0r193lceef8mv5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)

---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0920ernot87i9a8acpa1b2r0ph30b4umftsb13g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcbm40sqfb6miq5kcsice57mptmuldblducnc5do_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g61ob0clh2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. Friend, What catches your attention here?
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6E6E48345658556D7875434A38634E45752B466D6B442F49457639634D6C5461666167744731502F574742364E507A4E4E6E47734E6E70354935744F4A377755/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-29%20at%208.54.14%E2%80%AFAM.png]
At first glance, you might see a handful of chairs. A few coffee cups. Some folks standing around, chatting.
I see hope.
Every one of the people in this room made the decision to show up. Not for fame. Not for power. But because they care. About their neighbors. About their kids and grandkids. About the future of this state.
And if you’re reading this, I know you do too. I need your help.
Florida is being tested right now by unaffordable housing, by corrupt politics, by an infinite wave of dark money bankrolling horrible candidates into crucial positions.
Rooms like this one remind me that we are not powerless. Florida is ready for change, because for far too long it’s been abuse over affordability and respect.

subject: A ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---

| |

---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ruuftknaro3n8fjb2pvih7c70esq61atrh8ov0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g69pj4c1h2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znrg97d57gehou6qrgnisacf9vd461mul04ddoko_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g69pj4c1h2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3fcjas7kg7jndrda8k6u3c9ed82d8699uh2ep00_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g69pj4c1h2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc7dajlqbupptigcui2rlm204vd3jb2kgpn6vftg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g69pj4c1h2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb887u6bvsnlifc0mn3evljkdes0e8f7nj1c0ia8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g69pj4c1h2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za8g08t0kiuoboatb0tm6uisvmlpqq2h384ro020_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c3g69pj4c1h2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. clean_body: It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. # [Severe Weather Looming for eastern USA](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=169557565&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTU3NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM3OTU3NjQsImV4cCI6MTc1NjM4Nzc2NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.JZwVp6qdGV3Aixgs2wpPQZfqZc3RD6FTJW6lBL6lT5Q)

---

| | [](https://substack..46zrKBK5H-qHYZyMphnrIqQLpHd4H4F3WSaQNyhSMWk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/severe-weather-looming-for-eastern?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

If you check your daily weather application (_Weather Underground is the best, fyi)_ , and you see a drop in temperature from 97°F to 75°F in one day with storms in between, don't prematurely celebrate the drop in temperature.
Such extreme temperature drops, when caused by the passage of a cold front, typically come with extreme severe weather, like what we're seeing now in the Midwest.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/da1d71d7-5e11-4056-b208-09e2ef31ecf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
More than [200 million people](https://substack.com/redirect/094e42da-ca0f-4629-a371-fe3b609e6955?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the central US to the East Coast are under high-level heat risk Tuesday as high temperatures climb into the 90s and the heat index soars even higher.
Stretches of extreme heat are getting more intense and lasting longer as the world warms due to fossil fuel burning.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/242c62c8-e10c-4b5b-87d6-f010015398b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The cold front [moving through the Midwest right now](https://substack.com/redirect/2f4ba565-0365-48b2-84b5-cab2a5b014d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has brought hurricane-force (up to 100 mph) winds and mass devastation, and will reach the East Coast later this week...

body:
The decision about Smith’s body was made by... | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112331087/560164894/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250728Shigley_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiNjBmNjFlLTgwNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Cp-TaFr2rHNcwy1EKhGzXUm798rkdD13FgUh7XgJPW4=)
---
Hi Peter,

Last year, we were proud to support Debra Shigley’s candidacy for a highly competitive seat in the battleground state of Georgia. She ran against an extremist anti-choice opponent who helped push the state's cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban. This law has already caused untold harm to women, including Adriana Smith, who was declared brain dead at 8 weeks pregnant and was subsequently placed on _life support_ for months so doctors could retrieve her baby via cesarean section.

The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. Let that sink in.

The women of Georgia deserve so much more, and that starts with better representation in their government. That’s why we are thrilled to be supporting Debra Shigley once again as she runs for **a highly _flippable_ seat in the Georgia State Senate District 21. She needs our help to get across the finish line.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112331089/560164896/-1604983161?refcode=EM_F_250728Shigley_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiNjBmNjFlLTgwNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Cp-TaFr2rHNcwy1EKhGzXUm798rkdD13FgUh7XgJPW4=)
---
Debra is running in a **special election taking place NEXT MONTH** for an open seat against 6 Republican candidates, 5 of whom are white males – she’s the only Democrat in the race. All of her opponents are proud conservative, MAGA Republicans who have vowed to further restrict access to abortion in the state (the audacity...). We can’t let that happen.

[**This race is coming up SOON on August 26. We’re working to unseat as many “abortion ban” legislators as possible and replace them with women who will restore and defend our rights. You can support Debra’s campaign for this seat by rushing a split $20.26 or more donation today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-shigley/?refcode=EM_F_250728Shigley_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_L1&amount=20.26)

She ran against an extremist anti-choice opponent who helped push the state's cruel and deadly 6-week abortion ban. This law has already caused untold harm to women, including Adriana Smith, who was declared brain dead at 8 weeks pregnant and was subsequently placed on life support for months so doctors could retrieve her baby via cesarean section. The decision about Smith’s body was made by the Georgia state government, which consists of an almost entirely male executive branch and a state legislature that is more than 65% male. Let that sink in. The women of Georgia deserve so much more, and that starts with better representation in their government. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=072725_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=072725_4]
Hi, Peter,
I’m Roy Cooper, and I am running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. I believe that our brightest days are still ahead, but we have to work together to fix what’s broken in Washington.
Politicians in DC are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. I’ve had enough.
We have to change things, but I need you with me. Together, we can win this Senate race and help Democrats take back the majority. Will you split a contribution of $20 or another amount that’s right for you between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to get us started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=072725_4]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=072725_4]
These are no ordinary times, Peter . I believe elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don’t seem to share that sense of duty.
When I look at what’s happening in Washington now, lawmakers are tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires’ pockets. They’re cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe.
They’re punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong. Something has to give.
There’s another path, Peter. When I was Governor of North Carolina, we expanded Medicaid. We passed pay raises for public school teachers and we built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in our people.
Washington can look like this, too. It’s time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve.
If this is the America you believe in, this campaign is for you, Peter .
We’re in for a tough election here in North Carolina, but with the help of committed supporters, we’ve won the toughest races before. I’m grateful to have The Real Texas's support in this crucial race, and I’d like to have yours, too. Your donation today will help us take on the challenge of the most competitive Senate campaign in 2026. Please give whatever is right for you and split a donation between our team and The Real Texas today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072725_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_4&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_4&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_4&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_4&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=072725_4&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072725_4&amount=25]
Let’s do this together,
Roy Cooper
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072725_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072725_4]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=e9HAWi0qgX7XViI%2BjjGCjQVFlMLNdw9zsGbAsua3RD27YRhhqik3bCSkMbGsk0iihojNLD%2BZs3NLZjDg6PNLna7z8M4xPtzgvp8aRQ6Hxs9bcOB%2FOb8YifwwzU1m%2BcmVdaL9LkCOWRBETUPjtfb2YsujQgQN2j2JlrpaagCPWswb9DwAv0leJpzcEIsFoVSB6nU1aflkYFZww70b4dfQvYfkiZa3otI07tNROmbIRi8eywDrBx5RcEZ9oDzBZKhMylzjh5TZZpnmdm8hundBgI42Y%2FfXDdmeZWsQoC6e3arXi11DGGTwdk2D%2B3X7fJPQvs%2BMCiSmO598%2FeyboAumU55l9qHwqYXo5MZnyDYl4p3o2LIdkx%2BkCUOA5u9BcENfnQgPu57q5Kdn19wKwrtT0isVi9QouQptgpBI4ZdmrMc%3D .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I have thought on it and prayed about it, and I have decided. I’m in.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92799?refcode=em20250729-9185&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9185%2E614464%2EGdYB53)
**[I’m Roy Cooper. I’m a proud Democrat. I’m also a former Governor and Attorney General from North Carolina. Today, I’m asking for your support to be the next United States Senator and help Democrats take BACK the Senate Majority in 2026. If you’re ready to join me in the fight, split a contribution between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92799?refcode=em20250729-9185&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9185%2E614464%2EGdYB53)**
**North Carolinians already know this about me, Peter:** I’ve spent my life in service to our state, and my record shows that I will do everything in my power to deliver results for our people.
That’s why North Carolinians elected me Governor in some of the most competitive races in the nation — _twice._
Now, this election is set to be the most competitive Senate race of 2026, and the national GOP will go to any lengths to defeat us. Everyone knows that the path to retaking the Senate Majority and STOPPING Washington Republicans starts here in NC.
**[If we’re going to win, we need Democrats from across this country to join our fight. I hope to see your name on the list of Founding Donors starting our campaign off strong, and just $10 will go a long way. Can I count on you to split a contribution of any size right away?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92799?refcode=em20250729-9185&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9185%2E614464%2EGdYB53)**
Peter, I have a long record of getting things done — from taking on big banks as Attorney General to getting Medicaid expansion passed when I was Governor.
I’m not afraid of doing hard work to make our country better. _And I’m not afraid to speak out when politicians are doing something wrong, either._
Too many Republicans in Washington have lost all sense of duty to our people and our country. They see only the prospect of getting on Donald Trump’s wrong side and losing their power. **This cannot continue.**
Americans deserve leaders who will serve the people, not their own partisan agenda.
_Meanwhile, Donald Trump has handpicked a loyalist candidate to run against me._
As Senator, I will defend our democracy. I’ll stand up for voting rights, work hard to restore abortion access, advocate for policies that will protect our air and drinking water, and do everything possible to bring jobs and opportunity to our economy.
**[My promise to you is that I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great country. Peter, we can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does a $10 donation, split between our Senate campaign and Heartland Patriots, fit in your budget today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92799?refcode=em20250729-9185&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9185%2E614464%2EGdYB53)**

North Carolinians already know this about me, Peter: I’ve spent my life in service to our state, and my record shows that I will do everything in my power to deliver results for our people. That’s why North Carolinians elected me Governor in some of the most competitive races in the nation — twice. Now, this election is set to be the most competitive Senate race of 2026, and the national GOP will go to any lengths to defeat us. Everyone knows that the path to retaking the Senate Majority and STOPPING Washington Republicans starts here in NC. Peter, I have a long record of getting things done — from taking on big banks as Attorney General to getting Medicaid expansion passed when I was Governor. I’m not afraid of doing hard work to make our country better. And I’m not afraid to speak out when politicians are doing something wrong, either. Too many Republicans in Washington have lost all sense of duty to our people and our country. They see only the prospect of getting on Donald Trump’s wrong side and losing their power. | Peter,
You've voted in presidential elections, midterms, maybe even local races...
But have you ever been asked to vote for judges?
This November, judges are on the ballot in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court races and the stakes couldn't be higher.
🔴 If MAGA-backed forces flip these, Republicans will gain majority control of the court -- right in time to redraw districts, rewrite election rules, strip access to abortion, and nullify voter protections.
Here's the scary part: most voters don't even know this race is happening.[ ](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012cCzFQT_3XZLw7k1Y2hiGpzxV4zMKdGjBapDgMiDjR7KM5MBtJvUE8y7YcmpQfgba-o0qGdYkU555N1C9HDZwVKjh0k_PIifgzrCXI_ZZRohhtaR-Zd63uGwqoD6QM58Tc3rwKqXl_k2uFHxk12qx7-dfo7tQDDe0iye8k_TEiKEbXtYoi_OQ59oOKAc1zibrSvMFaAPch0EVCSW6XJKXyKAMv1cJ4YPLTpXej7Az6ashQdT38S98sMJjVMPIfM1DtIXLBQjRDY=&c=Yy54pXUy0G1ec9p_z1X-YLLcNjInOGxs-03nSakSa-dzUhr-UOELqg==&ch=f6s4RwNtFiHh_4qpsvb61i8THHasDL4JOFEJeRftcUBfa56sfpnR0A==)Meanwhile, MAGA megadonors are quietly sinking millions into campaigns to teach GOP voters to vote "NO" on Dem justices

clean_body: If MAGA-backed forces flip these, Republicans will gain majority control of the court — right in time to redraw districts, rewrite election rules, strip access to abortion, and nullify voter protectio | | | | | == | Peter, You've voted in presidential elections, midterms, maybe even local races... But have you ever been asked to vote for judges? This November, judges are on the ballot in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court races and the stakes couldn't be higher. 🔴 If MAGA-backed forces flip these, Republicans will gain majority control of the court -- right in time to redraw districts, rewrite election rules, strip access to abortion, and nullify voter protections. Here's the scary part: most voters don't even know this race is happening., MAGA megadonors are quietly sinking millions into campaigns to teach GOP voters to vote "NO" on Dem justices That's why you are so essential. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Thank you, Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Peter,
Republicans have made their intentions crystal clear: they’re coming after Governor Walz—and they’re desperate to turn our state red.
**Former GOP State Senator Scott Jensen announced recently that he’s running for governor again. Then, the former chair of the Minnesota GOP launched a new PAC dedicated solely to attacking Governor Walz and smearing his record.**
These developments prove that Republicans are redoubling their efforts to roll back the progress we’ve made in Minnesota. If they succeed, they’ll only take us backwards—and impose their toxic MAGA agenda on our state.
**These targets on the Governor’s back are no joke, so we need to step up our game in response.** To defend his record and stop Republicans’ extreme agenda, we need to hit our $20,000 goal by our end-of-month deadline on Thursday. As of this morning, we still need to raise $17,236.
[**Will you make a donation now to help us get there and fight back against Republicans’ onslaught of attacks on Governor Walz and our state’s values?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112336951/560179475/349921292?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTQ5Yjk3NS04NDZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kMIAaJIYjmseYA8eR4RJG72HA6hfbBDgMFU2yD1lzso=)

name: Stand with Bernie on Gaza via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME re: Gaza
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Horrifying, heartbreaking images of starving children in Gaza are
everywhere. Crowds of parents risk everything to line up at deadly aid
distribution sites, holding empty pots, desperate to feed their families –
only to be met with gunfire or explosions. A thousand people have been
killed trying to get aid in the last few weeks alone.

Right now, the world is FINALLY waking up and pressure has reached a
boiling point. Yet U.S. bombs keep flowing in, fueling this horror.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33237?source=email-20250729&t=1011&akid=9091%2E5885482%2EqM_wVG ]Bernie tweet calling out the war crimes Israel has committed and the
$22 billion the US has given the Israeli military since the war began

Bernie is calling on Congress to stop enabling these crimes in our name.
And here’s how: The Block the Bombs Act would halt the flow of deadly U.S.
bombs fueling this devastating crisis. Pressure has never been stronger
for the U.S. to DO SOMETHING – but it’s going to take all of us speaking
out right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33237?source=email-20250729&t=1012&akid=9091%2E5885482%2EqM_wVG ]Will you stand with Bernie by adding your name today and demanding
Congress pass the Block the Bombs Act before more children die?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33237?source=email-20250729&t=1013&akid=9091%2E5885482%2EqM_wVG ]ADD YOUR NAME

For nearly two years, the people of Gaza have endured one horror after the
next. Now, children are dying not only from bombings, but from hunger and
thirst. Hospital workers are performing surgeries without anesthetic.
Parents are mixing animal feed with water to keep their children alive.

This moment feels different – like a line in the sand. Even Donald Trump,
a stalwart Netanyahu ally, is breaking ranks – calling out the mass
starvation unfolding in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33237?source=email-20250729&t=1014&akid=9091%2E5885482%2EqM_wVG ]Headline: Trump, breaking with Netanyahu, acknowledges 'real
starvation' in Gaza

As the world wakes up to this nightmare, Congress is at a crossroads. 22
Members of the House of Representatives introduced the Block the Bombs Act
– a critical new bill that would cut off the flow of bombs and offensive
weapons from the U.S. to Israel.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33237?source=email-20250729&t=1015&akid=9091%2E5885482%2EqM_wVG ]Headline: House Progressives''Block the Bombs Act' Would End Transfer
of Offensive Arms to Israel

This bill represents what most Americans want – an end to the flow of
deadly U.S. weapons fueling the horrors in Gaza. And it would finally
allow Congress to take back its power from the Trump administration and
put an end to U.S. complicity in these atrocities.

Tens of thousands of Our Revolution members have already come together to
say "Not in Our Name" and demand that Congress act.

Congress with calls to act. Will you stand with Bernie and send an urgent
message telling your representative to pass the Block the Bombs Act
without delay?

justice. When we flood Congressional offices with calls, emails, and

Together, alongside Bernie and thousands demanding justice, we can stop

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Horrifying, heartbreaking images of starving children in Gaza are everywhere. Crowds of parents risk everything to line up at deadly aid distribution sites, holding empty pots, desperate to feed their families – only to be met with gunfire or explosions. A thousand people have been killed trying to get aid in the last few weeks alone. Right now, the world is FINALLY waking up and pressure has reached a boiling point. Yet U.S. bombs keep flowing in, fueling this horror. [ ]Bernie tweet calling out the war crimes Israel has committed and the $22 billion the US has given the Israeli military since the war began Bernie is calling on Congress to stop enabling these crimes in our name. And here’s how: The Block the Bombs Act would halt the flow of deadly U.S. bombs fueling this devastating crisis. Pressure has never been stronger for the U.S. to DO SOMETHING – but it’s going to take all of us speaking out right now. [ ]Will you stand with Bernie by adding your name today and demanding Congress pass the Block the Bombs Act before more children die? [ ]ADD YOUR NAME For nearly two years, the people of Gaza have endured one horror after the next. Now, children are dying not only from bombings, but from hunger and thirst. Hospital workers are performing surgeries without anesthetic. Parents are mixing animal feed with water to keep their children alive. This moment feels different – like a line in the sand. Even Donald Trump, a stalwart Netanyahu ally, is breaking ranks – calling out the mass starvation unfolding in Gaza. [ ]Headline: Trump, breaking with Netanyahu, acknowledges 'real starvation' in Gaza As the world wakes up to this nightmare, Congress is at a crossroads. 22 Members of the House of Representatives introduced the Block the Bombs Act – a critical new bill that would cut off the flow of bombs and offensive weapons from the U.S. to Israel. [ ]Headline: House Progressives''Block the Bombs Act' Would End Transfer of Offensive Arms to Israel This bill represents what most Americans want – an end to the flow of deadly U.S. weapons fueling the horrors in Gaza. And it would finally allow Congress to take back its power from the Trump administration and put an end to U.S. complicity in these atrocities. Tens of thousands of Our Revolution members have already come together to say "Not in Our Name" and demand that Congress act. [ ]The bill is gaining momentum. But it will only pass if we overwhelm Congress with calls to act. Will you stand with Bernie and send an urgent message telling your representative to pass the Block the Bombs Act without delay? name: Tim Kaine
subject: Just a handful of votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-afa [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-afa]
Folks — In 1994, I won my very first election by a margin of just 97 votes, so I know firsthand that every single vote matters.
These candidates know it too:
In 2023, Jessica Anderson lost her election in HD-71 by just 667 votes. Lily Franklin came within 187 votes of flipping HD-41. And Kimberly Pope Adams was just 53 votes behind the Republican incumbent in HD-82.
And all three of them will be on the ballot again this November, ready to finish the job and flip these seats blue.
Kimberly, Lily, and Jessica are all fantastic candidates that I’m proud to support, and they’re going to be working hard to reach every last voter between now and November.
Will you help them out by splitting a donation across their campaigns today? Anything you can give will make a big difference in the voter outreach programs they’re able to run. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-afa]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-afa]
We’ve got less than four months to go until Election Day, so now is the time candidates are mapping out their budgets to persuade and turn out key voters this fall.
Support that comes in now can make an even bigger impact on the success of these campaigns than donations that are made later, so if you’re ready to help flip VA blue, there’s never been a better time to contribute.
Click here to chip in any amount to Kimberly Pope Adams, Jessica Anderson, and Lily Franklin. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-afa]
Thanks a lot for stepping up!
-Tim Kaine

name: POTUS - Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: July Recap (High Importance)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full.
| | | |
---
[DONATE TO MAGA!](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPnCAUxz8N3pjgQ1EPHqZ1naSHdptt0m4vhoHnyhSQKDqZb99o3Ln--T34_3jSBWv6R02KLwRgMHomAISfCcD5J_x--4UvWNBX9mOk8gW_fd9O4euBrvCEvZLn6l391dXbbQ68_NP_u7yf1_TJx0fAJ328ekInjd3Sokl0DaoEpRKs0yLnRVXytEyGmqWagchBaVahgkwoBlyUjIteAGY8MTUwyFkBVZqlaS5OvK96lhepEKLnVylJxu7Gn_TopdW3OC0unNToElsPMYZ5r9QSaGdUy4Snu_ET6o0g0O409TKabZqq0TkTIyK99YpAawMderprUOMCdehGuhZ0BsLbJbrOoTaLI7w5VMUWzuMyKSS8saGzoRv6I1fSBWk-POHNp1IXveqMC8fF3Qyd3jt1NnxOjT6ij4Q3m2FEAqLz1mjCmxWv5VpK5y57uK-XN-Pl9WXIwvWRTLUOd2OtmUVBMvaxddy_Zq3hfwAAAP__AJypWQ)
**__**
## **_OFFICIAL MEMORANDUM FOR_**
## **_TRUSTED TRUMP PATRIOTS_**

Patriot,

I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full.

We’ve accomplished a lot of great things - many people are already saying our country has never been stronger.

To name some, but not all (there are too many to count!) of our accomplishments, we’ve seen....

Inflation? Lowest in four years.
Blue collar wages? Highest in sixty years. Border crossings? Historic lows.
Stock market? ALL TIME HIGHS
Iran’s nuclear program? ERASED

But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country.

Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. Had they not failed at such an incredible rate - I would say it's almost impressive!

But one thing is for sure - the more we win, the more ruthless, and determined they will grow.

AOC, one of the dumbest people in Congress, is already calling for my impeachment for a THIRD time.

And somehow she got almost eighty of her friends in Congress, all of whom suffering badly (terminally) from TDS **(TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME)** to go along with her.

**So as much as I’d love for us to put everything on cruise control, even just for a day to celebrate all we have accomplished, we simply DO NOT have the time, or luxury to do so - at least, not yet!

_We’re quickly approaching a critical moment in the midterm election cycle. And what happens in these final days of June will decide everything in the months to come._**

Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies and puppet masters, the liberal fake news media.

This is a battle I am fully confident we are ready for- and with your help today, we’ll have exactly what it takes to win it with ease & humiliate the Democrats once again.

Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU!

This midterm election cycle will be no different!

clean_body: I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. | | | | OFFICIAL MEMORANDUM FOR TRUSTED TRUMP PATRIOTS Patriot, I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. We’ve accomplished a lot of great things - many people are already saying our country has never been stronger. To name some, but not all (there are too many to count!) of our accomplishments, we’ve seen.... Inflation? Lowest in four years. Blue collar wages? Highest in sixty years. Border crossings? Historic lows. Stock market? ALL TIME HIGHS Iran’s nuclear program? ERASED But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country. Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. Had they not failed at such an incredible rate - I would say it's almost impressive! But one thing is for sure - the more we win, the more ruthless, and determined they will grow. AOC, one of the dumbest people in Congress, is already calling for my impeachment for a THIRD time. And somehow she got almost eighty of her friends in Congress, all of whom suffering badly (terminally) from TDS (TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME) to go along with her. So as much as I’d love for us to put everything on cruise control, even just for a day to celebrate all we have accomplished, we simply DO NOT have the time, or luxury to do so - at least, not yet! We’re quickly approaching a critical moment in the midterm election cycle. And what happens in these final days of June will decide everything in the months to come. Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies and puppet masters, the liberal fake news media. This is a battle I am fully confident we are ready for- and with your help today, we’ll have exactly what it takes to win it with ease & humiliate the Democrats once again. Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU! This midterm election cycle will be no different! THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. | | Did you know that drinking 8+ glasses of water a day isn't enough to stay hydrated?

If you drink plenty of water and still struggle with muscle cramps, irritability, or headaches...

[**This could be why...**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21695/6374453/0338b28bfdad00d6b391caa11fe557d002c751b6/94e91b772d9c8122c965ef98c5cc52a2fc2b14d5)

Adults over 50 need to hydrate differently than younger folks.

So if you’re over 50, [**avoid these 5 common hydration mistakes.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21695/6374453/0338b28bfdad00d6b391caa11fe557d002c751b6/94e91b772d9c8122c965ef98c5cc52a2fc2b14d5)

PS: This article could help you avoid embarrassing bladder leaks in public.

If you have a few minutes, I suggest you read it.

-Dr. Chad Walding
