Let me tell you the God's honest truth, Peter.

My father didn't win the 2024 election because he sat on the sidelines and waited for a signal.

He won because he took the fight directly to first _" Sleepy Joe Biden"_ and later _" Laughing Kamala Harris."_

**[With inaction, MAGA Republicans (and America at large) lose.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/uc7_KrY7WJmVQow6VtQnjTgdUWsyjcuLmmXxSfiLRlzOGDyVuMQHYxmez-P7h1nHSlBRH0wWMAvQwtT4SGr40t5HxsXIvFB0V-pQIh_wkUCnSHwN328rAvLc8QLeuUmW9OezgZ0xKd3UC-CPLl14rmtnJ63vhAG_c-zdaQFsWyHp4uEP3kgiL4gdbY5NVCB5rsIkWjzuPwglb62cMoEeK8AS7UuFrkiqmRH7RKdiVoNVMnMjs0Njks9Av88UmswwscsxjlozgEmBgUMo_01_kTfUTTi79H1QZqdlP6vAUETLn_LP_5Y6hfCdsz-xCGqMj6_6jiB2kDiQ-ITd153KTADAifAu5Q-RjFGnSoS-92uqxsprPgCq4SSFYZKPg3Aw42pBztZsWjSiKcwbSfMJgluhj8WE2Ibn4SSVT-meaBEVqSjIIix-QHpx5cPtPdR1Dx0lpIHJz338NWTwDLvzICuTK5HGnIkJoecWKCZyPDE4xqFbtSx_DDunLaK0SjeBPPDrJW6M0C7qd5oKhehosYHx-tBrqH1tsrDcNXTTEo8t59bcGJrVoxqpBBAk2pmNikKEHCi2uv6JTV4r8F_H4--lRVBHK6JSsTAw9TpiIhgPWjDzy0b_Bjphm0E9CNkYSvskt9urDMTR6dH12u6xCe0AlQfL3Uwpwr6rZparATrGltiFJVdxqni1ceU6y6tyRVbSaU0xrLu-UBt5o2efFDiOj02wWQYkFjFzlwOojp4XeZ4jIIVpCbdcSRrSZzmV5aD4EOJ2oJPf8iNPnK4ji2lnumcsWdkmdbbVSbIMinS3EZaEj529cy5ZfrK8OmTW8uQ72cBd79JfzoVd4HIjz9Z4FQTkLkEFz_OQkPO1kQtNwfzPLson6XrgA1pSZiaOxfS3nYXp-op7mXlwU_JFjyuO2N5xAi4HEHMlQWdbiTxAZs_P_aDvr8l_Xzgm1L1Wd__swbdhX8QU0lDyIA85DfkXt-p7tdMppERnrr1-v1yz1triIVccohHEOpvGk9-zmtBheplPrMtezrXQ3Q9MXv3h-tHx886Pbw/g6SahqZS3uQDxc_A3VMX6Whr-5UNSKxG/11)**

# USDA chooses Indianapolis as location of one of 5 regional hubs
---
| | Fox 59
David Gay
July 24, 2025 [https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/usda-chooses-indianapolis-as-location-of-one-of-5-regional-hubs/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/AjcNgBfbZn44DK8mgnrkB3N8JJEoVa5VTdEAswRVixxIVR861wQuJ83SOxaBZThC-ea79Kv0X197MJ5PXFSsg4FV9fESZGM8e5deMKXrCpujF_u_5f8a9LRiFnVDrYfsHxhAUbovOyex3WIUpcJ3gcrASbeThaPNatrgq5alirDUdTPm6--niY7V12sYU07jWPH16KyUZhOGLpBaZGgZ2H9TOhgZZUHpaoLBWWGmTvB1HVBgciQ6lFUuXsWOp-fjuS9Z_HuvnRfK6qhAWUMbsHjG9_oJM8aq67zhn1p7mK3-5_lKVayg9io8iDmNvuokW1BO3OSUc-xGNwmdW4dr59594mr27ppKf7zxfQbtOYR22JQLNGD6NYE2EWCWm4FGPy1QqAXBnneYuSVaucELWEi05j8kyx7zRJ1erel2IgAXEczIPGxqCDX4dxwnaFQjI03WAScRZ4rNYjRocNdm7no8PAncJqE1UfSDs58rEAPGNur0V42LN11D1_JGe-nTsdc2PzE-XnnTPQ4LY4kMnTMrjFMTPM3RD7LYi_3KQPcH/MeyG-YspdNNb_xSj8KgjWfu671Sz109H/11)
INDIANAPOLIS – Indianapolis will be one of five regional hubs as part of the U.S. Department of Agriculture, USDA officials announced on Thursday. This is a part of the department’s reorganization, according to a news release from the department. U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins said that this will help the department refocus its operations “to better align with its founding mission of supporting American farming, ranching and forestry.” As part of the USDA’s reorganization, the department announced a phased plan to relocate its agency headquarters and its staff from the Washington D.C. area to five hub locations, including: Indianapolis Salt Lake City Fort Collins, Colorado Raleigh, North Carolina Kansas City, Missouri The release said that the department’s reorganization consists of four main pillars, including:
* Ensure the size of USDA’s workforce aligns with available financial resources and agricultural priorities
* Bring USDA closer to its customers
* Eliminate management layers and bureaucracy
* Consolidate redundant support functions.

Officials said this is the first phase in a multi-month process. Leadership said they will notify offices with more information on relocation to one of the regional hubs. The release stressed that all “critical functions of the department will continue uninterrupted.” The release also said the department reduced its workforce, the majority of which they said was through voluntary retirements and the Deferred Retirement Program. As of Thursday, 15,364 individuals from the USDA “voluntarily elected deferred resignation.” “American agriculture feeds, clothes, and fuels this nation and the world, and it is long past time the Department better serve the great and patriotic farmers, ranchers, and producers we are mandated to support. President Trump was elected to make real change in Washington, and we are doing just that by moving our key services outside the beltway and into great American cities across the country,” said Secretary Rollins. “We will do so through a transparent and common-sense process that preserves USDA’s critical health and public safety services the American public relies on. We will do right by the great American people who we serve and with respect to the thousands of hardworking USDA employees who so nobly serve their country.” Indiana Gov. Mike Braun, R-Ind. said in a post on social media that Indiana is proud to have been chosen as a location for one of USDA’s regional hubs. “Indiana is an agricultural powerhouse and we look forward to welcoming the USDA employees who will be based here in our great state...,” Braun said in a post on social media.[](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/ce9TVIz_oX-aVvO9yxqKfr_cCc357GAUFQpFxnPY8UYUKYQ-YOoKTb7rFyH3JxsQB93KSVzD4MD8zIjM30G38cBdU6BcjbLLfXWAdvJd7qXuh3jFJs2pnUGojEPb7LC4b3oJDD8UCq8RgJtPZP0n7zEeuHDJvJ_l3cZ1EcRMm_mqWusTq-FzWrNkVtavXh7oM-X8wVPge4U8Mh5FXWs4DspkfZKS3gYKAEx-WA79e_RcJ5TSc6PnvNgyt_dPkErsRBzQIUgTOo9ISz1_B2lX82LLrgM-4_kiZqOIFW7zmJbKoELkbi49AHmiw4fb8FUQJ13fwuSnKdn6lhwniRYzYb08N3u6UnZ1_UnpQgcqn4R4ASEM7DJZS892yDBRvix2kIFaqyWoXCb574b6xcrtsMEMZ0zsiaheLjs-L7DOFg/40gkW4-jlDGv_155uhl6BOS1o_n12adf/11) In a post on [social media](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/g6-OlHe6twrZM9ICS-SXevM2NeD-jhnr15etkRPwz04PKfR0ks_NYDm1lm52s1CW_FN__oVZ1A8qynuvYG3UBMAD9IoMh3WdT9kUA9c37WE1nIMVuuyFxX45HaXf6MMOZ8JS2h24JzDt90sfAtXf0KJcL6Q15OT98qwJ4LHM1lr1dqSSzKznZLxqzPS-gO_rLt7KnmYklTnbOA87xmLzGaB-xl7RKdo4PsCbRQGby23SCri_m5kIY2RWJtCbrmxpsocFNGkkXi-FyXLE9ygFwfC1l8_cqD12o1a892UNtwKdTVhDxQ2DOtaqNUZiYd7rqa7pE6Qgq70g9axDl10p8fNP9o0cFaISstUmwKCv7nkFV0yzE23UtF_sX3XfNbu3OaeHGa1JC81wEU4wUNRIXJz8jBszjL4KPKYn2dlD1aJHBYp4tkLrRUmpnrEI/lIzn7lfQ9o6izQKq8lVYCnxt3XPNKJsc/11), Indiana’s Lt. Gov. Micah Beckwith praised the decision. “Thank you, Secretary Rollins, for recognizing the important role that Indiana plays in our nation’s agricultural strategy!,” Beckwith said. Indiana’s two U.S. Senators, U.S. Senator Todd Young, R-Ind. and U.S. Senator Jim Banks, R-Ind., also celebrated the news that one of the hubs would be established in Indianapolis. “Great to see these services move outside of DC and into places like Indiana that feed our nation,” Young [said in a post on social media](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/YraSLJv974RkMjtvYsM2DbJEIfuME5S-c2CvfYx1oX2NhDl3tGr8UfhQikzK9UJdopyVv4350olqisZpjdnuD6-T_cN9939jjzmRMKqSFeODWlty4ovuCR8mK-100G8DlYUkN3QFrGKw0TPtCFt5TOOdYFxjMbkocDSXwHUJ-wfn1i2o-NS5Hz09r5fI32rPrt9NvwB8aCNBZdDaOhvjW4ZYwSOCkMGIqracLJwGBL29zENfq8I5AFrMINMma0-8IMr1-110SWTR3yt5LbiAso0F9ssg1w17sYV_ZsG_hN7EX2DKK1wnzowawHDXWTUiCRSG_LBxUMzEgLVjhHr-q_C0TKgvu-u31guvyfc1Q4xFpBg_u77qYVz3BIcaI3tgDXJpd1CxaCs3lmKLO-Wmyss27TWp6gsN7_DiWUk3y_Ryxq4fLx1j/pz-0qNhQv_1UXGJDUYRzI198Nuk1TeTo/11). Banks said that last month, he led a group of stakeholders from the state’s agriculture industry to meet with Rollins and pitch Indiana as a location for a hub. “This is huge news for Indiana. I am grateful to President Trump and Secretary Rollins for recognizing the strength and vision our state and agricultural leaders demonstrated during our meeting last month,” Banks said in a statement provided to FOX59/CBS4. “This is a win-win for Indiana and taxpayers across the country. It means real economic growth here at home and an agency that’s more efficient and focused on what matters most.” U.S. Rep. Jim Baird, R-Ind. District 4 also released a statement surrounding the USDA’s announcement on Thursday, stating that he is proud of the decision. “Our state truly is the crossroads of America, and with our thriving and diverse agricultural industries, Secretary Rollins made an excellent decision in choosing to relocate USDA closer to our farmers,” Baird said in the statement. “Indiana boasts of its diverse agricultural products and exports and is one of the top agricultural states in our country. With our excellent land-grant universities and their extensions, Indiana is also a leader in research and development, making our state uniquely poised to provide our farmers with access to cutting-edge innovations and technologies. I thank Secretary Rollins for her outstanding leadership at USDA and for her continued commitment to prioritizing our great American farmers and producers.”

clean_body: | | | IN CASE YOU MISSED IT USDA chooses Indianapolis as location of one of 5 regional hubs | | Fox 59 David Gay July 24, 2025 INDIANAPOLIS – Indianapolis will be one of five regional hubs as part of the U.S. Department of Agriculture, USDA officials announced on Thursday. This is a part of the department’s reorganization, according to a news release from the department. U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins said that this will help the department refocus its operations “to better align with its founding mission of supporting American farming, ranching and forestry.” As part of the USDA’s reorganization, the department announced a phased plan to relocate its agency headquarters and its staff from the Washington D.C. area to five hub locations, including: Indianapolis Salt Lake City Fort Collins, Colorado Raleigh, North Carolina Kansas City, Missouri The release said that the department’s reorganization consists of four main pillars, including: Ensure the size of USDA’s workforce aligns with available financial resources and agricultural priorities Bring USDA closer to its customers Eliminate management layers and bureaucracy Consolidate redundant support functions. Officials said this is the first phase in a multi-month process. Leadership said they will notify offices with more information on relocation to one of the regional hubs. The release stressed that all “critical functions of the department will continue uninterrupted.” The release also said the department reduced its workforce, the majority of which they said was through voluntary retirements and the Deferred Retirement Program. As of Thursday, 15,364 individuals from the USDA “voluntarily elected deferred resignation.” “American agriculture feeds, clothes, and fuels this nation and the world, and it is long past time the Department better serve the great and patriotic farmers, ranchers, and producers we are mandated to support. President Trump was elected to make real change in Washington, and we are doing just that by moving our key services outside the beltway and into great American cities across the country,” said Secretary Rollins. “We will do so through a transparent and common-sense process that preserves USDA’s critical health and public safety services the American public relies on. We will do right by the great American people who we serve and with respect to the thousands of hardworking USDA employees who so nobly serve their country.” Indiana Gov. Mike Braun, R-Ind. said in a post on social media that Indiana is proud to have been chosen as a location for one of USDA’s regional hubs. “Indiana is an agricultural powerhouse and we look forward to welcoming the USDA employees who will be based here in our great state...,” Braun said in a post on social media. In a post on , Indiana’s Lt. Gov. Micah Beckwith praised the decision. “Thank you, Secretary Rollins, for recognizing the important role that Indiana plays in our nation’s agricultural strategy!,” Beckwith said. Indiana’s two U.S. Senators, U.S. Senator Todd Young, R-Ind. and U.S. Senator Jim Banks, R-Ind., also celebrated the news that one of the hubs would be established in Indianapolis. “Great to see these services move outside of DC and into places like Indiana that feed our nation,” Young . Banks said that last month, he led a group of stakeholders from the state’s agriculture industry to meet with Rollins and pitch Indiana as a location for a hub. “This is huge news for Indiana. I am grateful to President Trump and Secretary Rollins for recognizing the strength and vision our state and agricultural leaders demonstrated during our meeting last month,” Banks said in a statement provided to FOX59/CBS4. “This is a win-win for Indiana and taxpayers across the country. It means real economic growth here at home and an agency that’s more efficient and focused on what matters most.” U.S. Rep. Jim Baird, R-Ind. District 4 also released a statement surrounding the USDA’s announcement on Thursday, stating that he is proud of the decision. “Our state truly is the crossroads of America, and with our thriving and diverse agricultural industries, Secretary Rollins made an excellent decision in choosing to relocate USDA closer to our farmers,” Baird said in the statement. “Indiana boasts of its diverse agricultural products and exports and is one of the top agricultural states in our country. With our excellent land-grant universities and their extensions, Indiana is also a leader in research and development, making our state uniquely poised to provide our farmers with access to cutting-edge innovations and technologies. I thank Secretary Rollins for her outstanding leadership at USDA and for her continued commitment to prioritizing our great American farmers and producers.” | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Peter, I want to share some important news with you. After thoughtful conversations with my family, my team, and trusted colleagues, I’ve decided to step aside from the U.S. Senate race and fully support Governor Roy Cooper. This wasn’t an easy decision, but it’s the right one for North Carolina — and for the future of our state and our country. **We started this campaign to send Thom Tillis packing. Well, mission accomplished I guess!** Now, it’s time for a new leader to take the baton. I truly believe that leader is Roy Cooper. It’s been an honor to work alongside Governor Cooper in the State Senate and in Congress. I’ve seen firsthand what steady, bipartisan leadership looks like. He listens. He shows up. And he delivers — whether it’s making North Carolina the top state for business, guiding communities through natural disasters, or expanding Medicaid to cover more than 650,000 people. From my time in the State Senate to the halls of Congress, I‘ve worked closely with Governor Cooper to deliver for the people of North Carolina. Strong, steady, and principled leadership — that’s my friend, Roy. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who supported my campaign. Your encouragement, generosity, and belief in a better future for North Carolina meant the world to me. Together, we built something I’ll always be proud of. I’ve still got a lot of work left to do, that part hasn’t changed. Public service is a part of who I am and you’ll hear more from me soon. **Now, it’s time to unite behind Roy Cooper to make sure we flip this Senate seat to help secure a Democratic majority in Washington. ** [**Please join me in donating to the campaign to make sure he has the support he needs to win this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112339697/560186698/883262930?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250729_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWY0NGM3ZS04ODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fv9BFQ-spg7NhEsUoBFjKYxPF45tlGsDlzZhzFVQDlQ=) | **[Contribute to Governor Cooper Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112339699/560186700/883262930?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250729_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWY0NGM3ZS04ODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fv9BFQ-spg7NhEsUoBFjKYxPF45tlGsDlzZhzFVQDlQ=)**

Dr. Shannon Kroner, author of the award-winning children's book "I'm Unvaccinated and That's OK!", is back with a new book: "Let's
Be Critical Thinkers." Shannon has a doctorate in clinical psychology and has been working with special needs families since 2001.

After witnessing many vaccine-injured children, she has become one of the leading advocates for vaccine choice and has brought her
message to the next generation through her children's books. Dr. Kroner is also the Executive Director of Freedom Of Religion -
United Solutions (FOR-US), an interfaith coalition united to protect religious freedom and vaccine choice. Like, subscribe
and share.

Discover the Learning Styles to Boost Your Child's Success at School

This week, discover how recognizing your child's unique learning style—whether auditory, visual, kinesthetic, or
reading/writing—can help them overcome challenges in school and build their confidence. When you recognize the gifts and strengths
in your son or daughter, you can find practical ways to support their growth both in school and in life.

clean_body: With so much confusing news and complicated narratives, our children need to learn about critical thinking. We're sharing tools to get you started and help your children thrive. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] July 29, 2025 • Newsletter Teaching Children about Critical Thinking Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Dr. Shannon Kroner, author of the award-winning children's book "I'm Unvaccinated and That's OK!", is back with a new book: "Let's Be Critical Thinkers." Shannon has a doctorate in clinical psychology and has been working with special needs families since 2001. After witnessing many vaccine-injured children, she has become one of the leading advocates for vaccine choice and has brought her message to the next generation through her children's books. Dr. Kroner is also the Executive Director of Freedom Of Religion - United Solutions (FOR-US), an interfaith coalition united to protect religious freedom and vaccine choice. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] Discover the Learning Styles to Boost Your Child's Success at School This week, discover how recognizing your child's unique learning style—whether auditory, visual, kinesthetic, or reading/writing—can help them overcome challenges in school and build their confidence. When you recognize the gifts and strengths in your son or daughter, you can find practical ways to support their growth both in school and in life. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. Season 2 Episodes on Mondays at 10am ET View on YouTube [] View on Rumble [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Aaron Ford
subject: Big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I’m running to be Nevada’s next Governor.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112340564/560189663/661199874?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5579-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM3N2ZlNC04OTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AoPLloT8DPgfCgSZ9ZCvbxX1x2FfcqvZOgKA_CsS7ww=)
Folks,

I’m Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford. And I’m announcing my campaign to be the next Governor of Nevada.
I’m running for one reason above all: **Too many Nevadans are working harder than ever and still getting nowhere – and I know we can change that.**
I’ve spent my career fighting for families like mine, because I’ve lived what so many people are facing right now. I come from a family that worked hard, but struggled. Some nights, all we had to eat were stale candy bars.
I became a dad during college – and a single dad not long after. I relied on food stamps and Medicaid to keep going. But I didn’t give up. I kept fighting.
I became a public school math teacher. I earned five degrees. I raised four boys with my wife Berna. I ran for State Senate, then became Majority Leader, then Attorney General – and every step of the way, I’ve carried one mission with me: **To fight for the Nevada Family. **
**_[Will you split a donation of $5, $10, $20 — whatever you can — between my campaign and Jacky Rosen, to help kick off our campaign and build the grassroots movement we need to flip this seat blue? Nevada deserves a fighter — and that’s who I’ve been my entire life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112340565/560189664/661199874?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5579-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM3N2ZlNC04OTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AoPLloT8DPgfCgSZ9ZCvbxX1x2FfcqvZOgKA_CsS7ww=)_**
| | [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112340567/560189665/661199874?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5579-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM3N2ZlNC04OTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AoPLloT8DPgfCgSZ9ZCvbxX1x2FfcqvZOgKA_CsS7ww=)
---
While I’ve been fighting to make life safer and more affordable for every Nevadan, Trump Republican Joe Lombardo has done the opposite – blocking housing reform, vetoing school meals and lower drug prices, and cheering on Donald Trump’s plan to gut education and health care. Unemployment is up, costs are through the roof, and working people are getting squeezed. Nothing’s gotten better under his watch – and that’s why I’m running to unseat him.
**_The Cook Political Report_ called Lombardo “the most vulnerable Republican governor in the country.” This isn’t just a top flip opportunity – it’s _the_ flip opportunity. If we show up early and big, we can take this seat back. But if we don’t, we lose it. It’s that simple.**
[**I’m humbly asking, folks: Will you give $15 or more now, split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen, to help me win in Nevada and restore real leadership to our state? I set a goal to raise $250,000 in the first 24 hours of this campaign, and it would mean the world to me to have you on my team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112340569/560189666/661199874?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5579-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM3N2ZlNC04OTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AoPLloT8DPgfCgSZ9ZCvbxX1x2FfcqvZOgKA_CsS7ww=)
The right way ahead is forward. Thank you for joining this fight to help get us there.

Aaron Ford
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

United States

|
clean_body: I’m running to be Nevada’s next Governor. | | | = Folks, I’m Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford. And I’m announcing my campaign to be the next Governor of Nevada. I’m running for one reason above all: Too many Nevadans are working harder than ever and still getting nowhere – and I know we can change that. I’ve spent my career fighting for families like mine, because I’ve lived what so many people are facing right now. I come from a family that worked hard, but struggled. Some nights, all we had to eat were stale candy bars. I became a dad during college – and a single dad not long after. I relied on food stamps and Medicaid to keep going. But I didn’t give up. I kept fighting. I became a public school math teacher. I earned five degrees. I raised four boys with my wife Berna. I ran for State Senate, then became Majority Leader, then Attorney General – and every step of the way, I’ve carried one mission with me: To fight for the Nevada Family. = | | = While I’ve been fighting to make life safer and more affordable for every Nevadan, Trump Republican Joe Lombardo has done the opposite – blocking housing reform, vetoing school meals and lower drug prices, and cheering on Donald Trump’s plan to gut education and health care. Unemployment is up, costs are through the roof, and working people are getting squeezed. Nothing’s gotten better under his watch – and that’s why I’m running to unseat him. The Cook Political Report called Lombardo “the most vulnerable Republican governor in the country.” This isn’t just a top flip opportunity – it’s the flip opportunity. If we show up early and big, we can take this seat back. But if we don’t, we lose it. It’s that simple. = The right way ahead is forward. Thank you for joining this fight to help get us there. Aaron Ford | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada P.O. Box 46110 LAS VEGAS, NV 89114 United States |

name: Secretary Patrick J. Murphy
subject: The Grit Behind Greatness
body:
Leadership Lessons from the Super Bowl Champion Eagles

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..p3qhNvgEdbG1A0N0HBWRQ8oxe8xiZ1W644No7rCPx5o?) for more
---
[](https://substack..jxiahIGeTHBkggNOenrxLJbBiJoFHZRA7nGfnaCkuwI?)
---
# [The Grit Behind Greatness](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=169565555&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTY1NTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MDA0OTEsImV4cCI6MTc1NjM5MjQ5MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-xsTfsnCbnMCLuktLtCPlph87Xj4U01c6U160BJbSlk)
### Leadership Lessons from the Super Bowl Champion Eagles
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Jul 29
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=169565555&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTY1NTU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzgwMDQ5MSwiZXhwIjoxNzU2MzkyNDkxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.waFL2m5AA66zblxcILxopGkoSkt67232kq6PnJDd1bY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=169565555&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTY1NTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MDA0OTEsImV4cCI6MTc1NjM5MjQ5MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-xsTfsnCbnMCLuktLtCPlph87Xj4U01c6U160BJbSlk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=169565555&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTY1NTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MDA0OTEsImV4cCI6MTc1NjM5MjQ5MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-xsTfsnCbnMCLuktLtCPlph87Xj4U01c6U160BJbSlk)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/the-grit-behind-greatness?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bdc539bd-76ec-412b-9a0c-b7725b537175?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At the 2025 Super Bowl with family
Long before I became a lawyer, an Iraq War veteran, a member of Congress, and served in the Obama administration, I had a very different job--one that came with a yellow neon jacket, a heavy flashlight, and a front-row view of the most raucous, chaotic section in all of Philadelphia sports.
I was a 125-pound security guard at the old Veterans Stadium, stationed in the notoriously rowdy 700 section, affectionately called "the zoo." We even had our own courtroom in the basement. I often joke that job was tougher duty than when I was a 165-pound Army paratrooper in the invasion of Iraq.
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..OkgOeukMHqId4-L1yCUFUfPnbv5zH9u-7yz_Qvrpct4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169565555)
That's Philly for you.
We do grit. We do hard knocks. We do "prove them wrong."
And right now, as training camp heats up, that's exactl
y what the defending Super Bowl Champion Philadelphia Eagles are doing--keeping the main thing the main thing.
You can feel it already: this team isn't coasting. They're charging.
As my Wharton colleague Angela Duckworth puts it in her book _Grit_ (which she wrote while researching at West Point), success doesn't come from being the smartest or the most gifted. It comes from showing up. Over and over again. Especially when no one's watching. It comes from passion and perseverance over the long haul.
That's grit--and this Eagles team has it in spades.
## **The Jalen Hurts Philosophy**
Grit comes from showing up every damn day like it still matters. Even after you've been victorious.
That's Jalen Hurts, Eagles' star quarterback. Hurts is the living, breathing embodiment of Duckworth's research. Calm. Focused. Unshakeable.
NFL analysts still don't rank Jalen Hurts in the top 10--even though he and the Eagles just outplayed Patrick Mahomes in the Super Bowl, the league's most decorated active quarterback. Jalen Hurts is the epitome of an underdog: benched in college, drafted as a backup, but since Day 1, he's been all grit, and he refuses to let success soften him. When he showed up at the Super Bowl ring ceremony this year, he left his Super Bowl ring in the box, refusing to put it on. Reporters asked why.
"I moved on," he said.
He knows it's always harder to be the hunted than the hunter. Nobody cheers for Goliath. That's just the price of winning it all - what we call in the Army, "The burden of leadership." You go from underdog to target overnight. But leave it to Hurts to remind us that a ring isn't just a crown jewel. It's a challenge to continue being better.
Love him or not, one thing is clear: Jalen Hurts isn't playing for clout. He's playing for legacy.
## **A Team That 's Still Hungry**
And it's not just him. Training camp is in full swing. The offense is dialed in. Saquon's extended, the O-line is still the best in the league, and Hurts is locked in with A.J. and Smitty like they never left. But let's be clear, they had to pay what's known as the "Super Bowl Tax," where they've lost six starting players, five on defense and one on offense.
The reality is that when you win the Super Bowl, other teams want your players, and your players want warm weather or massive generational wealth-type contracts. That's just the business. And it's not just in the players draft where Philadelphia reaps the rewards of an Eagles victory.
This team's greatness isn't just measured by rings. It's measured in resilience. By what they do now that the confetti's been swept up and everyone's watching.
That's the lesson Angela's research at Wharton drives home--what separates the great from the good isn't raw talent. It's what happens _after_ the win. When the lights go down. When you start over. As All-Pro left tackle Jordan Mailata puts it, the Eagles approach each season with a "blank canvas mentality." In his words: _" We're not defending anything."_
In Philly, that's not just football. That's life.
The Eagles are more than a franchise. They're a living, breathing piece of the city's soul more than any of the other sports teams we have here (sorry, Phillies, baseball might be America's pastime, but football is our passion).
## SUPER BOWL HANGOVERS ARE REAL
After the Eagles won their first Super Bowl ever in 2017, they stumbled into the next season with a 2-3 start. While they turned around the season and even won a playoff game, you could tell that injuries and the burden of being the hunted team to beat was just too much.
## Taxpayers Win Too
When the Eagles won the Super Bowl last year, the impact on Philadelphia's economy was immediate. Hotels alone brought in $4.3 million in extra revenue during the three-day stretch of the victory parade--not even counting the three home playoff games.
Over 1 million people descended on Philadelphia for the victory parade - buying food, drinks, Eagles merch, hotel rooms, and transit fares. For the 2023 season, the Eagles generated over $650 million in revenue. With the Eagles' clean sweep in the 2024 season, you can imagine how that success played out in Philadelphia, especially when winning franchises can generate upwards of $90 million more in a successful season.
With a current valuation of over $8.3 billion, the Eagles isn't just a brand. It's an economic powerhouse. And this doesn't even count for the innumerable bars, clothing outlets, and, ahem, bootleg merchandise with Eagles themes scattered throughout Pennsylvania. When the Eagles win, every Pennsylvanian does, too.
But in Philly, football is more than business. The franchise drives the city's economy, its morale, and its identity. Fall camp is open. The Birds are back. And the canvas, as Hurts put it, is blank. Now it's time to paint.
### **The City Bleeds Green**
This team doesn't just belong to an owner. It belongs to the city.
You can feel it in the skyline. In the SEPTA trains. In the corner bars and the family cookouts. When the Birds fly, the city soars. And when they fall, the city bleeds green. As my other Wharton colleague Adam Grant writes in his book _Hidden Potential_ , the best teams have the best team players. He describes that when you face a daunting task, you need confidence and competence, but he also says that it's easier to carry a torch for people who matter to us - it helps us overcome obstacles when others count on us because we find strength we didn't know we had.
Who are you carrying a torch for? For me, it's my family, my faith, and my veteran brothers and sisters. I hope you, too, can find that grit to overcome life's challenges. Your torch or your purpose is like your superpower or life force; it can help you overcome even the toughest odds.
In the meantime: Go Birds!!!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b51d053-5635-4982-942a-e65a3fe63d40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Me, on WIP 94.1 Eagles pregame with Medal of Honor recipient Dakota Meyer (2024)
--Patrick
_Former Eagles Security, Always Bleeding Green_🦅, _Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.

name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: Kindly asking that you read this message from start to finish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112341121/560191313/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-29_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVhNDNiOTgtOGE2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZZ79_mhmlC8ZABqNM-g5sT-hqoqyPjXOOictRJDDBbs=)
👋 To all of our supporters,
We know you're receiving loads of emails and texts asking for money right now, but we kindly ask that you read this message from beginning to end.
Here's the key point: **Virginia has no limits on how much an individual can donate to a candidate.**
That means megadonors aligned with Donald Trump can commit millions of dollars to Winsome Earle-Sears for her campaign to spend on attack ads. _And that's precisely what they've done._
Unlike our opponent, our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.
_And when we say small donations, we mean it._
This month, our average gift is around $30. It adds up fast when everybody who is in a position to give rises to the occasion.
But now, with our first end-of-month deadline of the fundraising quarter coming up on Thursday, we need a surge of contributions to keep airing ads, organizing on the ground, and reaching the pivotal voters of this election.
**[Will you stand with Abigail today, Peter? If you are determined to flip Virginia blue and deliver a big win for Democrats, then go ahead and contribute your first $25 or more to become a Founding Donor of our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112341123/560191315/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-29_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVhNDNiOTgtOGE2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZZ79_mhmlC8ZABqNM-g5sT-hqoqyPjXOOictRJDDBbs=)**

If you’re like me, then you don’t need to put a bullet through a dime at 300 yards very often...

BUT when you do, you want an optic that rises to the challenge and threads that needle.

[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21696/6374453/b3a0e9d723a8492fde89950c80118e1b3ab78977/43008378c1d459d6a57f80cbb72cc6b33de7798d)
---
That’s why I’m so f-cking excited about this red dot I’m about to share with you.
It’s called the **[Stinger Combat Sight](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21696/6374453/667bc2bb28a8fbb0a4af0ad8ca118bc9f4acd6ea/43008378c1d459d6a57f80cbb72cc6b33de7798d)** and it harnesses technology developed by the US Military to deliver the tightest groups possible even in the worst conditions.
The Stinger is not just similar to what SEAL Team 6 used to take out Bin Laden. It’s identical.
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21696/6374453/b3a0e9d723a8492fde89950c80118e1b3ab78977/43008378c1d459d6a57f80cbb72cc6b33de7798d)
---
And get this. It’s actually better than that famous optic... Because this one is equipped with both RED and GREEN laser holograph reticles. But that’s not even the best part. The best part is that you can now get this for UNDER $80. And did I mention I'm covering the shipping during this 3 day event? Better hurry, I've only got 200 of these sights in the warehouse so it's first come, first served. **[Grab your Stinger before they're all gone!](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21696/6374453/667bc2bb28a8fbb0a4af0ad8ca118bc9f4acd6ea/43008378c1d459d6a57f80cbb72cc6b33de7798d)** **Thank You.** P.S. I'm positive we'll run out by the end of the weekend, so if you want one of these you'd better get on it like a hobo on a ham sandwich!

body:
Voter Action Project [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=072925_1&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Everyday Americans are still feeling crunched by rising prices and increased tariffs yet corporate profits and CEO pay are again reaching higher levels. These companies continue to pass their costs down to consumers and decrease the size of items they are selling, while rising inflation and the Trump tariffs are gouging consumers.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Congress act to protect consumers as corporate profits, CEO compensation, and tariff costs continue to soar?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=072925_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=072925_1&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=072925_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=072925_1&amount=25]

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: Medicare turns 60. Sherman stays silent
body:
I will fight like hell to preserve these lifelines for Americans

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=7ba463d256&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=76e2e3d02b&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| **Dear Peter,****Today marks 60 years since Medicare and Medicaid were signed into law** —two of the most life-saving, dignity-affirming programs this country ever created.**These programs aren’t just policy—they’re lifelines.** For older Americans. For low-income families. For disabled people. For anyone who’s ever needed care without a six-figure bank account.But now they are under attack. Instead of building on 60 years of progress, Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers are working to dismantle the very programs that have helped shape modern America. They’ve slashed Medicaid, undermined Medicare, and expanded privatized schemes that put profits over people.**And Brad Sherman? After nearly 30 years in Congress, he’s not fighting back.** He’s staying silent, while billion-dollar insurers and Trump-aligned corporations gear up to turn Medicare and Medicaid into Wall Street cash cows. **We need leaders who will** _**fight like hell**_**to protect and strengthen Medicare and Medicaid, not stand by while they’re gutted.** But Brad Sherman is doing exactly that. He’s sitting on the sidelines while Medicare is privatized and providers in our district struggle with inadequate reimbursements. He’s avoiding conflict. Playing it safe. Staying quiet—again.**I'm not running to play it safe. I'm running to** _**lead.**_**In Congress, I’ll fight to:**
* **Protect Medicare from privatization and expand its coverage—including dental, vision, and hearing
**
* **Ensure Medicaid is fully funded and accessible for everyone who needs it
**
* **Champion a path to Medicare for All, where care is a right—not a privilege
**

Because we know what’s possible. We’ve seen it. **Medicare and Medicaid are proof.****Let’s defend that legacy—and build on it.**[**Will you chip in $27, $54, or whatever feels right to help us fight back against Trump’s agenda and elect a real defender of healthcare in CD-32?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=c1c913a618&e=5a6ee82cdb) Let’s Go!**Chris Ahuja** **Democratic Candidate for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-medicare-medicaid-turns-60?e=5a6ee82cdb)
Christopher Ahuja for Congress * 21255 Burbank Blvd Ste 120 * Woodland Hills, CA 91367-6669 * USA
[update your preferences](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=45384ee532&e=5a6ee82cdb&c=ac1570f64b) or [unsubscribe](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=45384ee532&t=b&e=5a6ee82cdb&c=ac1570f64b)
---

| Peter,

Here’s a quick list of recent Republican accomplishments: ❌ They’re pouring 450 million into an internment camp in the Everglades instead of investing in healthcare, schools, or jobs.
❌ They’re cheering on Trump’s disastrous tariff plans, driving up costs on everything from groceries to household essentials.
❌ And earlier this month, they jammed the One Big, Ugly Law through Congress, making life even more expensive for working families as they reward their billionaire buddies. Life in America is already too costly. The GOP is making it worse. That’s why **taking back the House in 2026 is absolutely critical.**

We’re only three seats away from ending this reckless agenda and putting Congress back to work for the people.

**[We set a goal to raise $12,000 this month to support Democrats ready to flip those three seats and stop the Republican chaos. Convicted felon and adjudicated sex offender Donald Trump seems to believe that pardoning Ghislaine Maxwell, a decades-long friend and one of history’s most notorious child sex traffickers , will more effectively prove he’s not a pedophile than simply releasing the Epstein Files (which his regime refuses to do). Todd Blanche, Trump’s deputy Attorney General and former personal attorney who lost his hush money trial against adult film star Stormy Daniels has spent two days in closed door meetings with Maxwell,who is serving a 20 year sentence for trafficking young girls and lying under oath. Trump, who has been informed that his name is ALL OVER the Epstein files, appears desperate to keep the truth from coming to light. Pardoning Ghislaine Maxwell would mean the complete crumbling of our justice system and leave little doubt of Trump’s guilt.Their victims deserve justice! ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. If Republicans wanted to get to the truth (like the court already did in Maxwell’s case), they would be speaking to the victims, not the convict that Trump holds pardon power over. body:

| Peter,

Summer is here, and so is one of the most critical moments of our year.

Our Summer Membership Drive launched last month to power the next generation of Democratic women leaders. But right now, we’re still 400 members short of our goal.

That’s a problem. Especially because July is one of the hardest months to fundraise, and your support now could determine how many women we’re able to train this year.

Join me. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112344659/560201146/823540626?refcode=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWU2YjAyNS04ZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmgunzUDeT6i4dw4x0FLKoKRsN6x0FEM6BL_VgTEy40=&emci=1347fc1e-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=17205535)
**Peter, I’ve learned firsthand that you don’t win elections and govern well alone.** At every step of the way, I’ve been graced with the help and support of countless people who share our values, our passion, and our determination to make this country better. I’ve been overwhelmed by the response to our campaign’s announcement for the U.S. Senate yesterday. Already, thousands of people in North Carolina and across this country are standing up to join our fight. I’m hoping to count you among them right now. _As we begin the most competitive Senate campaign of 2026, I truly need you on our team._ **[Could you make a Founding Donation to our campaign today to help us take on the GOP and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112344660/560201147/-1743631236?refcode=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWU2YjAyNS04ZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmgunzUDeT6i4dw4x0FLKoKRsN6x0FEM6BL_VgTEy40=)** North Carolina is one of the last true purple states in the nation. I won my elections for governor in 2016 and 2020 — and Donald Trump carried the state in the same years. That makes this state _critical_ to our path to restoring a Democratic Senate majority and ending the assault on our rights coming down from the federal government. As North Carolina’s next Senator, I will be proud to speak out in defense of voting rights, abortion access, and the programs like Medicaid that help our communities to thrive. **I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward.** Democratic Senators are the last line of defense for the rights that Americans hold dear and the American dreams that can still be fulfilled. We can and must take a stand. **[I have never taken running for office lightly, Peter, and I know that winning this race will be the toughest election I’ve ever had. But together, we’ve won tough fights before. We can win now. If you are with me, please make your grassroots Founding Donation today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112344661/560201148/-1743631236?refcode=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWU2YjAyNS04ZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmgunzUDeT6i4dw4x0FLKoKRsN6x0FEM6BL_VgTEy40=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112344662/560201149/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.bee6b025-8f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWU2YjAyNS04ZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmgunzUDeT6i4dw4x0FLKoKRsN6x0FEM6BL_VgTEy40=)

* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Oklahoma
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
California sent $83 billion more than we received to the federal government.

California sent $83 billion more than we received to the federal government.
That means red states that receive more than they send rely on California for critical dollars from the federal government that help fund education, healthcare and — apparently — this new tax break supported by Oklahoma Republicans.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?refcode=em250729&refcode2=2402_4767699_7POjKG&akid=2402%2E4767699%2E7POjKG)
This isn’t the people of Oklahoma’s fault. It’s irresponsible Republican legislators and governors who are so used to California paying for their necessities, they decide to give the money they have to rich folks instead of investing in their people and their needs.
You're welcome, I guess...
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸

This November, we have a unique opportunity here in Virginia: the chance to flip the Governor’s office blue and, with the help of my friends at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, secure a Democratic trifecta. **The DLCC is the national organization dedicated to winning America’s state legislatures — and I’m supporting their work to protect and grow our Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates so we can set an example for the country when we win and get to work passing our agenda.** [Before July’s end-of-month fundraising deadline, I’m personally asking you to split a $10 donation between my campaign for Governor and the DLCC to support their important work nationwide. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_zymbwUOy3xZ-M7eSqqsuz1m17tbl8aMMcmUAcuMPWAJgY-F8-s5GhHkUhO8PNshQy_KRoh1D_p-FMrZrNAF69GlSJKisXdOqRsCrSrXsaXR0NtWxJzFjK_yyYco9s-1O8kssWk3rOAdV2t3CMruTcGvSMEDv-WZw25BxLqaJhcFR2N3NMJPTIZd3DtQ4SfFvaLyREGrO-pQsGTlC_8E2_39qYsh4T01X1ddOieqMe5R59w62PjwLU_Q5ryKDThk4aWVeKI8FHd0BO-g_b2_NUJ5lLRdjssR2VsL5jxiOIKja-BJQ9lRy5JjhheJXHX0iX4Osf5mzA086fYvi5SkDnKuLPT6kyZ0EjeDBSIhe6jFI0_UFPAuHwuskHeqq0uOuriZ-LKgbHdEnib0Xkh0PI33eAbCo53mIpteO_yH9CtVgRM0Ws_r5tspvkvvZy6c82ur4EGIiOtDSoun3q9WKpM88riMk5c_N7-4c-yMfauwjE93cQBwnBx2i4yHVxcda/4il/xDvvIHK3S32Whj_D2iXKcA/h1/h001.PA3VD0J12iTjLRgqYp93pcW7eCSDd-Nr-BFVg-42OTw) I want you to understand everything at stake this November: Yes, my race is the biggest election of 2025, but there’s more we must do to stand up to Trump’s extreme agenda. **We must also focus our attention on safeguarding our majority in the Virginia House.** If Republicans flip the state House, they’ll block our efforts to fund public education, safeguard reproductive freedom, and create a more affordable Commonwealth for all. Virginians deserve better than the same chaos coming out of Washington, **and with the GOP pouring millions into November’s elections, this fight won’t be easy – but we have the momentum on our side.** [I know from my years in Congress and at CIA that a strong team beats going at it alone every time. So will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DLCC ahead of Thursday’s deadline? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_zymbwUOy3xZ-M7eSqqsuz1m17tbl8aMMcmUAcuMPWAJgY-F8-s5GhHkUhO8PNshQy_KRoh1D_p-FMrZrNAF69GlSJKisXdOqRsCrSrXsaXR0NtWxJzFjK_yyYco9s-1O8kssWk3rOAdV2t3CMruTcHSdA3Sw2o1f4Y-xVvpSzRvhSS6LYk8KCdBAPHLhSi_KL9ZKCLr9ZcHULfc1UkMd6GZgM8_DWiHHj1hD4ZQPgOvQNITp42jSEW_beRH22fNOud6dPC7e5g9ZqewUpJubBz808M4tTGQE-mvupKBA14U1sxYsRTqL8RYQvMwmBQg7QtFNL9c9sJTpQLXdFg_jFMAIMSHyQhKLzAv-Kds-DEkURlng4d3R-fz9aCmDOQP6HaviJPxY6YqaW104fW6196u_N_D6KyNUS9IjzNbrpZkDWd2U0YF_3X0mwqbB8nPFKm7D7Ku-AP921soVv2XdHH-PmFNWNEYXHQEByLbjOww-6dukjEi6-3TYZ-4iVVHE/4il/xDvvIHK3S32Whj_D2iXKcA/h2/h001.hzHIuQfQQBWa99ZRNMgKRm274hZM-d--CK02OCHH1pg) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Abigail Spanberger and DLCC PAC.

clean_body: I want you to understand everything at stake this November: Yes, my race is the biggest election of 2025, but there’s more we must do to stand up to Trump’s extreme agenda. | | | | | ---|--- This November, we have a unique opportunity here in Virginia: the chance to flip the Governor’s office blue and, with the help of my friends at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, secure a Democratic trifecta. The DLCC is the national organization dedicated to winning America’s state legislatures — and I’m supporting their work to protect and grow our Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates so we can set an example for the country when we win and get to work passing our agenda. I want you to understand everything at stake this November: Yes, my race is the biggest election of 2025, but there’s more we must do to stand up to Trump’s extreme agenda. We must also focus our attention on safeguarding our majority in the Virginia House. If Republicans flip the state House, they’ll block our efforts to fund public education, safeguard reproductive freedom, and create a more affordable Commonwealth for all. Virginians deserve better than the same chaos coming out of Washington, and with the GOP pouring millions into November’s elections, this fight won’t be easy – but we have the momentum on our side. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Abigail Spanberger and DLCC PAC. | | | | | | Your support means so much. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: a beacon of hope
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Abigail Spanberger is running for Governor in Virginia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**rush a split donation between Abigail's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=1&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)
---
Team,
On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — **_I want to win big.**_
Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.
People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. In every zip code and every community, Democrats are understandably frightened and angry about the chaos coming out of Washington. And to them, our race is a beacon of hope. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history.
And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: **winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do.**
And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision too. Because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.
[**But we can’t do it without you! Will you split a donation between Mark Kelly and my campaign today to make sure we have what it takes to win big this November?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=2&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Mark Kelly and Abigail Spanberger instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-spanberger.zHJuKU&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=21&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-spanberger.AAXn6b&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=22&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-spanberger.4DhUWQ&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=23&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-spanberger.6GkUiR&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=24&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-spanberger.DaRiPp&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=25&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-spanberger.eXzbXH&refcode=em250729-1-90&t=26&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)**
---
****
Thank you,
Abigail Spanberger
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-spanberger.-WPYmU&refcode=em250729-1-90&refcode2=6135.6688874.kMmZDJ&t=27&akid=6135%2E6688874%2EkMmZDJ)

name: Jessica Hamilton, Evergreen
subject: Join us, Rep. Ro Khanna, Sierra Club, and other climate champs this Friday
body:
Hear about actions you can take this month
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824368/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
|
## ⚡EVENT ALERT⚡
Join us this **Friday, August 1 at 11 a.m. EST / 8 a.m. PST** for “Recess Rally: Your Guide to Climate Advocacy This August”—an exclusive webinar with Representatives Ro Khanna and Jennifer McClellan, where we’ll get you everything you need to engage your lawmakers on climate and clean energy after their vote on the “One Big Beautiful Bill.” [RSVP NOW](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824369/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi friend,

You already know that Congress just passed Trump’s devastating budget bill—**so now what?**

What comes next for climate and clean energy advocates?

**The answer is right in front of us, actually** —Congressmembers are in district for the month of August, and there has never been a better time to engage them on the next steps for climate action.

That’s why we’re partnering with Sierra Club to host a [virtual event this Friday](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824370/87SdQ4wZ) with **Representatives Ro Khanna (CA-17) and Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)** to launch a comprehensive toolkit for engaging your lawmakers after their vote on the budget bill. |
[](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824371/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **What:** Recess Rally: Your Guide to Advocacy This August
**When:** This Friday, August 1, 11 a.m. EST / 8 a.m. PST
**Where:**[**RSVP for the virtual event here**](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824372/87SdQ4wZ)
**Who:**
⭐ **Rep. Ro Khanna** – Progressive champion and clean energy leader
⭐ **Rep. Jennifer McClellan** – Climate champion
⭐**Lena Moffitt** – Executive Director, Evergreen Collaborative
⭐ **Emily Gorman** – Chief Field Officer, Sierra Club
⭐ **Maisy Deans** – Senior Government Affairs Advocate, Evergreen |
---
[COUNT ME IN](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824373/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We’ll also have plenty of time for Q&A and will share the advocacy toolkit afterward.

**The stakes couldn’t be higher.** Trump’s economic plan will spike electricity costs by $110+ annually for the average household, eliminate nearly a million clean energy jobs, and dump hundreds of millions of tons more greenhouse gases into our atmosphere.

**But here’s the thing—YOU have unique power in this moment.**

Whether your member of Congress voted for or against this disaster, we’ll show you exactly how to engage them effectively. From securing meetings to writing compelling letters to the editor, you’ll leave this webinar ready to make your voice heard.

⏳ **Don’t let this moment pass.**[**RSVP today!**](http://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824374/87SdQ4wZ)

And bring your questions! |
---
| See you there, |
---
| | |
---
### Jessica Hamilton
Senior Director of Digital Advocacy
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824375/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---
Follow Evergreen on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824376/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3824377/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: [MEDIA ADVISORY] CHC Chair Rep. Espaillat, Rep. Dr. Ruiz, Climate Power En Acción, America’s Voice, & NHLA to Dissect Impacts of Rep. Budget Law
body:
| |
---
| | | *****MEDIA ADVISORY***** **FOR PLANNING PURPOSES ONLY** **DATE:** July 29, 2025 **CONTACT:** Luis Sanchez Armas, [press.enaccion@climatepower.us](mailto:press.enaccion@climatepower.us)
---
|
### **TUESDAY, JULY 29 AT 12:00 P.M. ET**
**CHC Chair Rep. Adriano Espaillat, Rep. Dr. Raul Ruiz, Climate Power En Acción,
America’s Voice, and NHLA to Dissect Impacts of
Republican Budget Law on Latinos** **WASHINGTON** — On **_Tuesday, July 29, at 12:00 p.m. ET_** , Congressional Hispanic Caucus Chair Adriano Espaillat, Rep. Dr. Raul Ruiz, and leaders of [Climate Power En Acción](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=9dafe7e619&e=b8f90417f9), [America’s Voice](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=48fd9441fc&e=b8f90417f9), and [National Hispanic Leadership Agenda (NHLA)](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=213fe2dbf3&e=b8f90417f9), will host a virtual bilingual media briefing titled [“Trump’s Summer of Lies.”](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=2190932d98&e=b8f90417f9) They will discuss President Trump and Congressional Republicans’ recently passed budget bill and its far-reaching impacts on Latinos.

The conversation will particularly focus on how the new Republican law is a direct attack on Latino families, as it effectively forces them to pay more for energy, makes access to healthcare more difficult and more expensive, eliminates tax credits and jobs in clean energy, provides unprecedented funding for ICE and mass sweeps, and unravels countless environmental protections.
**The event will be held in English, but speakers will be available to take questions in Spanish.**
**WHAT:** “Trump’s Summer of Lies,” a virtual bilingual press briefing to discuss the impacts on Latinos of the recently adopted Republican budget reconciliation law.

**WHEN:** Tuesday, July 29 at 12:00 p.m. ET

**WHO:**
* **Representative Adriano Espaillat,** New York’s 13th Congressional District
* **Representative Dr. Raul Ruiz,** California's 25th Congressional District
* **Antonieta Cádiz,** Executive Director of Climate Power En Acción
* **Vanessa Cárdenas,** Executive Director of America’s Voice
* **Amy Hinojosa,** Chair of the National Hispanic Leadership Agenda

**WHERE:** Virtual — **[Register here](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=b2d20a68a3&e=b8f90417f9)** for the briefing and to receive materials ahead of the event. If you have any questions, please contact [press.enaccion@climatepower.us](mailto:press.enaccion@climatepower.us?subject=Trump%E2%80%99s%20Summer%20of%20Lies%20Query).

Shane Tamura, 27, killed an NYPD officer and three other people in a shooting at the NFL headquarters building at 345 Park Avenue in Midtown Manhattan on Monday evening before turning the gun on himself on the 33rd floor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5e09ca5b-da7b-46de-85ac-65a08a6ef11a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tamura left[a multi-page note](https://substack.com/redirect/5e09ca5b-da7b-46de-85ac-65a08a6ef11a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) blaming the NFL for his struggles with CTE** (chronic traumatic encephalopathy), a brain injury linked to head trauma, and requested that his brain be studied after his death, according to law enforcement sources.
* **The gunman had a known mental health history** and lived in Las Vegas where he worked as a casino security guard, though investigators are still probing whether his targeting of the NFL headquarters was directly related to his mental illness.
* **Tamura was a standout high school football player in California** who graduated from Golden Valley High in 2016, with former classmates and coaches saying he had great potential before his circumstances changed.
* **One NFL employee was seriously injured but survived the attack** , with Commissioner Roger Goodell confirming in a letter to staff that one of their colleagues had been hurt in the shooting that began in the building's lobby.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b7842c3-719e-48c9-8c55-1a8cf40c15cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Dear Reader,
A leaked memo from a secret Big Pharma meeting reveals they're plotting to destroy RFK Jr's political future...
Here it is:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7325e45a-9304-44e7-aa79-cabcd9bae87d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Is Big Pharma TERRIFIED of RFK Jr. uncovering the **[biggest health controversy](https://substack.com/redirect/7325e45a-9304-44e7-aa79-cabcd9bae87d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of them all?

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Legalize It, Lead It: A GOP Opportunity
body:
Chris Holbert | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Chris Holbert: A better way forward on cannabis for Pennsylvania Republicans**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3a8a2d4b4e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| ''When I arrived in the Colorado Legislature in 2011, I would have dismissed the suggestion that a **conservative Republican** like myself would ever help lead efforts to **legalize cannabis. **Like most of my colleagues and the majority of constituents I represented, I voted against two amendments to the Colorado Constitution that legalized marijuana...

I learned from experience that governing can require a legislator to **confront uncomfortable realities** when the public is already there on an issue — and sometimes those realities change minds..."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1940ce54f6&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")
---
|
---
|
## About Chris Holbert:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4bc3ea0e3a&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
**Chris Holbert** served as a Republican state representative (2011-2014) and state senator (2015-2022) in Colorado, which began state-licensed retail marijuana sales in January 2014. During his time in the Colorado Senate, he was elected as Senate Majority Leader (2017-2018) and was twice elected unanimously as Senate Minority Leader (2019-2020 & 2021-2022). Subject to term limits, Chris and his wife moved to Florida in 2022.
---
|
---

name: Jerri Green, Founder of Mother Funders PAC
subject: So Tennessee is denying prenatal care to unmarried women now? Not on our watch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mother Funders PAC - Frankie Dakin, Treasurer
body:
Dear Crystal,
**At a recent town hall, a mother shared that [she had been denied prenatal care by a physician because she's not married](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347665/560209504/-28225299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=&emci=28debcab-876c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=34bbde18-956c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=52142494). **
Let that sink in.
This is not only shameful, but _inhumane._
And it’s now legal in Tennessee.
Three months ago, the state legislature passed the so-called “2025 Medical Ethics Defense Act,” which gives physicians the right to deny care if it **"violate the conscience of the healthcare provider". **
_**A law that was championed by two men who have never given birth.**_
Now, in Tennessee, the “conscience” of a doctor outweighs the basic medical needs of a pregnant person. The right to deny health care is being reframed as “free speech.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347670/560209511/2008325688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=)
**Denying necessary reproductive healthcare because of marital status isn't free speech, it's neglect at best. A death sentence at worst.**
This mom said the idea of being pregnant in Tennessee already terrifies her because of its extreme abortion ban. She’s now traveling out of state to get the care she should’ve received at home.
[**_We need a new wave of leaders in Tennessee that will fight for everyone's right to seek care, no matter their beliefs or marital status. We need moms in office who will fight for families every step of the way, _because that's what moms do.__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347681/560209516/2008325688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=)
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347685/560209527/2008325688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=)
**I founded _Mother Funders_ earlier this year to elect more moms to office. **
**Because moms know what it means to carry life, and to protect it—not just in the womb, but in our policies.** And** ** once elected, these mothers will fight for paid family leave, real living wages, and protecting a woman’s right to have a say in all her health care decisions.
We couldn't put it better than the woman who was denied healthcare: "It should be about people and not the party...If you are ‘pro-life,’ you believe in supporting and protecting all lives: the born, the unborn and that includes insurance coverage, food, protecting them at school, and protecting marginalized communities.”
That’s the kind of leadership we need. **That’s what moms bring to the table.**
[**Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford today to help Mother Funders get more moms into the halls of power?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347688/560209530/2008325688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=)
To more moms in office,
_**Jerri Green**_
Mom, Founder of Mother Funders PAC, & Memphis City Councilwoman
**Learn more at:[ www.motherfunderspac.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347692/560209540/-342027169?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=&emci=28debcab-876c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=34bbde18-956c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=52142494)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112347697/560209549/2008325688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg3MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGJiZGUxOC05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rS9OrtQiKVTmwRAVSAR6002kywhJOmNWveKaKKYv3xk=)
Paid for by Mother Funders PAC - Frankie Dakin, Treasurer.
Mother Funders PAC
P.O. Box 40034
Memphis, TN 38174
United States
