## ICYMI: Prosecuting Russia Hoax Perpetrators...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d4157294-3442-45cb-986c-2b3459294218?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Stories I'm reading...
[Democratic-led states sue over Trump administration's effort to obtain personal information of SNAP recipients](https://substack.com/redirect/6047f9b1-2ba5-457a-8993-2a058b027377?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via CNN
[Dan Bongino Says He's 'Shocked' To His 'Core' Over Recent 'Public Corruption' Investigations](https://substack.com/redirect/1425202a-4517-46af-8a76-22880f2b1f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Daily Caller
[Pentagon suspends participation in think tank events](https://substack.com/redirect/782842ee-c476-4881-9589-68a218c914ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Politico
[Flashback: 7 Media Mouthpieces Who Repeated The Lie That Russia 'Hacked' The 2016 Election](https://substack.com/redirect/196a159e-580c-4a16-ab6d-6aeb81b5499b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via The Federalist
[Under Siege From Trump and Musk, a Top Liberal Group Falls Into Crisis](https://substack.com/redirect/8ca5b133-3228-4c8f-8df9-31442f49d4e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Times
[Ned Ryun: If Federal Reserve Is Over Budget On Building Renovations, How Are They Managing Monetary Policy?](https://substack.com/redirect/626fc969-f0ba-453b-a80d-4c5bd2a7a199?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Real Clear Politics
[AOC broke House rules to attend Met Gala with beau Riley Roberts, is told to pay additional $2,700 for 'Tax The Rich' gown, other accessories](https://substack.com/redirect/800a67eb-de51-438f-9e00-4f4fed287172?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via New York Post
## Start your day in the know
Are you starting your day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/d7c7b234-99c5-470a-9945-66a9837f87ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it!
[Subscribe HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/d7c7b234-99c5-470a-9945-66a9837f87ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
Tune in Tuesday for my conversation with Daniel Turner and Link Lauren, then Wednesday I'm joined by Kansas Senator Roger Marshall. Thursday we've got a great panel featuring The Daily Signal's Jarrett Stepman and Amber Duke. Finally Friday, I'm talking to pollster and founder of The Trafalgar Group, Robert Cahaly. Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## The Dealmaker-in-Chief...
The global trade system's been rigged against us for years, and nobody had the guts to call it out.
But once again, Trump's bucking the status quo.
He's been fighting for America since day one, and now he's taking on the global trade system-- reshaping how America deals with the world.
For too long, we were told to just swallow the trade deficits, the unfair tariffs, the jobs shipped overseas.
Well enough is enough.
The White House has announced a slew of trade deals over the last week.
They balance the playing field, putting America first.
And this latest deal with the European Union?
It's a game-changer, and it's setting the tone for what's to come.
Let's break it down...

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/29/2025
body:
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
We're hearing from so many of you how much you loved our new investigative piece on the oil and gas industry. Although it exposes more corruption in Colorado, we're grateful to have a community so passionate about the TRUTH who is willing to share this far and wide to enact change._***ICYMI ➡️** [Permits denied, leases lost: Inside the MOU reshaping oil and gas production in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_

🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Gov. Polis is ramping up his green agenda, but critics warn it could lead to [blackouts and higher energy bills](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) across the state. Meanwhile, Denver is spending $3 million on a campaign [urging residents to eat less meat](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—prompting outrage from ranchers who say it’s a direct insult to Colorado’s agricultural roots and rural communities.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** A Stanford-led study now estimates COVID vaccines saved 2.5 million lives—not 20 million—raising fresh questions about [mandates and public trust](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). President Trump, meanwhile, secured a [historic trade deal with the EU](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) worth over $1.3 trillion in energy and investment. And two Marine veterans [stopped a stabbing rampage](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) at a Michigan Walmart that left 11 injured, as a separate federal probe investigates a man who woke up just before his [organs were to be harvested](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** From AI to state grants, today's commentaries exposes the leftward drift of U.S. institutions. Brian Joondeph warns that AI tools like Grok and Gemini are [distorting facts to fit progressive narratives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Cory Gaines reveals that state education grants are [funding fringe projects like “gay forestry”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) instead of real school improvements. Meanwhile, a Fort Morgan ribbon-cutting highlights how [public-private partnerships can still work](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) when politics take a backseat. And finally, Garbo shares his thoughts on the [orchestrated coup by Obama officials](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) against Trump using the DOJ, intelligence community, and media echo chambers.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, July 29, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Denver Spends $3 Million Urging Residents to Eat Less Meat](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
“Eat less meat.” “Eat more plant-based meals.” “Vote for climate-conscious leaders.”
The tips come from a “do more” list that Mayor Mike Johnston’s administration posted as part of its $3 million marketing campaign that aims to persuade residents to help the city reach its climate goals.
Additionally, posters have begun popping up around the city, including slogans that say, “It’s the end of the end of the world.” Behind the public relations blitz is the Office of Climate Action, Sustainability and Resiliency’s “Do more. Do less. Do something.” campaign.
Notably, the city said eating less meat and a host of other actions would “help the planet and protect” communities. The Johnston administration is not the first to promote a “less meat” diet. In 2021, Gov. Jared Polis proclaimed a “MeatOut Day” to encourage Coloradans to consider “plants-based” food. The proclamation incensed Colorado ranchers.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Eleven stabbed at Michigan Walmart before two Marine veterans end the violence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Eleven people were stabbed at a Walmart in Traverse City, Michigan, before two Marine veterans—one unarmed, one carrying legally—stepped in to stop the attacker.

* The suspect, Bradford Gille, was arrested after being tackled and disarmed by the veterans, who were praised for their life-saving actions.

* The incident has reignited discussion on concealed carry and civilian intervention, as one veteran used his sidearm to de-escalate without firing a shot.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Gaines: Instead of schools, state grants funded advocacy for equity, gay forestry—and ‘indigenizing’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado diverted state funds originally meant for public school infrastructure into a grant program that financed advocacy projects—like “indigenizing outdoor activities” and “LGBTQ2S+ safety workshops”—through activist group Cultivando.

* One $61,750 grant went to a Cultivando-run initiative called Fortaleza Familiar, which promised deliverables such as “reclaiming outdoor spaces” and hosting culturally tailored environmental events.

* Critics argue the spending reflects a shift in priorities from essential education needs to politically charged programs, calling it wasteful at a time when school facilities remain underfunded.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Permits denied, leases lost: Inside the MOU reshaping oil and gas production in Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | JULY 25** _Colorado’s 2024 MOU with BLM is being used to block drilling on federal land, reroute energy dollars and shift authority from Washington to regulators aligned with the Polis anti-fossil fuels agenda._
**[Devotional: The Belt of Truth–Holding it all together](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 27** _As we wrap up this mini-series on The Belt of Truth, part of our year-long journey through The Armor of God, it’s time to buckle up to keep all of life together: heart, mind, and life (relationships).
_
**[AGNC and Craig urge Congress: Let displaced coal workers access retirement without penalty](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | JULY 25** _In Craig, a coal worker with $60,000 in retirement savings could lose $6,000 of it overnight—just for trying to survive after losing his job. That’s the reality hundreds of families are facing in Northwest Colorado, where coal plants and mines are shutting down years ahead of schedule and federal tax law is punishing livelihoods already in freefall._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🐙 DID YOU KNOW?** Some octopuses lay up to **56,000 rice-sized eggs at a time** , which float freely until the mother gathers and braids them together—so she can watch over them all at once.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "The Republican Party will in the future, as in the past, ever stand opposed to the establishment of one class who shall live on the government, and another class who shall pay the taxes." – Calvin Coolidge
|
---

[SUBSCRIBE FOR FREE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
here’s 5 reasons why we’re asking for your support today

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112349219/560214119/172610512?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM3_250729_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQxZTliYS05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8hR8uHzuq_l-hTRutFcki_-vCSWiORWQa52ZUE9-5s=) Derek,

With only a couple of days to go until our end-of-month deadline, we’re reaching out to ask: [_**if you can, will you chip in just $5 to reelect Mark Warner?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112349220/560214120/172610512?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM3_250729_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQxZTliYS05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8hR8uHzuq_l-hTRutFcki_-vCSWiORWQa52ZUE9-5s=)

Right now, we’re not on track to reach our fundraising benchmark for July. Here’s 5 reasons why we can’t afford to come up short:
1. Republicans have deemed Senator Warner a top target in the midterm elections – they believe they can take this seat to expand their majority in the Senate.

2. A Trump-aligned super PAC has _already_ raised a record-breaking $85 million this year to win races like ours.

3. So we need to be prepared for this to be our most expensive race yet. Donald Trump and special interest Republicans will spend whatever it takes to defeat Mark – and they have the money to do it.

4. Unlike the GOP, Mark is counting on committed supporters like you to fuel his campaign.

5. **And finally, there simply is no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose this seat.**

$5 can make a bigger impact than you think, Derek. When hundreds of committed supporters like you step up, it makes a real difference in our work to fight off Republican attacks, reelect Mark Warner, and take back the Senate for Democrats.

Your $5 contribution couldn’t come at a more critical time. Please, if you can, chip in ahead of our deadline: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250706-eom**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112349223/560214123/172610512?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM3_250729_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQxZTliYS05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8hR8uHzuq_l-hTRutFcki_-vCSWiORWQa52ZUE9-5s=)

Thank you,

Team Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112349226/560214126/172610512?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM3_250729_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQxZTliYS05NTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8hR8uHzuq_l-hTRutFcki_-vCSWiORWQa52ZUE9-5s=)****

clean_body: here’s 5 reasons why we’re asking for your support today | | | = Derek, With only a couple of days to go until our end-of-month deadline, we’re reaching out to ask: = Right now, we’re not on track to reach our fundraising benchmark for July. Here’s 5 reasons why we can’t afford to come up short: 1. Republicans have deemed Senator Warner a top target in the midterm elections – they believe they can take this seat to expand their majority in the Senate. 2. A Trump-aligned super PAC has already raised a record-breaking $85 million this year to win races like ours. 3. So we need to be prepared for this to be our most expensive race yet. Donald Trump and special interest Republicans will spend whatever it takes to defeat Mark – and they have the money to do it. 4. Unlike the GOP, Mark is counting on committed supporters like you to fuel his campaign. 5. And finally, there simply is no Senate majority for Democrats if we lose this seat. $5 can make a bigger impact than you think, Derek. When hundreds of committed supporters like you step up, it makes a real difference in our work to fight off Republican attacks, reelect Mark Warner, and take back the Senate for Democrats. Your $5 contribution couldn’t come at a more critical time. Please, if you can, chip in ahead of our deadline: = Thank you, Team Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let Republicans rename the Kennedy Center opera house after Melania Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Republicans rename beloved Kennedy Center opera house after Melania Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6f169cf-b315-4387-b4ad-ec76c6f499bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8584c3a-7109-4ec9-b68d-24d5a3437623/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The Kennedy Center opera house is one of the most beloved and important performance spaces in the nation -- and [Republicans are pushing to rename it after Melania Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2ce7cbb-004d-421f-95bb-8732e1c66a56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). For real. She's been there a grand total of 1 time, and was roundly booed by the other attendees. It's absurd, but Republicans have already pushed it through the Appropriations committee, and are preparing for a full House vote. **[Don't let this happen. Push back hard, spread the word, and add your name: "Don't let Republicans rename beloved Kennedy Center opera house after Melania Trump"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f7c308c-3b93-4b12-ba74-eb4ac0901c96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Hey Peter,
I don’t co-sign just anything. But when I see someone leading with truth, love, and vision, I show up.
[https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2] [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2] That’s why I’m showing up for Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding and Movement for Freedom TOMORROW at 7 PM CST/8 PM EST. Will I see you there? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2] [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2] [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2]
Stephany and I come from the same kind of fight, one that’s rooted in justice, people power, and a deep belief that we deserve more than crumbs from systems that were never built for us.
She’s a pastor. A scholar. A truth-teller. And she’s leading something crucial for our time.
Movement for Freedom is here to educate, organize, and mobilize our communities, to break cycles of injustice and build toward collective liberation.
I’ll be there tomorrow, alongside my brother in the movement, Congressman Jamaal Bowman, and incredible youth organizer Vincent Vertuccio. I’d love to see your name on Zoom. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2]
RSVP TODAY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/8UNzC5NzbEizdzOzGYA7FA2]
The Movement for Freedom is building something powerful. Let’s build it in unity.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush
Founder, Politivist Action PAC

We build diverse, intergenerational movements to confront extremism, defend democracy, and promote racial, economic, and social justice. By rejecting corporate influence and fighting to eliminate big money in politics, we proudly support grassroots candidates who champion dignity and equality for all.
Want to learn more? Visit our website at PolitivistAction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com] .

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I have thought on it and prayed about it, and I have decided. I’m in.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250729_1_cooper?refcode=em20250729-1668&amount=5&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)
[**I’m Roy Cooper. I’m a proud Democrat. I’m also a former Governor and Attorney General from North Carolina. Today, I’m asking for your support to be the next United States Senator and help Democrats take BACK the Senate Majority in 2026. If you’re ready to join me in the fight, split a contribution between Chris Pappas and my campaign today >>>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250729_1_cooper?refcode=em20250729-1668&amount=5&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)
**North Carolinians already know this about me:** I’ve spent my life in service to our state, and my record shows that I will do everything in my power to deliver results for our people.
That’s why North Carolinians elected me Governor in some of the most competitive races in the nation — _twice._
Now, this election is set to be the most competitive Senate race of 2026, and the national GOP will go to any lengths to defeat us. Everyone knows that the path to retaking the Senate Majority and STOPPING Washington Republicans starts here in NC.
[**If we’re going to win, we need Democrats from across this country to join our fight. I hope to see your name on the list of Founding Donors starting our campaign off strong, and just $10 will go a long way. Can I count on you to split a contribution of any size right away?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250729_1_cooper?refcode=em20250729-1668&amount=5&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)
I have a long record of getting things done — from taking on big banks as Attorney General to getting Medicaid expansion passed when I was Governor.
I’m not afraid of doing hard work to make our country better. _And I’m not afraid to speak out when politicians are doing something wrong, either._
Too many Republicans in Washington have lost all sense of duty to our people and our country. They see only the prospect of getting on Donald Trump’s wrong side and losing their power. **This cannot continue.**
Americans deserve leaders who will serve the people, not their own partisan agenda.
_Meanwhile, Donald Trump has handpicked a loyalist candidate to run against me._
As Senator, I will defend our democracy. I’ll stand up for voting rights, work hard to restore abortion access, advocate for policies that will protect our air and drinking water, and do everything possible to bring jobs and opportunity to our economy.
[**My promise to you is that I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great country. We can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does a $10 donation, split between our Senate campaign and Chris Pappas, fit in your budget today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250729_1_cooper?refcode=em20250729-1668&amount=5&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)
**[Split $10 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250729_1_cooper?amount=5&refcode=em20250729-1668&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)**
**[Donate More »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250729_1_cooper?amount=5&refcode=em20250729-1668&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)**
We have work to do,
Roy Cooper
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250729-1?t=1&refcode2=1668_582294_L1Xxnl&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1668%2E582294%2EL1Xxnl)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Manchester, NH 03105

I’ll stand up for voting rights, work hard to restore abortion access, advocate for policies that will protect our air and drinking water, and do everything possible to bring jobs and opportunity to our economy. We have work to do, Roy Cooper New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

| | |
Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. This is one of the longest emails I've sent as DSCC Chair -- **but it's also the most important.**

**I hope you'll read every word, but if you can't, here's the top-line info:** [**The DSCC has their end-of-month deadline coming up -- and without your help, we could fall _short_ of the $250,000 goal we need to raise to flip the Senate. Will you chip in $5 to make sure we hit it? Your gift will be tripled, but only until the deadline.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21928?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250729-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250729-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20856%2E9716520%2EKFYpbs)

Here are three things you need to know right now:

**DONALD TRUMP IS HURTING -- NOT HELPING -- HARDWORKING AMERICANS.**

Trump's second term is already as bad as we've feared. Worse, even. He's packing our government with MAGA loyalists, undermining our democracy, and grabbing unprecedented power and wealth for himself -- but he's done _nothing_ to tackle the issues that matter most, like lowering costs and protecting Social Security.

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE PUSHING TRUMP'S DANGEROUS AGENDA.**

On issue after issue, the Republican majority has moved in lockstep with Trump -- no matter how far he pushes our country in the wrong direction. They're rubber-stamping his radical, unqualified nominees and actually defending his pardoning of hundreds of January 6th insurrectionists!

Fortunately, we have an alternative path forward:

**DEMOCRATS HAVE A _REAL CHANCE_ TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE.**

With multiple special elections in key battlegrounds on the map and some of the most vulnerable Republicans up for reelection, we have no shortage of chances to flip seats blue. But to win back a majority and deliver on the issues that matter most, I'll need Democrats like you on my side.

[**So today, with our critical end-of-month deadline approaching, I'm asking you to make a difference. Will you chip in $5 (becomes $15) to fight for a Democratic Senate majority that will fight for you?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21928?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250729-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250729-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandLongForm-Pros-sl1&akid=20856%2E9716520%2EKFYpbs)

Kirsten

** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

clean_body: I represent one of the most competitive districts in Texas — and the radical left knows that if they can knock off a conservative like me, they can start tipping Texas blue for good. | Fellow American, 3,000 left-wing activists filled Dickies Arena this weekend in the heart of North Texas. And leading the parade? Bernie Sanders. Robert Francis “ Beto ” O’Rourke. Greg Casar. The Communist All-Stars! They didn’t come to enjoy the barbecue. They came to FLIP this seat. I represent one of the most competitive districts in Texas — and the radical left knows that if they can knock off a conservative like me, they can start tipping Texas blue for good. This isn’t just about my race. This is about stopping the socialist, anti-American energy, open-borders agenda they’re trying to force on all of us. And with our end-of-quarter deadline just days away, I need you to step up and help me hold the line. I’ll be honest — the Democrats are pouring millions into seats like mine to try to erase the gains we made in 2024. They’re organizing, they’re fundraising, and they’re targeting us hard. We can’t wait until the Fall to fight back. We draw the line right here in Texas. And we draw it today. – Beth Van Duyne GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

Friend, As Trump heads into his 23rd day of wall to wall press coverage of his involvement with Jeffrey Epstein, he is beginning to panic over if he'll keep the House next fall. This is in part why he has instructed the Texas legislature to get him new Congressional maps that will bolster the GOP's house majority and protect vulnerable seats that they are currently on track to lose. **Here 's what they've come up with: **

They can get away with insane gerrymandering like this in Texas _because they control the Texas Supreme Court_ \- the body responsible for drawing up Congressional maps. In November 2025 MAGA is quietly preparing to move heaven and earth to take the majority on Pennsylvania's state Supreme Court in their upcoming judicial election. **They want to do in Pennsylvania exactly what they 're doing in Texas and controlling that state's highest court opens that door**. _If they take majority control of the court they can draw new maps that shore up the five PA Republican districts that they are projected to lose in 2026 and make PA 's seven safe blue seats __untenable_ _for Democrats. _ We get it--a Judicial Retention election _does not sound sexy._ But losing this race could mean losing every blue congressional seat in PA. Defend our Courts is one of the only organizations working to rapidly mobilize Democrats before we are outraised and outorganized by MAGA (what we are currently on track for). **[Can we count on you to split whatever you can spare between Defend Our Courts and No Dem Left Behind to help us catch up in the beyond critical 2025 election that no one is talking about? ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvzBxudtH_vIszJQvgmsF45LT_b55kPf9YjIxcOS02CgN-oKakeQRjVCsx4FLQ32q8P23cEMFUyIeF9vWnePH6XER0Y7NeBHhEl0KpEq1gyZyv9vctCkl_v4pJQXN71Zilhw9BqSY_EkzRXSoLBAUo7ij2-BHjNwR5mVOZEz_rl86ff7E-Nib1BkPx9I-jX4U4envDrT3UkjbyaJhziOvm5DL8kiUtxdxV3gTutsUYwGHn8gLIvOZYVPEYC0bXQ9joI_hheaIyeaT7CouUvJ_tmDO4eGKe7XUCizIMb_SrOXGFG4lKEM7S4ea4NAEroVwdj_w7hCc60cHdjDyGk_38rKUjJEFXYD_Pgho_c9IBQs4fQnYx0UfQTPLgOpTVB5GU/4il/C5ZWdccRR0qehd_9KLkcyA/h2/h001.OZhWjEWYdS63M5G8t3Td9vYUUAAK3umaWyjqbZZymNE)**

clean_body: They can get away with insane gerrymandering like this in Texas because they control the Texas Supreme Court - the body responsible for drawing up Congressional maps. | | Friend, As Trump heads into his 23rd day of wall to wall press coverage of his involvement with Jeffrey Epstein, he is beginning to panic over if he'll keep the House next fall. This is in part why he has instructed the Texas legislature to get him new Congressional maps that will bolster the GOP's house majority and protect vulnerable seats that they are currently on track to lose. Here 's what they've come up with: | They can get away with insane gerrymandering like this in Texas because they control the Texas Supreme Court \- the body responsible for drawing up Congressional maps. In November 2025 MAGA is quietly preparing to move heaven and earth to take the majority on Pennsylvania's state Supreme Court in their upcoming judicial election. They want to do in Pennsylvania exactly what they 're doing in Texas and controlling that state's highest court opens that door. If they take majority control of the court they can draw new maps that shore up the five PA Republican districts that they are projected to lose in 2026 and make PA 's seven safe blue seats untenable for Democrats. We get it--a Judicial Retention election does not sound sexy. But losing this race could mean losing every blue congressional seat in PA. Defend our Courts is one of the only organizations working to rapidly mobilize Democrats before we are outraised and outorganized by MAGA (what we are currently on track for). Let's catch back up and save Pennsylvania before the clock runs out. Team Defend our Courts | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. name: info@keithellison.org
subject: Let's finish strong.
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Keith is taking on some of the toughest fights in the country—holding Purdue Pharma and the Sackler family accountable for the opioid crisis, defending working families, and standing up to Donald Trump’s cruel and unlawful attacks on basic human dignity.

Just last week, Keith joined 19 other attorneys general in taking the Trump administration to court to block a cruel and reckless rule that would deny people access to shelter, mental health services, and basic medical care—simply because of their immigration status.

Keith is using every tool at his disposal to fight for Minnesotans. But none of it is possible without the support of this grassroots team.

Our end-of-month deadline is just a few days away, and we’re still $19,385 short of our goal. We need a strong final push to close the gap and keep Keith’s work moving forward.

Will you donate $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you to help us finish strong?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250729ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250729ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250729ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250729ke?refcode=other]

Every contribution makes a difference—and your support right now will help ensure we don’t fall short when it matters most.

Thanks for being in this with us,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

name: JAG
subject: Mamdani’s Agenda: Looters First, Producers Last
body:
Zohran Mamdani — an open socialist running for mayor of New York City — is proposing the very policies which Ayn Rand’s villains gleefully imposed.
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11317743/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvMlNSWWVVdEg2cw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3Mjk/LbmNsZXpCU3lBbQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR1lXU2xLcGdscw/gaIj2OA/set0469f85a)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Patriot,

Zohran Mamdani — an open socialist running for mayor of New York City — is proposing the very policies which Ayn Rand’s villains gleefully imposed.

He is pushing for government seizure of property, racial reparations, rent cancellation, and wealth redistribution on a massive scale.

Mamdani doesn’t believe in _earned_ success. He believes in _assigned_ victimhood.

He doesn’t believe in empowering individuals. He wants to punish achievement and use race and class as weapons to divide.

Mamdani’s ideas lead to breadlines, not breakthroughs.

When I first read Ayn Rand’s _We the Living_ , which drew directly from her own experience growing up under Soviet communism, I was haunted by the images of breadlines... of lives wasted waiting on the state... of the erosion of personal freedom... of dreams strangled by envy, fear, and force.

**Today, I see those same destructive ideas rearing their ugly heads in America’s greatest city.**

The fact that Mamdani could win a primary and now has a chance at leading what was once our nation’s bastion of capitalism demonstrates that these are more than just bad ideas. They are signs of a greater problem: the growing popularity of the victim mentality.

Unfortunately, Mamdani is not alone. His brand of envy-fueled politics is gaining traction with young people across the country.

That’s why the work we do at The Atlas Society is more important than ever before.

I’m Jennifer Anju Grossman, CEO of The Atlas Society. Through our viral videos, graphic novels, online courses, and live events, we are reaching the next generation and giving them the tools to reject the ideology of victimhood and pathological altruism.

**Your gift of $25, $50, or even $100 will help us break the chains of Mamdani’s toxic ideology and give the next generation the tools to live freely, think independently, and achieve greatness.**
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Rand called art _“the indispensable medium to convey moral ideals.”_

That’s why the Atlas Society leverages art to reach new audiences with our action-packed animated book trailers, provocative Draw My Life videos, and captivating graphic novels.

For many young people, this is the first time they will learn about Ayn Rand’s work.

By introducing the next generation to the empowering principles of Objectivism, we provide a rational and moral alternative to the culture of collectivism and envy.

Instead of teaching _victimhood_ , we teach **individual agency**.
Instead of promising _handouts_ , we promote **hard work**.
Instead of _scapegoating_ the successful, we **celebrate** them.

But we can’t do it without your help.

If you believe, as I do, that America needs a revival of the values that made it great, I’m asking you to [make a donation to The Atlas Society today](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).
[Donate Now](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Thank you for helping us fight back.

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO, The Atlas Society

P.S. Mamdani is reviving the same soul-crushing ideas that turned millions of people into state dependents and crushed the best among them.

Young people do not understand how a collectivist state grinds down the human spirit, erodes personal freedom, and destroys individual potential, making fear, envy, and ideological conformity a daily reality.

The Atlas Society wants to stop that from happening here.

[Your generous support will help us reach millions of young people with Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism, a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual. Please donate today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) _The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

clean_body: Zohran Mamdani — an open socialist running for mayor of New York City — is proposing the very policies which Ayn Rand’s villains gleefully imposed. | | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, Zohran Mamdani — an open socialist running for mayor of New York City — is proposing the very policies which Ayn Rand’s villains gleefully imposed. He is pushing for government seizure of property, racial reparations, rent cancellation, and wealth redistribution on a massive scale. Mamdani doesn’t believe in earned success. He believes in assigned victimhood. He doesn’t believe in empowering individuals. He wants to punish achievement and use race and class as weapons to divide. Mamdani’s ideas lead to breadlines, not breakthroughs. When I first read Ayn Rand’s We the Living , which drew directly from her own experience growing up under Soviet communism, I was haunted by the images of breadlines... of lives wasted waiting on the state... of the erosion of personal freedom... of dreams strangled by envy, fear, and force. Today, I see those same destructive ideas rearing their ugly heads in America’s greatest city. The fact that Mamdani could win a primary and now has a chance at leading what was once our nation’s bastion of capitalism demonstrates that these are more than just bad ideas. They are signs of a greater problem: the growing popularity of the victim mentality. Unfortunately, Mamdani is not alone. His brand of envy-fueled politics is gaining traction with young people across the country. That’s why the work we do at The Atlas Society is more important than ever before. I’m Jennifer Anju Grossman, CEO of The Atlas Society. Through our viral videos, graphic novels, online courses, and live events, we are reaching the next generation and giving them the tools to reject the ideology of victimhood and pathological altruism. Your gift of $25, $50, or even $100 will help us break the chains of Mamdani’s toxic ideology and give the next generation the tools to live freely, think independently, and achieve greatness. Rand called art “the indispensable medium to convey moral ideals.” That’s why the Atlas Society leverages art to reach new audiences with our action-packed animated book trailers, provocative Draw My Life videos, and captivating graphic novels. For many young people, this is the first time they will learn about Ayn Rand’s work. By introducing the next generation to the empowering principles of Objectivism, we provide a rational and moral alternative to the culture of collectivism and envy. Instead of teaching victimhood , we teach individual agency. Instead of promising handouts , we promote hard work. Instead of scapegoating the successful, we celebrate them. But we can’t do it without your help. If you believe, as I do, that America needs a revival of the values that made it great, I’m asking you to . Thank you for helping us fight back. Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG) CEO, The Atlas Society P.S. Mamdani is reviving the same soul-crushing ideas that turned millions of people into state dependents and crushed the best among them. Young people do not understand how a collectivist state grinds down the human spirit, erodes personal freedom, and destroys individual potential, making fear, envy, and ideological conformity a daily reality. The Atlas Society wants to stop that from happening here. The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.

Peter, Think abortion is protected in Pennsylvania?

Maybe not.

Trump's Medicaid cuts will force clinics to shut down across the country—including in states like Pennsylvania where abortion is still legal. [**That's why we're suing the Trump administration and why we need your help.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112352207/560223862/1268344831?sourceid=1150820&utm_campaign=26emaus-0704aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTA1MTZiYy05YTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLrDjcjatLC9yoRZROLAWscOf5iQURmByQbWvdf2Oag=&emci=c6760fb6-9a6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f10516bc-9a6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237) | [**PROTECT ACCESS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112352208/560223863/1268344831?sourceid=1150820&utm_campaign=26emaus-0704aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTA1MTZiYy05YTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RLrDjcjatLC9yoRZROLAWscOf5iQURmByQbWvdf2Oag=&emci=c6760fb6-9a6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f10516bc-9a6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=954237 "PROTECT ACCESS")

We've filed a lawsuit on behalf of Maine Family Planning (MFP), the state's largest network of reproductive health clinics. Trump's so-called "big beautiful bill" blocks clinics like MFP and Planned Parenthood from receiving Medicaid reimbursements, putting essential care out of reach.

MFP runs 18 clinics throughout the state of Maine, many in rural areas. For 70% of their patients, MFP is their only health care provider. Half rely on Medicaid. And Maine isn’t alone. This is what the Trump administration’s agenda looks like nationwide:
Medicaid is cut ➡️ Clinics close ➡️ Remaining providers are overwhelmed ➡️ Patients lose care

body:
We’re facing a big end-of-month fundraising deadline on Thursday night, and we need some help from our top supporters

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112352393/560224297/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjFhMWNmMC05YTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdsAYPc7r8P4PtVAPRGj1dDG0GR6MQEMmYApAXAa5hg=) Hey, we’re facing a big end-of-month fundraising deadline on Thursday night, and we need some help from our top supporters to catch up to our goal. [_**Can you pitch in a few dollars and help us get there?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112352394/560224298/-1340363074?refcode=email_072925_eom2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjFhMWNmMC05YTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdsAYPc7r8P4PtVAPRGj1dDG0GR6MQEMmYApAXAa5hg=) I know emails like this can be annoying, and I would never expect anyone to donate to every single one we send out. But if it’s been a while since you chipped in, let me explain really quickly why I’m asking: **KS-03 is one of the most competitive districts in the entire country** , and winning here takes an enormous amount of resources. In the last election, National Republicans and right-wing super PACs threw everything they had at us: Personal attacks, ugly smears, disinformation campaigns, you name it. But thanks to the incredible generosity of this team, we didn’t get overwhelmed. We set the record straight. And we won. I want to let you in on a secret: The vast majority of House races across the country aren’t competitive at all. The typical race for Congress is approximately a 30-point blowout. **But KS-03 won’t be one of them.** Like always, the outcome of next year’s election in this district won’t be determined months in advance. It will come down to how hard we out-work and out-hustle our opponent. So if you’ve been waiting to shake off the dust of last year’s tough election and get back into the game, I can’t think of a better, more impactful way to take action than by chipping in and helping me defend this must-win seat. Because we’re going to be up against a lot next year — and if Democrats want any chance of flipping the House blue, we need to make sure folks know the truth about who I am and what I stand for when they fill out their ballots. [_**That’s why I need your help. If you could make a grassroots donation of any amount before our next fundraising deadline, it would really help us out →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112352395/560224299/-1340363074?refcode=email_072925_eom2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjFhMWNmMC05YTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdsAYPc7r8P4PtVAPRGj1dDG0GR6MQEMmYApAXAa5hg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112352396/560224300/-1340363074?refcode=email_072925_eom2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjFhMWNmMC05YTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdsAYPc7r8P4PtVAPRGj1dDG0GR6MQEMmYApAXAa5hg=)

Because we’re going to be up against a lot next year — and if Democrats want any chance of flipping the House blue, we need to make sure folks know the truth about who I am and what I stand for when they fill out their ballots. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks so much, and have a great rest of your week. Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

body:
It isn't rocket-science. It's basic math.

| |

| | It isn't rocket-science. It's basic math.

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~)

| | **"****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that's also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency. "** **~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Elon Musk is right. It isn't rocket-science. It's basic math. It's also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris - in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch - one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029. While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to "surge to the border" for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, "free" health care, "free" cell phones, "free" housing, and "free" college...it doesn't matter. The result is the same. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College. And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._** **[If you agree then please sign your"BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING" Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we're seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~)** Because, here's the scary part: The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it's as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That's more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million). You get the picture. That's why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won't have a country. **[It's vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes. No way. My name is Rebecca Weber. I'm the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We 've got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the "feet on the street" advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our "calls-to-action" and weigh in with members of the ** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. **[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~)** But I can't do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don 't have a secure, _honest_ elections... none of it matters.** Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your"BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING" Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote. Now, here's the bad news: Most state constitutions grant voting rights to "every" citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit "only" citizens to vote. But there's good news, too: Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio. **What 's more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That's why, when you've signed your "BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING" Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don't get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can 't be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money "non-profit" groups to "**reshape** " our elections and our electorate. With that said, if you're able to make a larger contribution - say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 - it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections - and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census - **[your"BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING" Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/MSwv3YHDcPGUrtizSpcEEA~~/AARclBA~/vYRWRxGrAmlArhZP5YciFCgbYl6QbgA4KRK3fRF18kZiRIX0_IBsXWAgKXD_xYBiHhbB36UcF8PrEHN7L8oph6jeIx_H_hv0phvbL68Lak8KyMcB-E6bfpU4GwLWxFJx7pBLVv_4WJDkcdoeKxTDnmWB-TsM_8aVo-r7Yje5pwZXU9qlO6eRZ2Zo6aD2lIavJJumPG0jy84idlF6k9tG-VPsaZtEj4wSxbXXPuJmvVwi40JYlJPDngwFMJSgJuvaNDY4Vc3gPlAXFCZG-U5BUQ~~)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It's also about saving America. And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens - no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch - should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote

subject: NewsNation Canceled My Segment—Here’s What I Was Going to Say About Last Night’s Tragic NYC Shooting

I'm tired of Americans getting their opinions about Democrats from Republicans.

# [NewsNation Canceled My Segment--Here's What I Was Going to Say About Last Night's Tragic NYC Shooting](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169578565&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTc4NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MDgzNDMsImV4cCI6MTc1NjQwMDM0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.buAzDYHqvFRBC1Gl-Xvg84lXzqQYXV9pM-WDlIMk8CU)
### I'm tired of Americans getting their opinions about Democrats from Republicans.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Jul 29
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169578565&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTc4NTY1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzgwODM0MywiZXhwIjoxNzU2NDAwMzQzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.iYkAebplcAKc5O2MrSqhD2J0QchahvnQDY_ag0fa_EQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169578565&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTc4NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MDgzNDMsImV4cCI6MTc1NjQwMDM0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.buAzDYHqvFRBC1Gl-Xvg84lXzqQYXV9pM-WDlIMk8CU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=169578565&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NTc4NTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MDgzNDMsImV4cCI6MTc1NjQwMDM0MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.buAzDYHqvFRBC1Gl-Xvg84lXzqQYXV9pM-WDlIMk8CU)
---
| | [](https://substack..jHseC0UiKE6YvdrdgYUUzdh1WNDXOZvAG_A4iP6Anro?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/newsnation-canceled-my-segmentheres?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Last night, I was scheduled to appear on NewsNation with Leland Vittert for a panel discussion about the future of the Democratic Party and how the midterms are shaping up. But the segment was canceled at the last minute due to breaking news: a horrific mass shooting in New York City, where six people were killed--including NYPD Officer Didarul Islam, a 36-year-old father of two with a third child on the way.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/069d9abe-2ac0-4eac-9330-3412e27e638f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber._
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f4EAueiMnboZ3L58Aq-zfM67y09QrrH-QbBZWXIVLus?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169578565)
When tragedies like this happen, our first response should be one of grief, compassion, and respect. These were everyday people--people who won't come home to their families, won't take their kids to school, won't walk their dogs after work. Officer Islam will not be in the labor room alongside his wife as they welcome their third child into their family. The ripple effects of that violence are immeasurable.
But as I sat in the Zoom waiting room, I listened to the show's ongoing coverage. Rather than mourning the victims or discussing how we can address the root causes of violence--whether it's gun access, mental health, or political extremism--the conversation quickly turned into partisan blame. Pointing fingers. Specifically, attacks on Zohran Mamdani and other city leaders were accused of being anti-police, pro-crime, even pro-murder.
And while I recognize that as humans, our minds seek to make sense of incomprehensible acts in narrowing a single cause, I have to point out that this kind of framing is not just misleading--it's dangerous. And I was angry and fired up to push back.
As someone who grew up in a law enforcement household--my father served in the FBI for over 30 years--I have deep respect and compassion for the men and women who protect our communities. I also believe that being pro-reform and pro-accountability is _not_ the same thing as being anti-police. Most Democrats I know feel the same way.
The idea that Democrats are somehow responsible for every tragedy in a major city is a lie that conservative media has been pushing for years. And it's time we stop letting that narrative go unchallenged.
_Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber._
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f4EAueiMnboZ3L58Aq-zfM67y09QrrH-QbBZWXIVLus?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169578565)
Let's look at the facts:
* NYC has seen a 35% drop in murders and a 23% drop in shootings this year.
* Chicago--my hometown--has seen a 16% drop in homicides.
* Violent crime remains higher in Republican-led states like Alabama, Arkansas, and Oklahoma than in Democratic strongholds like California.

So this idea that Democratic leadership equals "lawlessness" is not only false--it's projection.
I was ready to say all of this last night because I will no longer accept the framing that Democrats are anti-cop or soft on crime. We believe in public safety. We believe in reform. We believe in communities where families--Black, white, brown, rich, poor--can live in peace. No one is pro-murder. No one is rooting for chaos.
What I heard last night was not a serious attempt to understand or respond to the tragedy. It was a rush to score political points before the facts were even in.
I want to be clear: I _respect_ NewsNation, I like Leland and enjoy doing his show, and appreciate being invited on. I don't envy the challenge of balancing horrendous breaking news with the 24/7 cable cycle. But the conversation I heard last night missed the moment. And it missed the chance to bring Americans together in the face of loss.
That's why I continue to show up on networks like NewsNation, Fox News, and even with folks like Piers Morgan--because I'm tired of Americans getting their opinions about Democrats from Republicans. If we don't show up and speak for ourselves, someone else will do it for us--and they won't get it right.
_Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber._
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..f4EAueiMnboZ3L58Aq-zfM67y09QrrH-QbBZWXIVLus?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=169578565)
With Urgency,
Mike
_Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy._

name: Team Moore
subject: An ambitious campaign for Maryland
body:
We’re checking our books before July ends and wanted to share some information with you.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)
We’re building an ambitious campaign, Peter — one to match the energy of Wes’ mission to make this Maryland’s decade.
That takes a lot of people and a lot of resources. With our July deadline coming up quickly, we’re making sure our records are up to date so we can continue supporting Wes’ work however we can.
Here’s what we have on file for you — does this look right?
**_PETER | WES MOORE SUPPORTER RECORD_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **July Donor?** No — not yet! **Suggested Donation:** $5 **Personal Donation Link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250729-1?refcode=em20250729-1&personal;=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250729-1?refcode=em-20250729-1&refcode2=377_1086043_uLuIWw&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)**
---
_If you’ve donated recently, by check, or using a different email address, thank you! Our records take time to update, but we’re grateful for the support!_
Right now, our team is working hard to deliver results for Maryland despite the difficulty we face with the Trump administration.
On top of that, July is a historically slow time for fundraising. That means we need our most dedicated supporters to pull more than their weight to meet this particular goal.
**_We’re still about $15,000 short._**
Our records show that today would be your first-ever contribution in support of Wes Moore’s mission.
**[Since we’re in an uphill battle against this fundraising slump, there’s no better time for you to make your very first investment in our movement. Will you chip in $5 before our end-of-month deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250729-1?refcode=em-20250729-1&refcode2=377_1086043_uLuIWw&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250729-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250729-1&refcode2=377_1086043_uLuIWw&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)**
Thank you for your continued support.
— Team Moore
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250729-1&t=2&refcode2=377_1086043_uLuIWw&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=377%2E1086043%2EuLuIWw)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)

name: Nancy Mace for Congress
subject: You're invited: Mother of All Town Halls
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/youre-invited-mother-of-all-town-halls?e=ddc57b5ede)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# **THE MOTHER OF ALL TOWN HALLS
IS COMING TO YOU**
---
|
---
| Nancy Mace is hitting the road. Today, we’re launching a town hall tour across the great state of South Carolina:
**THE MOTHER OF ALL TOWN HALLS**. This is your chance to hear directly from Congresswoman Nancy Mace about what matters most to you:
* Eliminating the state income tax
* Securing the border
* Protecting women and children
* Putting South Carolina FIRST

President Trump needs an America First leader who will stand with him, fight for his agenda, and never bow to the swamp. 📍Sign up now to get invited when we come to your area:
---
| [GET TICKETS](https://nancymace.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f826f615915b06bdee33acac8&id=288d0150fc&e=ddc57b5ede "GET TICKETS")
---

name: National Gun Owner
subject: Win this 12 gauge Home Security Package, Electronic Alarm and Ammo!
body:
[Inside] You won’t believe how easy it is to handle this compact BULLPUP SHOT GUN in a home defense
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21703/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/2721938065d35b56d93b0f6e56a88f341b12b2e8). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21703/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/2721938065d35b56d93b0f6e56a88f341b12b2e8?message_id=IjFkMzNlODIwLTRlZWQtMDEzZS00MTU1LTE2OTU4ZmJlZTc2MEBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).

| |

---
|

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21703/6374453/493f6497b59cb40bf76742583cd293672a01909b/2721938065d35b56d93b0f6e56a88f341b12b2e8)
---
**Protect your home and get this one-of-a-kind collectible firearm, complete with Certificate of Authenticity.** The firearms demonstrated on GunStuff TV typically have less than 100 rounds shot through them and are highly prized by collectors. They come with signed, sealed, and embossed certificates to prove your ownership of these one-of-a-kind collectibles. But don’t put this one on a shelf, take it to the range, shoot it, and arm yourself against home invasion! **This semi-auto bullpup shotgun is only 30 inches long, making it perfect for home defense.** Shotguns are often the choice for home defense but are unwieldy. Not this Best Arms Bullpup. It is easy to handle and maneuver in tight spaces. It comes with one 5 round and one 10 round magazine, plus choke and choke wrench. **That’s not all, you get 100 shot shells to get you started!** **Plus we get you an electronic alarm to hang on your doorknob to alert you in case of intruders.** No home monitoring subscription required, just arm it and hang it on your doorknob for extra peace of mind. [Don’t miss out on this one-of-a-kind opportunity!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21703/6374453/493f6497b59cb40bf76742583cd293672a01909b/2721938065d35b56d93b0f6e56a88f341b12b2e8)

---

---

P.S. Want to see it in action? Here is the actual gun you will receive as seen on GunStuff TV:

Winner will be announced during our show Thursday August 7, 2pm ET on X. You do not need to be watching to win.

| Friend, Time is running out to secure tickets for our special event with Congressman Louie Gohmert.
What is stopping you from attending?
We understand that times are tough for many of us right now, so we have decided to extend this limited-time discount to you.
You can use code GOLDENAGE at checkout to recieve 50% off your tickets for this event.
That means general admission is just $75.
Congressman Gohmert and I will be disappointed if you don't attend this important evening, discussing the future of Colorado and our nation.
It is never too early to contribute in an election cycle, and right now is a critical time.
RINOS are actively primarying real conservatives all over the country, including here in Colorado.
Here in Colorado, the establishment is targeting our strongest conservative in the state legislature with a milk toast, RINO primary challenger.
Stephanie Luck of House District 60 has the best Liberty Score in the State House.
Instead of uniting behind Representative Luck, Pueblo County GOP Chair Michelle Gray, hand-picked by Christy Fidura, our Republican National Committeewoman, is primarying Representative Luck.
This is the kind of antics that we are talking about. We must unite behind the grassroots and do everything in our power to protect them.
PACs like ours stand in the gap, funding ads, mailers, and outreach, protecting real, conservative, grassroots warriors like Representative Stephanie Luck.
---
