name: Biz, NDRC
subject: What you need to know about redistricting and the 2030 Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We urgently need your support in the fight to protect the 2030 Census
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112353984/560230056/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=&emci=819d4d82-876c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=80730776-9d6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, This is urgent: Many of the fastest-growing states projected to gain congressional seats following the 2030 Census are already gerrymandered — and could be gerrymandered further if some Republicans get their way. That’s why I’m reaching out — below, I’m including key parts of a memo I issued to our top allies in this fight. This is what we’re up against, and it needs all of our attention. [**If you don’t have time to read the memo right now but would still like to support the NDRC’s democracy-saving work, please click here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112353986/560230060/958112375?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusMemo_email_202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_campaign=CensusMemo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112353992/560230065/958112375?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusMemo_email_202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_campaign=CensusMemo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=)
---
The growth that can be seen in states like Texas and Florida is the result of population growth specifically in diverse, metropolitan, Democratic-leaning urban centers. This trend suggests that the country is not seeing a uniform partisan shift, but instead a geographic redistribution of the population. This means that America is not reddening, blue areas are growing in conservative states. Although many may look at first glance as though there is a significant shift in population from historically blue states to historically red states, the truth lies deep in the details — America is changing.
---
[**Help protect fair maps and a fair count: Donate to the NDRC >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112353996/560230069/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusMemo_email_202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_campaign=CensusMemo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=)
**The NDRC’s Latest Apportionment Projections for 2030:**
The NDRC projects that nine congressional districts are likely to shift states due to reapportionment following the 2030 Census. Texas and Florida are expected to gain the most congressional districts. Meanwhile, Arizona, Idaho, Georgia, and Utah are all projected to gain one additional congressional seat per state. California is projected to lose three congressional districts and Illinois is projected to lose two. Meanwhile, New York, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and Rhode Island are all expected to lose one congressional seat per state.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112353998/560230073/958112375?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusMemo_email_202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_campaign=CensusMemo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=)
---
[**A fair, accurate census is critical to ensure fairness in our democracy: Donate to the NDRC >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112354001/560230075/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusMemo_email_202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_campaign=CensusMemo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=)
**Left Unchecked, Gerrymandering Could Intensify Due to Population Shifts:**
Maps in several of the fastest-growing states already unfairly — and illegally — dilute the people’s voting power, a problem that could worsen over the next decade as population shifts further exacerbate the impact of extreme partisan gerrymandering in these states. Florida and Texas demonstrate this threat.
---
In Florida, the state enacted a map that dismantled a long-standing Black opportunity district in the northern part of the state. The Secretary of State, the House of Representatives and the State Senate all admitted in legal filings that this map diminishes the voting power of Black Floridians.
---
In Texas, the congressional map is being challenged in court for violating the Voting Rights Act of 1965. That map increased the number of majority-white districts and reduced the number of districts where people of color can elect the candidate of their choice, despite the fact that 95% of the state’s population growth as reflected in the 2020 Census came from communities of color in the previous decade.
---
If the status quo remains, these states will likely enact maps that continue to ignore population trends and are drawn to try to lock in political power for Republicans despite those trends, resulting in even more egregious gerrymanders.
---
There’s a lot at stake in the months and years ahead. But this work is not far away — it’s happening right now. Threats to the census are real. Efforts to redraw congressional maps to give Republicans unearned power are happening in Texas, Ohio, and beyond.
**The NDRC is doing everything we can to elect Democracy Defenders in state-level races across the country who will fight for fair maps and push back against anti-democracy schemes.[But unlike the other side, we depend on grassroots donations to power this critical work — make a donation today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112354006/560230078/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusMemo_email_202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050729-NDRC-Tier1-CensusMemo_&utm_campaign=CensusMemo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNzMwNzc2LTlkNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5n3zVUcxs5pQNqE6k6H9mZzdaVHs234jlgR4cgNKip8=)**
Thanks for everything you do,
— Biz
John Bisognano
President
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: I will always stand up for our Jersey Values
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Since I was elected in 2016, my focus has stayed the same – finding bipartisan solutions to the issues affecting hardworking families here in New Jersey.

I'm a problem solver who has always reached across the aisle and worked to do what others said was impossible. I’ve spent my career solving problems and delivering real results — bringing new jobs to Jersey, fighting crime and for lower taxes and more affordable child care and health care, and passing commonsense gun safety, environment, reproductive freedom, and infrastructure laws.

But right now, hardworking Jersey families are paying the price for the recklessness we are seeing from extremists in Congress – they're struggling to afford food, utility bills, rent, and clothing for their kids.

We can't afford to wait. We need to find common ground, and get stuff done. That is the only way to combat attacks of extremism.

That’s why I plan to stay in the arena and tackle these issues head-on.

Because what we need are commonsense Democrats ready to solve problems for working families. Commonsense Democrats who are dedicated to getting stuff done and driving real, long-lasting change for Jersey families and communities.

I am fiercely determined to stand up for our Jersey Values, defend our cherished rights, and help families get ahead. But I can't do it alone. I need your help in this fight. Your support is crucial, and your voice matters.

If you’re with me, can you take a moment and sign on today to support my campaign? [https://go.josh4jersey.com/a/jg-intro-2507]

Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can share a commitment to our Jersey Values and will continue to fight against far-right extremists as we head into 2026.

– Josh Gottheimer
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-26-footer?amount=25] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. clean_body: [#] Since I was elected in 2016, my focus has stayed the same – finding bipartisan solutions to the issues affecting hardworking families here in New Jersey. I'm a problem solver who has always reached across the aisle and worked to do what others said was impossible. I’ve spent my career solving problems and delivering real results — bringing new jobs to Jersey, fighting crime and for lower taxes and more affordable child care and health care, and passing commonsense gun safety, environment, reproductive freedom, and infrastructure laws. But right now, hardworking Jersey families are paying the price for the recklessness we are seeing from extremists in Congress – they're struggling to afford food, utility bills, rent, and clothing for their kids. We can't afford to wait. We need to find common ground, and get stuff done. That is the only way to combat attacks of extremism. That’s why I plan to stay in the arena and tackle these issues head-on. Because what we need are commonsense Democrats ready to solve problems for working families. Commonsense Democrats who are dedicated to getting stuff done and driving real, long-lasting change for Jersey families and communities. I am fiercely determined to stand up for our Jersey Values, defend our cherished rights, and help families get ahead. But I can't do it alone. I need your help in this fight. Your support is crucial, and your voice matters. If you’re with me, can you take a moment and sign on today to support my campaign? [] Thank you for your continued support. Together, we can share a commitment to our Jersey Values and will continue to fight against far-right extremists as we head into 2026. – Josh Gottheimer Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. DONATE [] DONATE MONTHLY [] VOLUNTEER [] Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 [] [] []

subject: Can you throw us a bone?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025]

Hey, it’s Zuma, Jason Crow’s favorite pup and Chief Bark Officer! 🐾

I’ve been spending my days lounging in the shade, chasing a few tennis balls, and begging for treats — so it’s been a pretty doggone good summer so far, if you ask me.

But my dad said that the dog days of summer are coming up.

Those sound great to me, but turns out they’re actually pretty ruff. Every summer, grassroots donations slow down, and that makes it harder for him to keep up the work he’s doing to make life better for Coloradans.

While humans are off hiking, vacationing, or sitting in front of those spinny fans (jealous), fewer folks are donating online, even though my dad’s work hasn’t slowed down one bit.

So, I’ve gotta ask: can you throw us a bone and chip in today to help support my dad’s campaign? I hear we’ve got a big end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up ( whatever that means ). [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-july2025]

I’d chip in myself, but you know... the whole dog thing. I’ve got no thumbs and no money.

Thanks for stepping up! You deserve a treat. 🦴

Zuma Crow 🐾
Jason Crow for Congress

Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

subject: Sign the petition now to protect Social Security from cuts!!! >>

body:
We need your voice now!

| Hi team,

**We wanted to follow up because the GOP's efforts to weaken Social Security are not slowing down, and we can’t afford to stay silent.**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security.

But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — **slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned.**

This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. _That’s why we need your voice now._

**[Will you stand with us and sign the petition to defend Social Security before our deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112354895/560233388/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMzFkZC05ZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEiT2NR3fDbM2FxofCIV69Ean2ON0wsQAHj6O-RHDjU=&emci=ade70b37-8d6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23a131dd-9e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112354896/560233389/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMzFkZC05ZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEiT2NR3fDbM2FxofCIV69Ean2ON0wsQAHj6O-RHDjU=&emci=ade70b37-8d6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23a131dd-9e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

– The New Dems Team

**_FWD:_
\---------------------------------**
**When Trump was running for office, he vowed to not touch Social Security.**
**Clearly,_he lied:_**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112354897/560233390/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMzFkZC05ZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEiT2NR3fDbM2FxofCIV69Ean2ON0wsQAHj6O-RHDjU=&emci=ade70b37-8d6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23a131dd-9e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** [ADD YOUR NAME: DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112354898/560233391/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMzFkZC05ZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEiT2NR3fDbM2FxofCIV69Ean2ON0wsQAHj6O-RHDjU=&emci=ade70b37-8d6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23a131dd-9e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)
---
**Since elected, Trump’s administration has:**

\- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce
\- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors
\- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits

**This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security.**

_We need to fight back now_ – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security.

**[Please, add your name now to stand with New Dems as we fight to protect Social Security in Congress! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112354899/560233392/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ExMzFkZC05ZTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEiT2NR3fDbM2FxofCIV69Ean2ON0wsQAHj6O-RHDjU=&emci=ade70b37-8d6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=23a131dd-9e6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

Donald Trump promised not to touch Social Security. But once in office, he launched one of the most aggressive rollbacks in the program’s history — slashing staff, closing offices, and making it harder for seniors and people with disabilities to access the benefits they’ve earned. This is a direct attack on some of the most vulnerable members of our communities. That’s why we need your voice now. | Thanks for being part of this fight, – The New Dems Team FWD: \--------------------------------- When Trump was running for office, he vowed to not touch Social Security. Clearly,he lied: Since elected, Trump’s administration has: \- Cut the Social Security Administration’s staffing by 7,000 jobs – 12% of the workforce \- Closed regional offices, cutting off access to rural and disabled Seniors \- Created longer wait times for recipients to receive their benefits This is a de facto cut to a program millions of Americans rely on for financial security. We need to fight back now – when it’s still possible for us to reverse course and prevent further harm to Social Security and Americans who rely on it for financial security. Thank you, New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. We flipped 5 seats from red-to-blue, elected 17 new Members of Congress, and defended 22 NewDems Frontline members. Please, consider making a =. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: It's happening: The Republicans have SUBPOENAED ActBlue!!!
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072325_4]

name: Lily Tomlin
subject: Friendship bracelet? More like friendship zip-ties...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
This is what solidarity looks like.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112355462/560235200/1328794144?refcode=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzNWMyN2IxLTlmNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVjseBC0oAmViz7U1Gs9zTpP9sOHeg77BGB_4YR0JaI=&emci=90ddd037-946c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)
---
Hey — it's Lily Tomlin. You know, most friendships don't involve civil disobedience. But then again, most friendships aren't like mine and Jane's. We've marched together at the Women's March. We've stood on picket lines supporting striking writers and actors. We've protested pipelines threatening Indigenous communities. **And yes, we've been zip-tied and hauled away by police in front of the U.S. Capitol for demanding climate action.** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112355463/560235201/2105508926?refcode=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzNWMyN2IxLTlmNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVjseBC0oAmViz7U1Gs9zTpP9sOHeg77BGB_4YR0JaI=) _Photo by Ted Eytan._ **I’d do it again 100 times over, because the climate crisis is the fight of our lifetimes, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines while greedy corporations drive our planet to the brink of disaster.** **[Don’t worry... you don’t need to join us in jail to make an impact. Instead, chip in what you can to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC before their end-of-month deadline to join Jane and me in the fight to elect the next generation of climate leaders.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112355464/560235202/2105508926?refcode=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzNWMyN2IxLTlmNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVjseBC0oAmViz7U1Gs9zTpP9sOHeg77BGB_4YR0JaI=)** Being willing to put your body on the line for what you believe in changes you. It reminds you that some fights are worth any risk, and that real change requires people who won't back down. That’s why I couldn’t be prouder of my friend Jane. What she has built with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is one of the most inspiring examples I've seen of what true dedication to our planet looks like. They’re working around the clock to elect climate champions at every level of government, from city councils to Congress, who are brave enough to put people over profit and take the fossil fuel industry head-on. Scientists warn we have just a few years left to significantly reduce planet-warming carbon emissions to avoid the worst impacts of the climate crisis. **Every fraction of a degree the planet warms means deadlier heat waves, more catastrophic wildfires, and a heartbreaking loss of biodiversity. It’s why we need to act — _right now._** **[Jane tells me that her team is facing a big fundraising deadline on July 31st, and she needs your help. Will you join me in supporting Jane and the incredible work she’s doing by chipping in before their end-of-month deadline?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112355465/560235203/2105508926?refcode=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzNWMyN2IxLTlmNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVjseBC0oAmViz7U1Gs9zTpP9sOHeg77BGB_4YR0JaI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112355466/560235204/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzNWMyN2IxLTlmNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVjseBC0oAmViz7U1Gs9zTpP9sOHeg77BGB_4YR0JaI=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112355467/560235205/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.035c27b1-9f6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzNWMyN2IxLTlmNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVjseBC0oAmViz7U1Gs9zTpP9sOHeg77BGB_4YR0JaI=)

clean_body: This is what solidarity looks like. | Hey — it's Lily Tomlin. You know, most friendships don't involve civil disobedience. But then again, most friendships aren't like mine and Jane's. We've marched together at the Women's March. We've stood on picket lines supporting striking writers and actors. We've protested pipelines threatening Indigenous communities. And yes, we've been zip-tied and hauled away by police in front of the U.S. Capitol for demanding climate action. = Photo by Ted Eytan. I’d do it again 100 times over, because the climate crisis is the fight of our lifetimes, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines while greedy corporations drive our planet to the brink of disaster. = Being willing to put your body on the line for what you believe in changes you. It reminds you that some fights are worth any risk, and that real change requires people who won't back down. That’s why I couldn’t be prouder of my friend Jane. What she has built with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is one of the most inspiring examples I've seen of what true dedication to our planet looks like. They’re working around the clock to elect climate champions at every level of government, from city councils to Congress, who are brave enough to put people over profit and take the fossil fuel industry head-on. Scientists warn we have just a few years left to significantly reduce planet-warming carbon emissions to avoid the worst impacts of the climate crisis. Every fraction of a degree the planet warms means deadlier heat waves, more catastrophic wildfires, and a heartbreaking loss of biodiversity. It’s why we need to act — right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = This is the fight of our lives, and we cannot afford to lose. Let’s keep showing up, Lily Tomlin = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Deb Haaland
subject: The honest truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m asking for your support today
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3476%2E400544%2E8759ux)
This isn't the campaign update I wanted to send. But, I've always promised to be transparent with you, so here's the honest truth:
**I’m concerned.**
**Our grassroots fundraising has taken a bigger hit this summer than we anticipated. And as a result, we’ve had to _scale back_ our fundraising projections for July and August.**
At the same time, we’ve received word that a **Republican opponent has just officially launched his campaign.** We knew this would happen eventually, but the timing couldn’t be _worse._
We’re entering one of the most critical phases of this race, and we’re operating with _fewer_ resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country.
**As you know, I’ve never had the means to self-fund a campaign, and I don’t come from wealth.** What I do have is this grassroots team — tens of thousands of folks like you who believe that New Mexico needs a governor who understands what it means to struggle and who will fight fiercely for our home and our people.
Our average online donation this month is just $23. It’s that steady stream of people-powered support that allows us to build support across our beautiful state. It helps us pay for critical campaign investments, distribute literature, run digital ads, and connect with voters in the places that are too often ignored.
**The reality is this: If we don’t have strong fundraising numbers, Donald Trump and Republicans will put millions of dollars into flipping this state. We can’t let this happen.** That’s why this major fundraising slump is concerning, and it’s why I’m asking for your support today.
**My campaign could use your help as we work to meet our urgent $60,000 end-of-month goal. Will you donate $5 or your most generous donation today to power our campaign forward? You can use the link below to make sure your donation goes through instantly:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250729_1_eom?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250729_1_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250729-3476&refcode2=3476_400544_8759ux&akid=3476%2E400544%2E8759ux)
Thank you again for everything you’re doing to support our campaign. I know there is no obstacle we can’t overcome if we continue standing together.
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250729-1&t=2&refcode2=3476_400544_8759ux&akid=3476%2E400544%2E8759ux)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3476%2E400544%2E8759ux)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3476%2E400544%2E8759ux)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s about damn time.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

After nearly two years of Israel carpet-bombing and starving Palestinians,
the mainstream media and Democratic establishment are finally paying
attention and expressing concern over the humanitarian crisis in Gaza.
It’s about damn time.

But we won’t forget that just two weeks ago, some of the very same
Democrats who are now issuing concerned statements were shaking hands and
taking pictures with war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu.

While we welcome everyone on the right side of history in the fight for
peace and justice in Palestine, it’s too little too late for the tens of
thousands of Palestinians already killed by Israeli forces and those in
the final stages of malnutrition.

If Democrats suddenly speaking up about Gaza really want to start saving
lives, they need to utilize their power and take action NOW to stop more
Palestinians from being murdered.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250729-signup-stopthegazasiege?source=em20250729-36886&akid=36886%2E1203867%2E7PdVic ]Add your name to demand that every Democratic member of the House and
Senate stop funding Israel and end their blockade on Gaza →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250729-signup-stopthegazasiege?source=em20250729-36886&akid=36886%2E1203867%2E7PdVic ]Add Your Name

As Justice Democrats’ Rep. Rashida Tlaib pointed out, “Many of my
colleagues are expressing in words to me about the starvation, the forced
starvation of the people in Gaza and Palestinians there, but they're
lacking action, their votes don’t meet up with their words. It needs to
stop. They have the leverage.”

She’s right: they do have leverage, and it’s time for them to use it.

The United States has continued to provide BILLIONS of dollars in weapons
to Israel throughout its ongoing genocide against Palestinians. Our tax
dollars have aided and abetted their war crimes.

We need to make it loud and clear to our leaders in Washington that we
demand they stop funding genocide and force Israel to end the blockade and
allow the free flow of food, water, and medical supplies into Gaza to stop
this full-blown, man-made famine.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250729-signup-stopthegazasiege?source=em20250729-36886&akid=36886%2E1203867%2E7PdVic ]Sign our petition urging Congress to act fast and pressure Israel to
stop the siege now before more lives are lost.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250729-36886-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36886_1203867_7PdVic&akid=36886%2E1203867%2E7PdVic

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36886%2E1203867%2E7PdVic

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Senator Graham
subject: Enough is enough.
body:
Fellow American, since 2016, Democrats and the liberal media have been out to get President Trump. At every opportunity, the Left has relentlessly pursued every possible way to defeat and destroy him. Now, we are learning more and more about the Russian collusion hoax — the false conspiracy that President Trump had colluded with the Russians and that he was a “Russian Agent.” |
---
Fellow American,

**Since 2016, Democrats and the liberal media have been out to get President Trump.** At every opportunity, the Left has relentlessly pursued every possible way to defeat and destroy him.

Now, as the truth comes out about the Russian collusion hoax -- the false conspiracy that President Trump had colluded with the Russians and that he was a “Russian Agent.”

With every piece of information that gets released, it becomes more evident that the Obama Administration created the entire Russia collusion hoax to undermine the will of the American people...

_**Enough is enough.**_

**I am stepping up and taking action:**

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Everyone deserves care. Van Orden cut it.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112355739/560236338/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxZDhlZS1hMDZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbaNYq6ZWLWqxJm4RnOPuKrZSB_jrbdHSAq5Mv-6a5c=&emci=40e001da-ac6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=14c1d8ee-a06c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5944223)
Peter, My father’s cancer drugs cost _$1,800 dollars per month._ My mother’s hospital bill for a heart attack cost _$241,544.18._ My parents are like a lot of you and your families – already facing sky-high medical bills, even _with_ health coverage. **But to Derrick Van Orden, stories like these – the stories of real working people – mean nothing.** **That’s why he voted to kick thousands off of Medicaid, and hurt healthcare access for thousands more Wisconsin families. All so his richest billionaire donors could get _another_ tax break.** This is unacceptable. Everyone deserves care when they’re sick, Peter. It is a basic human right. **I’ll fight for your right to affordable, accessible healthcare. Derrick Van Orden won’t. And that’s just one of the reasons we have to flip this seat.** [**Help elect a representative who will fight to boost access to quality healthcare in our district. Ahead of our July deadline, chip in $3 today to help bring real support to WI-03.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112355741/560236340/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxZDhlZS1hMDZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbaNYq6ZWLWqxJm4RnOPuKrZSB_jrbdHSAq5Mv-6a5c=) Thank you, Rebecca | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112355746/560236343/-2083379535?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGMxZDhlZS1hMDZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GbaNYq6ZWLWqxJm4RnOPuKrZSB_jrbdHSAq5Mv-6a5c=)**

Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation.

Peter,

The radical-Left wants a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) -- **a government-controlled digital dollar** that lets the Deep State **track, trace, and control every single purchase you make.**

Sound extreme? _**It 's already happening in Communist China.**_

CBDCs are programmable and traceable, meaning a bureaucrat in Washington could one day _block your donation_ to a conservative group... _reject your purchase_ at a gun store... or _even freeze your account_ for voting the "wrong" way.

**This is Big Brother 's dream -- and freedom's nightmare.**

But Heritage Action is taking a stand. We're leading the fight for the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act, championed by America First leaders like Sen. Ted Cruz and House Majority Whip Tom Emmer.

---

Sound extreme? It 's already happening in Communist China. CBDCs are programmable and traceable, meaning a bureaucrat in Washington could one day block your donation to a conservative group... reject your purchase at a gun store... or even freeze your account for voting the "wrong" way. Dear Peter,
Thank you to the over 4,884 people who voted for their favorite wildlife photo. We’re excited to reveal the 2026 Save the Redwoods League calendar cover, featuring one of the redwood forest’s most captivating residents...
(drumroll please)
**🥁 🥁 🥁**
**The American Marten!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112356285/560237819/277163375?contactdata=kO8SXl//Iyykl5rDv6RA9sdKp61eVtbjknD/K0eVS2p2mklYOQVB0QVJGYvKtIvZHL+ck9GOu+oilnc3+ZcPY4jZ37iqHo1VVMAXG8c+AHLgVGy7MIRzuUqiuH/YQw3hy+5Doz942OB48mvY8XSh73835N4ejIPRkGYeq9f9Imc=&ms=26Calendar4_Image1&sourceid=1166591&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwNzZhZTBlLWEyNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZndKmPRQ7FqorQSEFY6HBaAvDbVllPxvsNspohvrCB0=&emci=c4155f27-cf6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3076ae0e-a26c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
From spawning salmon to soaring owls, the redwoods are alive with creatures who call this unique ecosystem home. This year’s winning image is a tribute to the wild hearts that make the forest sing.
Want to see these beautiful animals on your wall all year long?
**[Make a gift today, and we’ll send you the 2026 calendar as a thank-you for your support.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112356286/560237820/277163375?contactdata=kO8SXl//Iyykl5rDv6RA9sdKp61eVtbjknD/K0eVS2p2mklYOQVB0QVJGYvKtIvZHL+ck9GOu+oilnc3+ZcPY4jZ37iqHo1VVMAXG8c+AHLgVGy7MIRzuUqiuH/YQw3hy+5Doz942OB48mvY8XSh73835N4ejIPRkGYeq9f9Imc=&ms=26Calendar4_Link1&sourceid=1166591&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwNzZhZTBlLWEyNmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZndKmPRQ7FqorQSEFY6HBaAvDbVllPxvsNspohvrCB0=&emci=c4155f27-cf6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3076ae0e-a26c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)**
Your support helps protect not just the trees, but the entire ecosystem—from the smallest salamander to the mightiest elk. Every calendar symbolizes our mission to safeguard these forests and the wildlife that depend on them.
Thank you for helping us celebrate the wonder of the redwoods, and for standing with us to protect the future of these forests.
With gratitude,
Save the Redwoods League

clean_body: Presenting our 2026 calendar cover! Dear Peter, Thank you to the over 4,884 people who voted for their favorite wildlife photo. We’re excited to reveal the 2026 Save the Redwoods League calendar cover, featuring one of the redwood forest’s most captivating residents... (drumroll please) 🥁 🥁 🥁 The American Marten! From spawning salmon to soaring owls, the redwoods are alive with creatures who call this unique ecosystem home. This year’s winning image is a tribute to the wild hearts that make the forest sing. Want to see these beautiful animals on your wall all year long? Your support helps protect not just the trees, but the entire ecosystem—from the smallest salamander to the mightiest elk. Every calendar symbolizes our mission to safeguard these forests and the wildlife that depend on them. Thank you for helping us celebrate the wonder of the redwoods, and for standing with us to protect the future of these forests. With gratitude, Save the Redwoods League Calendar cover photo by RT Images / Shutterstock | ---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

name: (re: PBS) STUNNING NEWS via FFR
subject: “TRUMP’S REQUEST TO CUT FUNDING FOR PBS APPROVED BY HOUSE”
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n) **BREAKING NEWS:
[HOUSE APPROVES TRUMP'S REQUEST TO CUT FUNDING FOR _PBS_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65161?t=3&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n)** Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Marjorie Taylor Greene are fighting to defund programs like Sesame Street, _PBS,_ and _NPR._

They're claiming that Sesame Street brainwashes viewers and children with "communist" agendas and promotes "anti-American" views.

_**But now,**_**PBS _is fighting back. They just SUED the Trump administration!_**

[**_So we 're BEGGING you to stand with _PBS_ in the face of Trump's attacks!! Will you add your name to show your support for _PBS_ right now?!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65161?t=4&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65161?t=5&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n)
| [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH _PBS_ IN THEIR LAWSUIT AGAINST TRUMP >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65161?t=6&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n)
---

It's critically important we fight back. If we fail:

-> **FIRST:** Millions of Americans would lose access to educational and news programming.

-> **SECOND:** Beloved programs like Sesame Street and Curious George and local sports coverage would be SHUT DOWN.

-> **THIRD:** The GOP's hateful, anti-journalist agenda will gain momentum. Their lies about 'propaganda' inside public programming will continue dividing our country.

A top executive at _PBS_ put it perfectly: **" There's nothing more American than _PBS._ "**

We know that many Americans agree with us that we can't let the GOP's political games result in us losing educational staples like Sesame Street.
[**_We need every good Democrat to show their support for _PBS_ right away. Please, sign on before it's too late:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65161?t=7&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n)
[ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH _PBS_ IN THEIR LAWSUIT AGAINST TRUMP >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/65161?t=8&akid=23247%2E4449941%2EcRUI8n)
---
Thanks for taking action, friend.

_Fight For Reform_

_PBS_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight For Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Please help. I need you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

subject: Reaching out about George
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112357738/560243200/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNiMjRkYi1hNTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpGEnXOAkoKY2aaiK7hrcxMUBiOYjn-Y_OyJyu4iM7o=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112357739/560243201/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNiMjRkYi1hNTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpGEnXOAkoKY2aaiK7hrcxMUBiOYjn-Y_OyJyu4iM7o=)

Hi Peter, I’m Adam Schiff – U.S. Senator representing California.

I’m reaching out today about George Whitesides. I was proud to endorse him last year in his campaign to flip CA-27 blue, and now that he’s in Congress, he needs our support to stay there. **[Will you chip in $3 toward his fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112357742/560243202/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNiMjRkYi1hNTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpGEnXOAkoKY2aaiK7hrcxMUBiOYjn-Y_OyJyu4iM7o=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112357746/560243207/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNiMjRkYi1hNTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpGEnXOAkoKY2aaiK7hrcxMUBiOYjn-Y_OyJyu4iM7o=)****
---

George shocked the GOP establishment by becoming one of the only Democrats who flipped a Republican-held seat blue in November. It was a huge win for not only Southern California, but the entire nation.

George is using his unique background as former NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama to make our country a better place. He’s working hard to deliver results for CA‐27 while pushing back against the Trump Administration.

This has made him an immediate Republican target – he’s already faced attacks from national Republicans and their super PACs. He was also recently named to the DCCC’s “Frontline” program for the most at-risk incumbents in Congress. And just recently, a GOP challenger entered the race to unseat him.

We can flip the House majority next year and put an end to the MAGA chaos, but it’s impossible without keeping this seat blue. But we’re going to need your early support right now.

**[That’s why I’m asking: Will you join me in supporting George with a $3 donation today? Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and **turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them.** Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- _once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department_ \-- has **abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote.** Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. **We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote** under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. **[In the face of escalating attacks on our right to vote, increasing amounts of voter disinformation, and voter intimidation tactics on the rise – will you stand with us and chip in $25 today to help us defend voting rights?>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112357962/560244152/1498593520?refcode=072925_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA1YTZlZjFkLWE2NmMtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O5QIf9_CxjBva22J_-uzJRqvU0O5nPQZPXtuZnELMKg=)**

| | **We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump** , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "_During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates_." **We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration.** In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. clean_body: CNN: Inside Trump’s gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws| | | | | = Folks, what's happening is so clear: Trump and his MAGA cronies are fundamentally transforming our Department of Justice and turning it into a tool for undermining voting rights, not protecting them. Under his watch, the DOJ and it's Civil Rights Division -- once lauded as the "crown jewel" of the Justice Department \-- has abandoned its nonpartisan mission of defending the freedom to vote. Instead, it’s targeting election officials, amplifying debunked voter fraud claims, and trying to intimidate states into giving election data. Voter Action Project was founded in 2020 to fight for the use of mail-in ballots under a hostile Trump administration during a global pandemic. We're still fighting right now, working every day to protect our fundamental right to vote under yet another vicious administration that's looking to trample all over American citizens and our ability to make our voice heard through our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | We've tried to keep you updated on what's going on at DOJ under Trump , to make every American aware of MAGA's relentless campaign, executed by the department’s political leaders, to smear the work of the longtime attorneys, dismiss noncontroversial cases, and reassign career supervisors. CNN has reported that: "During President Donald Trump’s first term, DOJ officials forced voting section attorneys to abandon the more high-profile work that had often been opposed by conservatives. But the gutting of the section during Trump’s second administration goes far beyond that, according to former department attorneys and outside voter advocates." We know our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government as they try and consolidate their control forever. That's why we need to stand up and defend things from the outside. = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. = = Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). **Protect your home and get this one-of-a-kind collectible firearm, complete with Certificate of Authenticity.** The firearms demonstrated on GunStuff TV typically have less than 100 rounds shot through them and are highly prized by collectors. They come with signed, sealed, and embossed certificates to prove your ownership of these one-of-a-kind collectibles. But don’t put this one on a shelf, take it to the range, shoot it, and arm yourself against home invasion! **This semi-auto bullpup shotgun is only 30 inches long, making it perfect for home defense.** Shotguns are often the choice for home defense but are unwieldy. Not this Best Arms Bullpup. It is easy to handle and maneuver in tight spaces. It comes with one 5 round and one 10 round magazine, plus choke and choke wrench. **That’s not all, you get 100 shot shells to get you started!** **Plus we get you an electronic alarm to hang on your doorknob to alert you in case of intruders.** No home monitoring subscription required, just arm it and hang it on your doorknob for extra peace of mind. [Don’t miss out on this one-of-a-kind opportunity!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21704/6374453/493f6497b59cb40bf76742583cd293672a01909b/3331ebed8151ab5bd1ae3071b577c2c3a6af6c51)

name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE Urges Supreme Court to Affirm Candidate Standing in Ballot Deadline Challenge
body:
Case challenges Illinois’s law allowing absentee ballots to be received and counted up to 14 days after Election Day |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE Urges Supreme Court to Affirm Candidate Standing in Ballot Deadline Challenge** (July 29, 2025) – Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections (RITE) [has filed its third amicus brief](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=48c93c9b01&e=ea91f782ea) in support of the petitioners in _Bost v. Illinois State Board of Elections_.

This case challenges Illinois’s law allowing absentee ballots to be received and counted up to 14 days after Election Day. While the broader question involves whether this extended deadline violates federal law, the Supreme Court currently reviews whether candidates even have the right to challenge such voting rules in federal court. RITE, joined by RITE PAC, petitions the Supreme Court to clarify that candidates and political organizations harmed by such state election practices can seek judicial review. Courts have also too often applied a double-standard: granting standing to progressive groups and candidates challenging election rules, while denying standing to conservatives. RITE accordingly asks the Court to clarify a uniform standing doctrine ensuring candidates and organizations nationwide can protect their electoral interests.

“It should go without saying that candidates have legal standing to challenge unlawful election rules that directly impact how they run and win campaigns,” said RITE President Justin Riemer. “Yet states have for too long used standing as a shield to maintain unlawful election rules like the one Congressman Bost challenges. We urge the Supreme Court to affirm his standing in this case.” ###
---
| | | | | [](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=f89b31bbb9&e=ea91f782ea)

[](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=c266cd827d&e=ea91f782ea)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A betrayal of our neighbors
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112359209/560248724/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJhNzJjYi1hODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IXSDBt2GZhL4RDhn2JzLqHxDzw0uSg7lQ74IpRVd-0=)
Hi Peter, Every person who runs for public office throws their hat in the ring for a reason. I ran because after spending two decades keeping my neighbors safe ahead of severe weather, I wanted to continue being their trusted communicator. I wanted to keep my neighbors ahead of what could hurt them by fighting to make our communities more healthy, safe, and sustainable for generations to come. Well, this month we found out why too many Republicans in Washington decided to run: to betray our friends and neighbors, making the single largest cut to healthcare and food assistance in our history, so that their richest billionaire donors could get even more tax cuts. **Think about that. Nursing homes are closing, children are going hungry, sick people are being priced out of care... and they want to claim they’re representing you.** By now we’re all used to extremist Republicans choosing corporations over people, but I’ll be honest, this is a betrayal on a whole other level. Leaders should be bringing us together and protecting us, not leaving us to fend in the wild. [**We have to stand up NOW against the war on our livelihoods. Chip in $3 today ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline to help seal the Midwest and get a real worker-first congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112359210/560248725/896231865?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJhNzJjYi1hODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IXSDBt2GZhL4RDhn2JzLqHxDzw0uSg7lQ74IpRVd-0=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112359211/560248726/896231865?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJhNzJjYi1hODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IXSDBt2GZhL4RDhn2JzLqHxDzw0uSg7lQ74IpRVd-0=)
---
Unfortunately, we won’t flip the House without a fight. We learned this month that top Republican Super PACs will be spending tens of millions of dollars across swing districts to try and gaslight people into ignoring the damage being wreaked by the MAGA majority.
The risk here is imminent. We need to start pushing back before they can get any traction and send a message that our side has the upper hand.
[**I hope you can help me send that message, Peter. If you’re with me, please chip in $3 ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112359212/560248727/896231865?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJhNzJjYi1hODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IXSDBt2GZhL4RDhn2JzLqHxDzw0uSg7lQ74IpRVd-0=)

Moline, IL 61265
United States
---
clean_body: | = Hi Peter, Every person who runs for public office throws their hat in the ring for a reason. I ran because after spending two decades keeping my neighbors safe ahead of severe weather, I wanted to continue being their trusted communicator. I wanted to keep my neighbors ahead of what could hurt them by fighting to make our communities more healthy, safe, and sustainable for generations to come. Well, this month we found out why too many Republicans in Washington decided to run: to betray our friends and neighbors, making the single largest cut to healthcare and food assistance in our history, so that their richest billionaire donors could get even more tax cuts. Think about that. Nursing homes are closing, children are going hungry, sick people are being priced out of care... and they want to claim they’re representing you. By now we’re all used to extremist Republicans choosing corporations over people, but I’ll be honest, this is a betrayal on a whole other level. Leaders should be bringing us together and protecting us, not leaving us to fend in the wild. = | = Unfortunately, we won’t flip the House without a fight. We learned this month that top Republican Super PACs will be spending tens of millions of dollars across swing districts to try and gaslight people into ignoring the damage being wreaked by the MAGA majority. The risk here is imminent. We need to start pushing back before they can get any traction and send a message that our side has the upper hand. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the remaining days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.

clean_body: We have to make each day left in this campaign count. | = Derek, we have fewer than 100 days to go until Election Day! I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face. And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources. My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here. I've given voters my word: As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward. That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills. With the remaining days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to: ✅ Visit every corner of Virginia. ✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks. ✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen. It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = I'm grateful to have you on my team, Abigail Spanberger [content goes here] Forwarded this email? name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Heartbroken
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
Once again, I’m heartbroken that another community has to experience the pain and tragedy of gun violence.
Last night, a gunman wearing body armor and carrying an assault weapon opened fire in a Manhattan office building and killed 4 people, including a police officer.
Earlier the same morning, another gunman opened fire at a casino in Nevada, killing 3 people and wounding several others.
Gun violence is threatening Americans every single day. But when will enough be enough?
We cannot accept these horrific acts of violence as normal. We cannot let the gun lobby intimidate us from taking action. And we must _never_ stop raising our voices to demand that lawmakers step up to keep our communities safe.
At GIFFORDS, we will continue fighting for change and will not rest until we have a future free from gun violence.
One life lost to preventable gun violence is one too many. We must act.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

👋 Wait -- please take a second to read this... 🙏
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country.
But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
[**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-july25.6C3ikA&refcode=em250729-1-b&t=1&akid=10723%2E3935704%2EBpG0Vq)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-july25.6C3ikA&refcode=em250729-1-b&t=2&akid=10723%2E3935704%2EBpG0Vq)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10723%2E3935704%2EBpG0Vq) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: = | I just returned from a two-day, seven-county swing through southwest Minnesota. I met with county officials, small business owners, students, and community leaders. We talked about what’s working, and what’s keeping people up at night. One message came through loud and clear: Minnesotans care deeply about our democracy. They expect leaders to protect it. And they’re counting on all of us to step up. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | ****************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** | **************=************** This isn’t just about meeting a number. It’s about keeping Minnesota strong in the face of national threats: A federal court just ruled that private citizens can’t sue under the Voting Rights Act, a terrifying decision that could gut one of our nation’s most powerful civil rights laws. A dangerous executive order from President Trump aimed to force proof-of-citizenship to register to vote. Minnesota sued, and we helped win a major victory. And extremists in Congress are pushing laws like the SAVE Act that would deny millions of eligible Americans their right to vote. = Thanks for being part of this fight, Steve | = | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWvD99O_7A35PfMlVW_9V2tAY0VEZEVK-a8ZgTrw_sl1H8BctRRHyPRVBdzgyOPXaNAH6niQZKFz7YIOHBtPkJngqCZwY7pcvIVjGrbPXsTTBPwI4qxc1671IhYSbRfuWAx3KLPn_jbaW-Wb5hYetc74fHeY4zXWPHWU8IhlvgskWBTqSKkLmZ2gdDH5vIbJUM_PZbRx7lXTTKabajeXYZaw/4il/sfsZhFmFSPGqcfVhw4dk4w/h0/h001.Ag0atgHKTdlWo7t8xSVLNJGQtnxNSG5PC-cOl7-miyE)

Friend, Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. Masked agents have chased families of farmworkers, who’ve described feeling “hunted.” One farmworker recently died during a raid. Immigrants’ lives are not disposable! In violation of the Constitution, federal agents are racially profiling people at worksites, courthouses, and schools. They’re also unconstitutionally kidnapping people without warrants or probable cause. **We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors and protect our shared constitutional right to due process—which applies regardless of immigration status.** [**Please sign on to demand city, state, and federal officials defend our neighbors from lawless, masked immigration agents!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9fOFO9Ep3VkdJnRDVIqGFvaqCth2lqnjk9cBCyzeSZJJyZWGfTDKhBcvQepHY-5ytjKb2ZygpGPvBY6IVnhozvQtsVXxL2F4l4su6mJ_JWctPEKyHvKq4oaNH4-EIZF7OdDhdbavwz53Um901SzofVElajrcJ6Rf954XlbTCzRn449hOcrwegbqSC93bkX1VPHbD62N0soa0bOQOygEtWzcOvyefL9r4kYH2XfbH88x2oVl5sOfQ1kc4d-4CYzbPr4eA1VX0XX6T6y-Yz8QXFM5HQMUwKrVNMPvz9Ekv_7hFnfRKgksbfzYAm4RaRtV2aaYfM0rqvJXRcpPsZbFN1dOvb_HrDkoJTifZvOVFeLJ3wvVebKsX6WxW_TJkd1_lex1YM0l9g2a_U0-Kcni5ETQ/4il/sfsZhFmFSPGqcfVhw4dk4w/h1/h001.RlMsfJbJ4j5AAwlbrxXXvrsFeLg7vk8ayDRFN-0O4es) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9fOFO9Ep3VkdJnRDVIqGFvaqCth2lqnjk9cBCyzeSZJJyZWGfTDKhBcvQepHY-5ytjKb2ZygpGPvBY6IVnhozvQtsVXxL2F4l4su6mJ_JWctPEKyHvKq4oaNH4-EIZF7O-EM7r93zp1yCI5U1fuXgJ-GwgEQ207Ezl8k_sn5lyj4Ne2skfjRJMJW87WLcnqzMDTz4MgNsZ9twylQMRDRB_Vll2_SF6C2bCu_PUg-bJU9f7j7UJz5Uig_XVmggmjgjIb0p4O4avQrZ8o7Fd8XQFHxtFBIFHPG4ZmWmxy0K67DebY4XDGI30RcMF1uD_JGbh0jsyNigf5RzW4Mh59LYwRUrPWGuoNc5YZiXCh-5oU2EVT6LccrHeybb_XjgdYycIUHfMpw7WEPnxsfdS-AIRQ/4il/sfsZhFmFSPGqcfVhw4dk4w/h2/h001.9juIznABhgMnDWQ-LEd31wBRGbYbr1r6-DgvZn1cjmU)

In my state of Michigan, a woman who reported her assault to the police was then sent to ICE detention and she’s about to be deported.1
Even in Democrat-led cities and states, police and other government officials regularly share data and coordinate with ICE. Right now, organizations are mobilizing people to ask their local sheriffs to **refuse to cooperate with ICE’s unconstitutional kidnapping and detention of immigrants**.2
People can also push their city leaders to **limit local law enforcement’s cooperation with ICE** or other federal immigration enforcement agencies. This is one component of many sanctuary policies, which can also include provisions **preventing immigration detention centers** or **allowing immigrants to report crimes to the police without fear of deportation**.3
State-level officials can also pass or implement **stronger sanctuary policies, create statewide legal defense funds for immigrants, pass policies to protect immigrants’ civil and constitutional rights** , and more.
And at the federal level, **members of Congress must use our oversight role to hold immigration agencies accountable** for violations of our laws and our rights.
For example, my colleagues have introduced multiple policies to force federal immigration agents to stop hiding their faces and badges—including the _No Secret Police Act_ , the _No Anonymity in Immigration Enforcement Act_ , and the _Combating Deceptive Immigration Enforcement Practices Act_.
I promise to continue fighting for a just immigration system and pushing to abolish ICE. But we urgently need people to press their representatives at all levels of government, asking them to do all they can to defend immigrants and citizens who are at risk of racial profiling.
[**Please sign on today and demand your elected representatives at all levels of government defend our neighbors from lawless, masked immigration agents!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9fOFO9Ep3VkdJnRDVIqGFvaqCth2lqnjk9cBCyzeSZJJyZWGfTDKhBcvQepHY-5ytjKb2ZygpGPvBY6IVnhozvQtsVXxL2F4l4su6mJ_JWctPEKyHvKq4oaNH4-EIZF7Owvr9ctvJcSfzrq7PL8usW8Jg76ohOBP189oLcJa3lWzfikuUop1lHI8RNvec0IiR7qVOlg1_d5WOgvh7-l9hjQqNhoMH22F2GkaQEe8KscJLFuSDJD_VGiftBz8-ogEVXi5ct7R8-GTO5gT_2YURckD0-lSb49Usq77vxvbrqZvCmN9loZdrhZTf_JrBQOwqRlfb8iM10eh0Xld4lOmQ-heqA4jLTaOVP9JIe3cu4Lt0CZ4oBlFJJEp5_JEjNvbJh1r72ncN7zXFz6mSJbUjPA/4il/sfsZhFmFSPGqcfVhw4dk4w/h3/h001.7Dtr91ncCSFz623BDr_WphNRGWdDZN2IQ5dD5zkDA7o)

Thank you for taking action. Instead of sending hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars to expand ICE (as part of Trump’s Big Budget Betrayal), our government must dismantle ICE and invest in what communities need. Together, we’ll keep working to make a better world with dignity and safety for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida
