clean_body: Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors. | | | Friend, Violent ICE raids are terrorizing our communities. Masked agents have chased families of farmworkers, who’ve described feeling “hunted.” One farmworker recently died during a raid. Immigrants’ lives are not disposable! In violation of the Constitution, federal agents are racially profiling people at worksites, courthouses, and schools. They’re also unconstitutionally kidnapping people without warrants or probable cause. We need to fight back at all levels to protect our neighbors and protect our shared constitutional right to due process—which applies regardless of immigration status. | In my state of Michigan, a woman who reported her assault to the police was then sent to ICE detention and she’s about to be deported.1 Even in Democrat-led cities and states, police and other government officials regularly share data and coordinate with ICE. Right now, organizations are mobilizing people to ask their local sheriffs to refuse to cooperate with ICE’s unconstitutional kidnapping and detention of immigrants.2 People can also push their city leaders to limit local law enforcement’s cooperation with ICE or other federal immigration enforcement agencies. This is one component of many sanctuary policies, which can also include provisions preventing immigration detention centers or allowing immigrants to report crimes to the police without fear of deportation.3 State-level officials can also pass or implement stronger sanctuary policies, create statewide legal defense funds for immigrants, pass policies to protect immigrants’ civil and constitutional rights , and more. And at the federal level, members of Congress must use our oversight role to hold immigration agencies accountable for violations of our laws and our rights. For example, my colleagues have introduced multiple policies to force federal immigration agents to stop hiding their faces and badges—including the No Secret Police Act , the No Anonymity in Immigration Enforcement Act , and the Combating Deceptive Immigration Enforcement Practices Act. I promise to continue fighting for a just immigration system and pushing to abolish ICE. But we urgently need people to press their representatives at all levels of government, asking them to do all they can to defend immigrants and citizens who are at risk of racial profiling. Thank you for taking action. Instead of sending hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars to expand ICE (as part of Trump’s Big Budget Betrayal), our government must dismantle ICE and invest in what communities need. Together, we’ll keep working to make a better world with dignity and safety for all. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. You can find Know Your Rights information and other resources for immigrants . 1 2 The #DisappearedInAmerica campaign has a “Talk to Your Sheriff Toolkit” . 3 , Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Josh Weil
subject: Over a quarter of Floridians just lost their health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This is personal, Friend. My name is Josh Weil, I am the Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida, and I had to message you once I saw this.
More than a quarter of people enrolled in Florida’s health care plan have been dropped. That’s not a policy choice, that’s a crisis.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/794238514B645771524A347A3332746B414130346D72716F442B7546364935497865386F6E786950665665416E342B6C77414357652F78474569534F34633143/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-29%20at%201.50.01%E2%80%AFPM.png]
I’ve spoken to too many Floridians who are already choosing between groceries and their prescriptions. Now, many are facing life-threatening decisions without any safety net at all.
Let me be clear: no one should lose their health care so that billionaires can get tax breaks. But under Ashley Moody and her allies, that’s exactly what’s happening.
From gutting Medicaid to rubber-stamping $450 million on Alligator Alcatraz, they’ve shown us what their priorities are: cruelty and corruption disguised as governance.
I’m not in this race to be polite about that. I’m in it to fix it.
And it starts with you:
Will you join in the fight? All we need is $15 today to reach out and connect with thousands of Floridians in need of help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?refcode=NTLJUL23]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
This campaign is about restoring basic dignity to people’s lives, starting with the right to see a doctor without going bankrupt.
If you’ve ever had to wait to fill a prescription because of the cost...
If you’ve ever stayed sick because you couldn’t afford the copay...
If you’re tired of being treated like a budget line instead of a person:
Then I’m asking you to stand with us, because this is the fight.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
Josh Weil for US Senate
5800 Beach Blvd. STE 203-337
Jacksonville, FL 32207
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Aaf_6fc98kqPfx3FNr4mUQ2?unsubscribedata=c9VlLGx%2BbGgwGB89nS8b4JexlVj6jli3laJC8iBAYYnAtoQPf%2F%2BOGr%2FTp9bdNSvJdfzpYMz4nYEIpZkECA5CWkJOahLgj4IH5%2BAH8lNCzQKQv0SUWsQcGPBKE85fV8%2Bfk0Vet%2Fb6DxcJKltrmXpyGt771oFNc0qOvzHJZJn2Eo7Lu0nCnHW2CQG0BUntUuzL2xKZC%2B5bmpQ8PuGCHm7fHWxJbn3%2BSmZc7nNsJYogHH%2BbOAzVcqzlEJU%2BUqAEOXWh7KLWoK0kmo3%2B4Q8HDsYi6OalOnkdMT56DZBykYmffTinPC8ZL2vEm7%2FeKhuXj9VlTbmwFRsBTDgFsQ%2BriICndFFhIBaPguNhd0K%2Fy%2FN3M3W6JhqrDe8fBos17hsNjWS01BO09%2B45jUEiHow7bP61o3F4nL9rWTeJiwJDYCRTpvX%2Fhn1AR1z9k3tfBJYCkwuR .

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: Our last chance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
There are only a few days left. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=589263917d&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a0e36b39d72d/our-last-chance?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45569a8b39&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

We only have a few days left until the General Election officially begins! This is exciting, and I can't wait to kick off our General Election Campaign to show voters why pragmatic, common-sense leadership is essential for King County's future.

But with the August Primary just days away, this is our **__last opportunity__** to raise funds before the General Election begins. Can you [chip in a small donation](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45ae97beaa&e=77eef70c61) today to help us start strong? **\---------------**
**[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=ca89555f6f&e=77eef70c61)**
**\----------------** This isn't just our last chance to give before the General Election.
It could also be:
* **_OUR LAST CHANCE_** to keep a common-sense, pragmatic voice representing SE King County on the Council.
* **_OUR LAST CHANCE_** to stop taxes from rising at unprecedented levels.
* **_OUR LAST CHANCE_** to stop radical anti-police policies from spreading beyond downtown Seattle into our suburban and rural neighborhoods.

**_There 's no time like the present. [Donate now](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=988bcbd4dc&e=77eef70c61) before the General Election begins!_**
Friend**,** I'm not trying to sound alarmist--but you deserve to know how high the stakes are in this election. Every day, more reckless proposals are coming out of downtown Seattle that could raise your cost of living and jeopardize the safety of your community.

King County needs pragmatic voices to hold the line against these extremist policies. This is **__YOUR CHANCE__** to **[make a difference](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=5d3dac6765&e=77eef70c61)** and help save our region for the next generation!

Thank you so much for your support!
Team Dunn
---

Bellevue, WA 98015

Robert Garcia

However, if we win the House in 2026, we will have more power to uncover Trump’s lies and hold his administration accountable. = = The American people deserve the truth. Together, we will hold Trump accountable. Thanks for using your voice, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . The Los Angeles media market is one of the most expensive in the country – running ads here costs up to 16 TIMES more than other congressional districts. Republicans know this, and they’re starting early to maintain a presence on the airwaves here.

They also know that I won this seat in November by 653 votes. Their three-seat majority in the House is hanging by a thread, and flipping CA-45 back could be the win they need to keep control.

clean_body: | = At the end of this email, I’m going to personally ask you to = to boost my re-election effort. This toss-up race is heating up fast, so I hope you’ll lend me a minute of your time to explain. Earlier this month, a powerful GOP group launched a $5 million ad blitz targeting this seat. Last week, our race landed on Hotline’s rankings of the most competitive races in the country. And more attacks are guaranteed to come my way. Here’s why this matters at this stage of the race: The Los Angeles media market is one of the most expensive in the country – running ads here costs up to 16 TIMES more than other congressional districts. Republicans know this, and they’re starting early to maintain a presence on the airwaves here. They also know that I won this seat in November by 653 votes. Their three-seat majority in the House is hanging by a thread, and flipping CA-45 back could be the win they need to keep control. So, this race is one of the most expensive in one of the most competitive seats nationwide. I’m facing an uphill battle in my first re-election campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I want you to know that despite these challenges, I’m not deterred. I’m unafraid of the increasing Republican attacks I’m facing for standing up for the communities I was elected to represent. So thanks in advance for chipping in, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Fellow Conservative,

A little over a year ago, Joe Biden dropped out of the race for President of the United States, and Kamala Harris began her rapid ascent to the top of the political world.

Kamala Harris was woefully unprepared to be her party's standard-bearer, and luckily for you and me, America thought so, too. **As a former Navy SEAL, I've dodged my fair share of bullets, so believe me when I tell you that as a nation, we've never dodged a bigger bullet than Kamala Harris.**

However, the progressive movement that propelled her onto Biden's 2020 ticket shows no signs of slowing.

The Democrats that you grew up with are dead.

You'd think there would be more soul-searching for a party that twice lost the highest prize in politics to Donald Trump. Yet, that doesn't seem to be the case. Just last week, famed political commentator James Carville called the Democrat Party a **"cracked-out clown car."** Isn't that saying something when your harshest critic is one of your most famous members?

I'm looking for your help here, Fellow Conservative. I'm a former Navy SEAL and first-time political candidate running as a Republican in Minnesota. My likely opponent is Tim Walz's lieutenant governor, someone who considers herself even more progressive than AOC.

If you have a minute and a half to spare right now, **[would you please answer a few questions that my campaign will use to help me tailor my messaging as we continue to meet and connect with conservatives around the state?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8add4981780e431587cda8aa95fcd827&_e=oNMqx46Cy1rHSfAnzYCqYgbq3MOySHaeq4Sa9UAWhogOT5a6SWpalei756iJLmw8v_wWFQZW6k7H4y05L1Pwuz0SnK2PC0ivWvmMsuHpZd3eOpLyJnisoc9Eld6Qk9gS7GG9RY4oJM9lwWBGWYkvMbw6sKJQUHm7svtCJdQYbMYDh6ZkvL7Weqz5-X2_W3xL-c_mIX5OoJSkYZB08KWC7HEBE5ZYJiddSxR5PVKkz2INwJH0D9oAwKSDrLUDZ0PrXo84bqJRSLqaIt9_cgt0BqJmsJ8x-dvBisM-vsjllbIZ7IZoji2zZKMi63ISD40cfi2CtfYKq0nR7aOlRd6dOK8RAvO5-1iwXnUK4reFa4UlmJMZwnUH8GQSvkgtB-EsHrMZg_FcWgDyTkaL58zs_gfOhhY5U42pRsVTa591CDaHE1jzRz8xdJran4Lz5B9QvbJHgVI53Ex7Sd2zX-8r2xijhlCoXHsHfNFNUdnr43CmZ3CGQoPdTiUW7P2b2BQ9AHJ7ybcaIv2hkk_l1rDTLgZ9hAFny1unghm8xls5yF_cWgDoVfO9fG_QBWT656gtTwAkhZyjXmF0BGnC5BxArQo7k2rYSGJGGJLj-pfTGFolEiJfRifm3nBLpDZ4ghOn_rU-xzsKv1mNjb0irbPGwUOwiEHZ8vdJSiiGWJlC_IBPdUCCfYlD669RsR4T-oIk8aBcfS7GdcgI640WMs-lWuGQfuAdA20_4hzQU_dI09gTTUS1LC5PY5aL3YOycsOil2bdaR8-nFCoZSc6cntRzmre2yXMPUVTVHCyh8Y5qQE%3D)**

I'm hoping to find out from your survey response: Are you looking for more common-sense conservatives to join Ted Cruz and Rand Paul in the United States Senate, or are you content with the cracked-out clown car carrying AOC, Tim Walz, Kamala Harris, and New York mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani?

[**Begin Adam's Survey**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8add4981780e431587cda8aa95fcd827&_e=oNMqx46Cy1rHSfAnzYCqYgbq3MOySHaeq4Sa9UAWhogOT5a6SWpalei756iJLmw8v_wWFQZW6k7H4y05L1Pwuz0SnK2PC0ivWvmMsuHpZd3eOpLyJnisoc9Eld6Qk9gS7GG9RY4oJM9lwWBGWYkvMbw6sKJQUHm7svtCJdQYbMYDh6ZkvL7Weqz5-X2_W3xL-c_mIX5OoJSkYZB08KWC7HEBE5ZYJiddSxR5PVKkz2INwJH0D9oAwKSDrLUDZ0PrXo84bqJRSLqaIt9_cgt0BqJmsJ8x-dvBisM-vsjllbLPETAaCi9WurSGbotj6-776N5y9JOzYzlhlCywiPs7K3F-5FXgou6c56yZe6JG_Xq2PlHIxAvgcivapVl0MeTz3mEuoRhXCFryTJgK9brR0FiRWmiK1vz0HDYaJx1g_O0k8qeV9Qfg_SN9sE86UvKOP5jD8BkCY6_6Zktu881SzYr847d9QkbcjVCLcoP5ZFAUXh62bs-vp4g6iM7eiOdblDjCGW_e16UUO72ve6rR1AfNGFhftvuduPufz76L82bVniHiSOhuJi6-muqLunuSGkjd5ojoRYs7i1V8l6fBWzN5WtCo-2ZuVSLSKUytpCulUmKPgItbr5J55-K1DGSPFFAbVDb9c6nuapPnAJe74POh5HPba7vjsPq61VWVlepFnlZJrVstvQClZwLOhJCpaNmUg5b3kIYxDhvDwf04FSAf8idpbkQu6jfxuE_QKrj8Pe8nej4gfiGSqcdWzpuFq96QsDXKgB6tErPXgGwnSwSKd3zDfrClomFlm2_ToOk%3D)

**Adam Schwarze**

Republican for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

name: Rachel Barnett
subject: Our moment to build momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Hi Peter,
It’s Rachel Barnett, Maxine Dexter’s Finance Director.
It’s crunch time for our end-of-month fundraising push, and I know your inbox is probably flooded—so I’ll get to the point.
This deadline is the first real test since Trump signed the Big, Ugly Bill and covered up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein.
It’s despicable. It’s un-American.
We need a leader who puts people above greed and politics—someone like Maxine Dexter.
Maxine’s commitment runs deep. She took an oath to care for every patient and every Oregonian, no matter their background, income, or politics. She’s fighting for a future where everyone has a chance to thrive—not one where a privileged few hold all the cards.
But she can’t fight alone.

clean_body: We're not backing down | = Peter, FIRST: Since taking office, Trump has taken aim at political opponents and tried to dismantle the organizations that oppose his agenda. THEN: Trump instructed his Department of Justice to investigate ActBlue — the platform powering small-dollar donations for progressive candidates and causes (including EMILYs List!). NOW: ActBlue is still under heavy scrutiny from the Trump Department of Justice and GOP-led House committees. Just last week, the House GOP issued new subpoenas to the fundraising platform! **= | = Let's be clear: Trump and the MAGA right know their governing is unpopular, so silencing our community is their strategy. It's how an absolute ruler operates. They try to break the tools we use to organize, communicate, and stand against them. name: Caroline [via Team Ruiz]
subject: What we’re all up against
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
We can’t let Trump’s allies buy this seat after everything they’ve done.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=FfQMFlT6cq2Amvi6jUkds%2BAHQR0bnH2Uf1lRO8oeQ7o5uze1lcDc3DXvB9W8Nhh%2FvN9%2B7EJCd%2F1QPwwvCcAYeb0jKj2p5pfyrGEW0l%2Fqsjje2cI%2FZ2gHy%2Bb9kEIxBFQKSlvTj2eXTuTM3PGOMXmHvi57NvFLYQcQr%2Bh0edNXIFXBwyzwH%2BpgyCeWJmEBfmy%2F3bxDclHSNa53mdiCI6qP8P5uTlFj3g%2BNbsXAQCFGYl5IgYfNVn1E%2BMbyRcniWOYySg2wnJrVux9DNoEzuWLAFNsKFUY9YmNZtb8UfRYQ%2FcH6ES7DnsTZDpEIP5jlJgggAiUhPF%2FczzwHTTU0DOiRnNlP2Ttq9Jat1WLBaxuNnMkQPPgSE4Z3cY30i8FwoSlKpJ3dznpFXP7twkMIR0RF5n5oDsIVGdKxLgJ7vMKvoHEl2KRb%2Faz%2BMW6dHDoZxhGV)
---
| |
---
It's Caroline. I want to level with you about what’s happened in just the last few weeks:
1. Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress passed a budget that **slashed Medicaid and SNAP** just to hand out more tax breaks to Trump and his billionaire friends.
2. Republicans **voted to defund public media** — gutting NPR and PBS, wiping out local news, critical emergency weather alerts, and educational programming.
3. **And what’s next?** We don’t know — but if the last few weeks are any sign, it won’t be good for families in CA-25.

Republicans are doing everything they can to serve Donald Trump and his rich allies at the expense of everyone else. They’re outraising Democrats nationwide and pouring money into races like this one to lock down their control of Congress and clear the way to further Trump’s dangerous agenda. **We can’t sit back now.** We need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal of $6,000 by Thursday at midnight — not just to stay in this fight, but to show Republicans we won’t sit back while they inflict this much damage on our communities. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: We can’t let Trump’s allies buy this seat after everything they’ve done. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Caroline. I want to level with you about what’s happened in just the last few weeks: 1. Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress passed a budget that slashed Medicaid and SNAP just to hand out more tax breaks to Trump and his billionaire friends. 2. Republicans voted to defund public media — gutting NPR and PBS, wiping out local news, critical emergency weather alerts, and educational programming. 3. And what’s next? We don’t know — but if the last few weeks are any sign, it won’t be good for families in CA-25. Republicans are doing everything they can to serve Donald Trump and his rich allies at the expense of everyone else. They’re outraising Democrats nationwide and pouring money into races like this one to lock down their control of Congress and clear the way to further Trump’s dangerous agenda. We can’t sit back now. We need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal of $6,000 by Thursday at midnight — not just to stay in this fight, but to show Republicans we won’t sit back while they inflict this much damage on our communities. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Caroline Gonzalez-Brine Finance Director for Dr. Raul Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Governor Abbott and Texas Republicans are surrendering Texas to President Trump, moving ahead with plans to redraw our state’s congressional maps to meet his demand that they destroy five democratic seats to get new Republican seats in the U.S. House of Representatives in next year’s midterm elections.
We are fighting back. Texans have been protesting, calling, testifying and rallying to say NO to Trump’s Texas takeover. Join us!
https://www.mobilize.us/hcdp/event/820888/ [https://www.mobilize.us/hcdp/event/820888/]
This Saturday, we will have a Day of Action [https://www.mobilize.us/hcdp/event/820888/] to help us reach TX-07 residents and make sure they know what is happening and how they can help fight back:
WHO
Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher
Harris County Commissioner Rodney Ellis (Precinct 1)
Harris County Commissioner Adrian Garcia (Precinct 2)
Other Special Guests TBA
And YOU!
WHEN
Saturday, August 2, 2025
9:00 a.m. Kickoff
WHERE
Team Lizzie Campaign HQ
Sign up here: https://www.mobilize.us/hcdp/event/820888/ [https://www.mobilize.us/hcdp/event/820888/]
Not able to attend in person?
You can still help by forwarding this email to other people who care about protecting our democracy and encouraging them to join us . We will be in touch soon with more ways you can help.
Team Lizzie and Texas Democrats are taking a stand to protect Texans, Americans, and democracy itself. We will continue to fight the Trump Texas Takeover, and are grateful to be in the fight with you.
Thanks and we hope to see you there!

Here's my LATEST submission to the [Idaho DOGE portal](https://substack.com/redirect/c49b34f6-be78-48e6-b289-170417280857?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...
**RE: IDLA**
The [Idaho Digital Learning Alliance](https://substack.com/redirect/f090b243-9625-4d6d-ac79-d9c2fa370faf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (IDLA) is an undefined "governmental entity" with little accountability or oversight, since its vague statute hasn't been updated since 2008.This lack of clarity lets IDLA run unchecked, jacking up costs and overstepping its role while choking private market innovation.
_**It's time to dissolve IDLA and let the private sector provide cheaper, clearer, and better online education solutions.**_
IDLA's fiscal mess is obvious...
It gets $430 per enrollment from the state, plus $75 per credit from schools, totaling over $500 per student per course (way more than private providers' rates of about $150 per enrollment). This skewed funding pushes districts to pick IDLA over cheaper, competitive options, wrecking market efficiency.
IDLA's budgeting isn't transparent, with enrollment projections off by thousands and no requirement to use cash reserves before begging for more state funds. Plus, districts and IDLA get paid for the same students, especially for in-school supplemental courses, costing taxpayers millions.
On the content side, IDLA's lack of accountability is worrying. Most of its courses, except AP or dual credit, don't have external quality checks, and incentives pay teachers for students scraping by with a 70% grade, no matter the actual learning. Since it's not a school, IDLA dodges laws like [H377](https://substack.com/redirect/424685ee-a21a-4150-bedb-88bda44d0c8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (2021) and the most recent bill ([S1198](https://substack.com/redirect/2564533c-5e5c-40f3-af76-285caf4dd652?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), possibly ignoring DEI rules. I brought this to light in September 2024 when a student in my district told me they were assigned an essay on "white privilege"... in an English class hosted by CWI!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9318eaab-256c-4d3f-a4a9-87c1282c6ac9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This was (is?) part of an IDLA English class for dual credit high schoolers
IDLA's board, mostly school district customers, doesn't have enough independent oversight which weakens accountability. Also troubling is how IDLA's operations mix public and private roles.Its roughly 80 employees get PERSI benefits like public school staff but aren't held to state salary schedules or standards.
_**Contract teachers, often full-time public school educators, earn $2625 to $5100 per course plus bonuses, sometimes during school hours, and these payments aren't reported in salary averages.**_
Shockingly, IDLA even slaps "non-compete" and "non-solicitation" agreements on teachers, acting like a private company, not a state entity.The private market can do online education better.
Private providers offer courses at a fraction of IDLA's cost, with more flexibility and innovation.
**Potential Solution:**
By dissolving IDLA, Idaho can redirect funds to level the playing field, letting districts contract with private providers at competitive rates. This'd boost transparency, cut costs, and ensure quality through market competition, instead of propping up an unaccountable, outdated entity.
**TLDR:** Dissolve IDLA, amend funding statutes to support private providers, and let the market meet Idaho's online education needs with greater efficiency and accountability.
» [Submit your idea to the Idaho DOGE portal here](https://substack.com/redirect/c49b34f6-be78-48e6-b289-170417280857?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Peter, since 2016, Democrats and the liberal media have been out to get President Trump. At every opportunity, the Left has relentlessly pursued every possible way to defeat and destroy him. Now, we are learning more and more about the Russian collusion hoax — the false conspiracy that President Trump had colluded with the Russians and that he was a “Russian Agent.” |

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Trump using nuclear safety money to redecorate his plane. (Maddow & NYT)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump use nuclear safety funds for his Air Force One vanity project](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0df2e868-5451-4d0f-a3b0-13bfef150211/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta04e7a93-32c2-4bc5-837e-ee6ec8e32f50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | As you may have seen on [Rachel Maddow last night](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68d43a21-4cf5-481a-aab5-74607f1d51e4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): _" Donald Trump has taken nearly a billion dollars from taxpayer money meant for modernizing the U.S. nuclear arsenal, and is instead directing some of those funds to refurbish the Air Force One style plane gifted to him from Qatar, which he intends to keep in his presidential library after potentially using it as his presidential plane once it is brought up to spec."_ Are you ****ing kidding me? The guy is taking funds meant for modernizing our nuclear arsenal (and avoiding things like decades-old missiles blowing up in their silos) and spending a fortune to turn it into _another_ Air Force One? (We already have two). And he's going to call the shots on redecorating it? The guy who thinks gold-plated toilets are classy? And then, after spending/misappropriating all that taxpayer money, he's going to just take it with him when he goes? **Don't let him get away with this in secret. People were outraged when they first heard of this gift (=bribe) from Qatar. But taking away funding from nuclear safety for a vanity project takes it to a whole new level.** [**Add your name and demand that this be stopped ASAP.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3576c772-e250-4ca1-a453-e79a22c01e38/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: Let’s talk to people like people again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
We’ve got the winning message, now let’s take it nationwide.
Peter,

Recently, I traveled to South Carolina at the invitation of the State AFL-CIO and the Georgetown County Democrats.

While I was there, I met with union workers, community leaders, elected officials, and Democrats from Greenville to Columbia to Charleston and beyond. I shared something I believe with all my heart: **That Democrats can win elections — even in difficult territory — by making sure that we talk to people and not at them.**

No trumped-up political jargon, no consultant-crafted buzzwords, just honest conversations about what folks are going through and how we can really make life better for them and their families.

Right now, folks across the country are scared. They’re seeing rising costs at every turn and job insecurity with no relief, all while feeling like no one in Washington really hears them or even cares about what they're going through. And Peter, that has to change, and it has to change fast.

Look, I know from experience that if we can meet people where they are and speak to them directly and honestly about what really matters in their lives, we'll be able to make a real difference. That’s how we’ve won big here in Kentucky — _a state Donald Trump won by 30 points_ — by focusing on the basics: Good-paying jobs, strong public schools, affordable healthcare, and infrastructure that actually works.

When we lead with why these issues matter (and not just how we’ll fix them), people actually listen, and when folks listen and have the tools to make informed decisions, **they take those decisions straight to the polls and vote.** And they don't vote as Democrats or Republicans, but as American citizens ready for real and lasting change from the right candidate.

[**That message has worked for me in all three of my statewide wins in deep-red Kentucky. Now, I want to help Democrats across the country use it, too. But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in before our July fundraising deadline to help spread this message across the country? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112363523/560262675/841405539?refcode=em25_250729_eom1_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250729_eom1_fndd_gq_act___GOVAB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=a9238c21-b26c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTkyMzhjMjEtYjI2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K0k_lUXJL0iINNgZtAYdQ2ocZW2fP8Dx1yi7UWKpEWQ=) clean_body: We’ve got the winning message, now let’s take it nationwide. Peter, Recently, I traveled to South Carolina at the invitation of the State AFL-CIO and the Georgetown County Democrats. While I was there, I met with union workers, community leaders, elected officials, and Democrats from Greenville to Columbia to Charleston and beyond. I shared something I believe with all my heart: That Democrats can win elections — even in difficult territory — by making sure that we talk to people and not at them. No trumped-up political jargon, no consultant-crafted buzzwords, just honest conversations about what folks are going through and how we can really make life better for them and their families. Right now, folks across the country are scared. They’re seeing rising costs at every turn and job insecurity with no relief, all while feeling like no one in Washington really hears them or even cares about what they're going through. And Peter, that has to change, and it has to change fast. Look, I know from experience that if we can meet people where they are and speak to them directly and honestly about what really matters in their lives, we'll be able to make a real difference. That’s how we’ve won big here in Kentucky — a state Donald Trump won by 30 points — by focusing on the basics: Good-paying jobs, strong public schools, affordable healthcare, and infrastructure that actually works. When we lead with why these issues matter (and not just how we’ll fix them), people actually listen, and when folks listen and have the tools to make informed decisions, they take those decisions straight to the polls and vote. And they don't vote as Democrats or Republicans, but as American citizens ready for real and lasting change from the right candidate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Gov. name: Heidi Hall
subject: We're endorsed by Rep. Jared Huffman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend,
I've officially been endorsed by Congressman Jared Huffman over in California's Second Congressional District, who said,
“We share a strong passion for the outdoors and protecting California's natural resources and I look forward to partnering with her on these and so many other pressing issues in Congress. As a Nevada County Supervisor for the past nine years, Heidi has worked across the aisle to fight for working people, rural healthcare, and wildfire protections. Now more than ever, we need folks like Heidi Hall in Congress who will get things done for their constituents and fight for our democracy."
Friend, this endorsement is truly an honor.
Rep. Huffman understands that being a leader means putting people over politics and doing what needs to be done to get our communities the results that they need.
What's been lost in Washington is a sense of duty to the people being represented back home, and having served as a Nevada County Supervisor, having seen how important our environment is as an EPA worker, and having raised my two sons in Grass Valley—I'm incredibly grateful to have his endorsement.
Friend, the momentum our campaign has gained is palpable. Off the back of our latest poll and numerous endorsements by prominent Democrats, we need your help to continue to build our campaign and reach out to people throughout our district to let them know that we're ready to flip this seat.
If you can, will you help us gather the resources to communicate with folks in our district by donating to our campaign today and helping us raise the $8,450 that we still need online to reach our July End of Month Fundraising Goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
JOIN REP. HUFFMAN IN SUPPORTING HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250729_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I’m ready to serve again.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364004/560264057/-23875686?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-29_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUxNWE1MGItYjM2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uGAQQoHX7z8bhcMzZs-pVY5e42afHP5ciAOulZnG1go=)
With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: **I am running for U.S. Senate, Peter.**
**I’m Roy Cooper.** I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor.
**[Now, I am asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic United States Senator from North Carolina. I’m grateful that Abigail Spanberger is already on our team, and if you’re ready to join us, please split a donation between our team and theirs right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364005/560264058/-23875686?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-29_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUxNWE1MGItYjM2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uGAQQoHX7z8bhcMzZs-pVY5e42afHP5ciAOulZnG1go=)**
Democrats’ best hope of stopping the chaos in Washington is to retake the Senate in 2026, and our race here in NC is set to be the most competitive election next year. We can’t take back the Senate without flipping this seat from red to blue — and The Hill has rated our race the most likely Senate seat to flip.
Here’s something you may not know about me: **I’ve already won some of the most competitive elections here in battleground North Carolina.** I won my elections for Governor in 2016 and 2020 — the same years that Donald Trump carried the state.
NC is one of the last, true purple states, but we’ve proven together that Democrats can win. We know what we have to do.
As Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, cleaner air and water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.
**I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward.**
**[I have never taken running for office lightly, Peter, and I know that winning this race won’t be easy. But together, we’ve won the toughest fights before. We can win now. If you are with me, please make your grassroots Founding Donation today by splitting a contribution of any size between Abigail Spanberger and our campaign>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364006/560264059/-23875686?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-29_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUxNWE1MGItYjM2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uGAQQoHX7z8bhcMzZs-pVY5e42afHP5ciAOulZnG1go=)**
_If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Roy Cooper and Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately:_

clean_body: I’m ready to serve again. = With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: I am running for U.S. Senate, Peter. I’m Roy Cooper. I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor. = Democrats’ best hope of stopping the chaos in Washington is to retake the Senate in 2026, and our race here in NC is set to be the most competitive election next year. We can’t take back the Senate without flipping this seat from red to blue — and The Hill has rated our race the most likely Senate seat to flip. Here’s something you may not know about me: I’ve already won some of the most competitive elections here in battleground North Carolina. I won my elections for Governor in 2016 and 2020 — the same years that Donald Trump carried the state. NC is one of the last, true purple states, but we’ve proven together that Democrats can win. We know what we have to do. As Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, cleaner air and water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Roy Cooper and Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for being with me, Roy Cooper By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

subject: My decision: I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I have thought on it and prayed about it, and I have decided. I’m in.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364034/560264226/-748951188?refcode=email_072925_cooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJiMTRkNy1iMjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNSTz5DXTEDVfRr-MeDVeh8sp-7_7kg3ulvq0vNzWaU=) **[I’m Roy Cooper. I’m a proud Democrat. I’m also a former Governor and Attorney General from North Carolina. Today, I’m asking for your support to be the next United States Senator and help Democrats take BACK the Senate Majority in 2026. If you’re ready to join me in the fight, split a contribution between John Hickenlooper and my campaign today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364035/560264228/-748951188?refcode=email_072925_cooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJiMTRkNy1iMjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNSTz5DXTEDVfRr-MeDVeh8sp-7_7kg3ulvq0vNzWaU=)** **North Carolinians already know this about me:** I’ve spent my life in service to our state, and my record shows that I will do everything in my power to deliver results for our people. That’s why North Carolinians elected me Governor in some of the most competitive races in the nation — _twice._ Now, this election is set to be the most competitive Senate race of 2026, and the national GOP will go to any lengths to defeat us. Everyone knows that the path to retaking the Senate Majority and STOPPING Washington Republicans starts here in NC. **[If we’re going to win, we need Democrats from across this country to join our fight. I hope to see your name on the list of Founding Donors starting our campaign off strong, and just $10 will go a long way. Can I count on you to split a contribution of any size right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364037/560264229/-748951188?refcode=email_072925_cooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJiMTRkNy1iMjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNSTz5DXTEDVfRr-MeDVeh8sp-7_7kg3ulvq0vNzWaU=)** I have a long record of getting things done — from taking on big banks as Attorney General to getting Medicaid expansion passed when I was Governor. I’m not afraid of doing hard work to make our country better. _And I’m not afraid to speak out when politicians are doing something wrong, either._ Too many Republicans in Washington have lost all sense of duty to our people and our country. They see only the prospect of getting on Donald Trump’s wrong side and losing their power. **This cannot continue.** Americans deserve leaders who will serve the people, not their own partisan agenda. _Meanwhile, Donald Trump has handpicked a loyalist candidate to run against me._ As Senator, I will defend our democracy. I’ll stand up for voting rights, work hard to restore abortion access, advocate for policies that will protect our air and drinking water, and do everything possible to bring jobs and opportunity to our economy. **[My promise to you is that I will always do what I think is right for the people of our great country. We can win this race, but it won’t be easy. I need you with me as a Founding Donor today. Does a $10 donation, split between our Senate campaign and John Hickenlooper, fit in your budget today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364038/560264230/-748951188?refcode=email_072925_cooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJiMTRkNy1iMjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNSTz5DXTEDVfRr-MeDVeh8sp-7_7kg3ulvq0vNzWaU=)** | | [Split $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364040/560264232/-748951188?refcode=email_072925_cooper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGJiMTRkNy1iMjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNSTz5DXTEDVfRr-MeDVeh8sp-7_7kg3ulvq0vNzWaU=)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: What a month...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am trying my best to stay laser-focused on the fight for our future and the priorities of this movement.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)

Friend — What a month it’s been.
We saw Republicans pass an enormous bill that strips millions of Americans of healthcare coverage, food assistance, and more.
We’ve seen the crisis in Gaza exacerbate beyond belief as Israel starves civilians.
We learned that Trump is in fact mentioned throughout the Epstein files.
We learned that a strong contender is getting close to challenging me in my coming fight for reelection.
And I had House Reps, Senators, and even an Attorney General openly call for my deportation.
**I am trying my best to stay laser-focused on the fight for our future and the priorities of this movement.**
But I simply cannot ignore the fact that we have a fundraising deadline coming up at midnight on Thursday.
I have my team set ambitious goals around these deadlines because it helps us build a campaign budget that is capable of both beating any and all challengers and organizing to oppose Trump’s authoritarian rule.
So with just two days until we close out this month full of breaking news and continued challenges, **[it would mean the world to me if you could chip in $5 or whatever you can afford today and help me hit my goals before Thursday night. This campaign is fueled by grassroots donors like YOU, which is why I have to reach out and ask for your help.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=2&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/770?c0=io-em-july25.7aNMN7&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=21&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-july25.EJessm&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=22&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-july25.a3SHP_&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=23&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-july25.vaqbpn&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=24&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-july25.WPzeGn&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=25&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-july25.gEqi_4&refcode=em250729-1-180&t=26&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**
---
****
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=1740%2E791427%2Ebt0xKO)**. body:
You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364356/560265263/1079316600?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.29_Cooper-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmI1MGJjZi1iMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ff2R4V2cw6GH4aZJIkuJgs00n_KT0oCqNSxB19FOKIQ=&emci=bf08555e-bb6b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=3bb50bcf-b36c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=11913588)** To unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=osvBhGJIjjpRs59eDTJeafdcsQRkno0kqDKJV2XPF8MORsPAOadFDXgZlgdNdiw84ST1B3DeABk30BEHyRYnM8jXyVsvZ3za7Zevaa1NVhVkxDu4lRVSM8N01wy1o3zTVRg99Wci4KD5N%2Befx4L1ZXCbpKN43bY%2BWt4QOBlRqWdPyQXqrLcKhkvU1bLhS0nKS1oNYK6pFMi%2Fv6D1LArIDxe9zM%2FBaXbObs8OyeBW6DTkw5Jpgw%2FDvF%2F2YOTYzeSsomVppLcbahmY3hCG9C7GfQsB%2B%2B66A9gN16S8BYhDJ8U2sxY0HmRqiavnH0ShjcWHoGVgQB1XKaCAZPYYqMg7Ea%2FFhISudIONhplBvXXTAeRZp4A2gj%2BjN2o9olA1aWTNbEJa4MhAmv8VZ47OR5cLKDJdQePP8Mrc%2BKM0eWrR%2Bdpr0rDHhs0BeV%2FQfEXZPZSX)**
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364361/560265271/1286950077?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.29_Cooper-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmI1MGJjZi1iMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ff2R4V2cw6GH4aZJIkuJgs00n_KT0oCqNSxB19FOKIQ=) With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: **I am running for U.S. Senate, friends.

I’m Roy Cooper.** I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor.

[**Now, I am asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic United States Senator from North Carolina. I’m grateful that Lisa Blunt Rochester is already on our team, and if you’re ready to join us, please split a donation between our team and theirs right now >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112364363/560265273/1286950077?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.07.29_Cooper-Launch_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmI1MGJjZi1iMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ff2R4V2cw6GH4aZJIkuJgs00n_KT0oCqNSxB19FOKIQ=)

Democrats’ best hope of stopping the chaos in Washington is to retake the Senate in 2026, and our race here in NC is set to be the most competitive election next year. We can’t take back the Senate without flipping this seat from red to blue — and The Hill has rated our race the most likely Senate seat to flip.

Here’s something you may not know about me: **I’ve already won some of the most competitive elections here in battleground North Carolina.** I won my elections for Governor in 2016 and 2020 — the same years that Donald Trump carried the state.

NC is one of the last, true purple states, but we’ve proven together that Democrats _can_ win. We know what we have to do.

As Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, cleaner air and water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.

**I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward.**

[**I have never taken running for office lightly, friend, and I know that winning this race won’t be easy. But together, we’ve won the toughest fights before. We can win now. Because my upset victory in 2018 put the establishment on notice—and my victory last fall confirmed what we already knew: an army of grassroots patriots, united around a single noble cause, will defeat the globalist, corporate interests every time. So if you can, please add your name to my grassroots patriot army! In liberty, Josh Hawley \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: Friday, July 25, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: We're 117 Donors Short... | | | | Peter, At the beginning of the month, I tasked our fundraising team with adding 500 new donors in July. We’re nearing the end of the month, and I wanted to give you a quick update on where we stand: we’re 117 donors short. If you haven’t yet joined Team Hawley, now is the perfect time. Join me as I fight for America’s working class, hold accountable the elites pushing a woke agenda, and defend and promote the value and dignity of life. JOIN TEAM HAWLEY ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | Help send a message that the conservative movement is alive and well, and that an army of grassroots patriots has Josh’s back as he boldly and fearlessly stands up to the liberal agenda. | | | | In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

body:
It’s not always the right time for everybody to donate. But if you can afford to give — even if all you can afford is $1 — we’re hoping you’ll take that step.
#
Peter:
$1 for VoteVets.
Yes, just $1. That’s all we’re asking you to chip in today.
$1 because the people who matter the most to VoteVets aren’t the ones who write the biggest checks. They’re the ones who were there when it really mattered.
$1 because we have an important end-of-month deadline on Thursday, and we are behind on our goals.
$1 because we’re hoping that everybody reading this can afford to chip in at least one dollar and help us make up some ground so we can hit our goals by Thursday’s deadline.
It’s not always the right time for everybody to donate. But if you can afford to give — even if all you can afford is $1 — we’re hoping you’ll take that step. The real strength of this organization has never been massive donations. It’s supporters like you. People who are willing to step up when it counts and power our work with whatever they can afford to give.
Those donations have defeated more MAGA Republicans than we can count, and replaced them with Veterans. Leaders we can count on.
[**So, if you’re in, make a donation of $1 (or more, if you’re willing) and help keep VoteVets in fighting shape as we ramp up towards the 2026 elections.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250729-1-120&t=1&akid=34494%2E3013755%2EpZpYr6)

# Meet Steve Hilton
---
I love California so much. I moved to the Bay Area over a decade ago. I’ve raised my family here, taught at Stanford, started a business, written books, hosted a TV show ... lived the California dream. It’s my home, in the deepest sense. I’m a proud American, and an incredibly proud Californian too. But I’ve never forgotten where I came from. My parents were immigrants – they fled communism in Hungary to start a new life in England. In a free country. I appreciate exactly what that means.We didn’t have much money. My mother worked in a shoe store, my stepfather worked construction. My dad, who died when I was a kid, was the goalie for the Hungarian national ice hockey team. In 2012 we moved to California. I hosted a TV show — The Next Revolution with Steve Hilton — and podcasts: California Rebel Base, The Steve Hilton Show, Big Ideas Book Club. Through my policy organization, Golden Together, I’ve set out the changes we need to make to get this state back on track. Over the last few years, I’ve traveled the state, meeting people from all walks of life and backgrounds, in every part of California. I’ve spent time with business owners and workers in every industry, struggling with the absolute nightmare it’s become to start and grow a company here. I’ve seen the struggles so many Californians face raising a family given the unbelievable costs of living here. To make real change happen in government, you need the ability to think differently, the courage to challenge establishment groupthink and the conviction to follow through.That’s what I will bring to this job – to the urgent necessity of restoring the California Dream for everyone, and making this beautiful state, that we love so much, truly Golden Again.
---

name: Final email
subject: Fellow Patriot – this is my last message to you before time expires.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: Please read EVERY word carefully Patriot - This is my final message to you before time expires. Knowing that, will you please read every word carefully? Thanks for opening this email! I wouldn't be reaching out like this if my situation weren't truly dire. Let me explain my predicament: FIRST, while I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! THEN, a Soros-backed, liberal group gave my Democrat opponent $500K all in one shot! My Democrat opponent has continued to OUTRAISE me by MILLIONS of dollars. NOW, the polls are TIED. But I cannot win with this crippling cash disadvantage. TO MAKE MATTERS WORSE, I'm facing a CRUCIAL Mid-Month Deadline Goal and I'm WAY behind! in a serious bind here, Fellow Patriot. I'm over $10,000 behind pace to reach my upcoming Goal. I'm asking you as a Christian, a Marine, and a mother: Democrat opponent has Leftist billionaires like George Soros and Hollywood liberals backing her, but I'm 100% relying on you! can't thank you enough for reading this message all the way through, Fellow Patriot. You are truly a key part of my team! Together, we will close this fundraising gap and beat my liberal opponent in November! Thanks again and may God bless you! -Winsome Earle-Sears | | | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | |

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: all eyes on GEORGIA - the stakes could NOT be higher! >>>>
body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. Will you rush a donation of any amount so we can help keep Georgia blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072925_3]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=072925_3&amount=5]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=072925_3&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072925_3&amount=25]
If we don’t raise the resources to fight back now, we’re handing Georgia — and the Senate — to Trump on a silver platter.
Don’t let that happen. Pitch in whatever you can today to keep Georgia blue and block the MAGA agenda in its tracks:
👉 Donate now to help defend Georgia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=072925_3]

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

Hey Peter, We’re only two days away from our critical monthly fundraising deadline, so I wanted to give you two major reasons before Tuesday.
1. **This administration needs to be held accountable.** From their “Big, Ugly Bill” that rips health care away from millions of Americans just to give billionaires another tax cut to cutting $9 billion of bipartisan funding that Congress has already approved, Trump and his allies are out of control.
2. **Flipping the Senate blue is the only way to keep them in check.** Since Republicans refuse to stand up to the Trump administration, we need to elect more Democrats and win the Senate to ensure we have leaders who will fight to defeat Trump’s reckless agenda and protect working families.

**[With those reasons in mind, will you pitch in $2 (or more!) ahead of Thursday’s deadline? clean_body: | Hey Peter, We’re only two days away from our critical monthly fundraising deadline, so I wanted to give you two major reasons before Tuesday. 1. This administration needs to be held accountable. From their “Big, Ugly Bill” that rips health care away from millions of Americans just to give billionaires another tax cut to cutting $9 billion of bipartisan funding that Congress has already approved, Trump and his allies are out of control. 2. Flipping the Senate blue is the only way to keep them in check. Since Republicans refuse to stand up to the Trump administration, we need to elect more Democrats and win the Senate to ensure we have leaders who will fight to defeat Trump’s reckless agenda and protect working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for stepping up today, Peter. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

subject: [1-MIN POLL]: Do you support MSNBC? –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T345a2477-6bc9-4c30-935b-f733984d3b5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| BREAKING:**** "The fate of MSNBC could be in Trump's hands" [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T416a1c73-9f86-49ac-b494-ef8d275409c3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We need to know, Peter: Do you support MSNBC?
---
| | [YES](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te61cb855-2ae3-43df-9561-8130ec21f620/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [NO](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9767ace7-bddf-4c89-95a4-3453a44c8eec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Trump has made it no secret that he is set on dismantling news media channels that are holding him accountable – like MSNBC! He's gone so far as to say, "They're really corrupt and they're illegal." What?? Peter, we can't let Trump or his MAGA allies attack our right to free speech. We'll need to stand with our journalists who are fighting for the truth and to hold this administration accountable. [That's why we're checking in our team with a 1-minute poll that closes at midnight tonight:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7cc3c83-d058-4185-8a8e-44c52888ebe0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Do you support MSNBC?
---
| | [YES](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f24c353-59cf-4ffb-849b-dc74ce865d3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac8e0d1a-ff53-4c8d-877a-5f6a3097013b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: | = = I’ve seen some real clowns in politics. But Michael Whatley? He’s a whole damn circus. Trump hand-picked him to run for Senate in North Carolina against Roy Cooper because he’s the perfect lackey — no convictions, no backbone, just a mouthpiece for Trump’s lies about our elections. Whatley’s made a career out of pushing the Big Lie. This is the same guy who tried to throw out legitimate votes in the 2020 election. And now Trump wants to stick him in the U.S. Senate. But here’s the good news. Democrats can beat him. Roy Cooper is running to flip North Carolina’s seat, and he’s got the backbone and integrity that Whatley never will. But he’ll be up against a MAGA money machine, and we’ll need a hell of a lot of grassroots firepower to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’ve beaten these extremists before, but it takes all of us pulling together. Peter — we know you’re probably short on time today, so we’ll be quick.

We’re still behind on our July fundraising goal, and we’ve got less than 48 hours to turn things around and make it across the finish line.

Becca’s standing up for working people like us in Washington, and she relies on grassroots donations to keep up her fight and elect more progressives across the country — not big checks from wealthy megadonors.

If everyone reading this email chipped in any amount — even $1 — we’d close the gap in no time. Can you rush in a donation today? Here’s a direct link to make a contribution: secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-july2025 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-july2025?amount=]

Thanks for your support,

Team Becca

body:
every dollar donated helps.

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d04360b12a1c4af89040a66c63a802c3&_e=vxES3zzUh2tvKl2csbxmLpii0cRobRQ8DWIdhANABHICGJDlCDm5-FwWDZVF9EGx_T4I7FMhN7AKgAWoJB-SI5dGXrjueZN0hiLqriih9mFgCLHMLg8-I1W7qP7IhoSF6Fo2lm6hsYN5CmysVnHO7ElFLVr-ntBlhy2ZMhCmbE6mFECWn3NZpgeNUwxOUChZZtxlZ1h3S0C8izsEuyQu9euzx3kU9rWCQVJ13VszcjqV1cSO_U3VbhvR1ZTB6Qy5lF9Qpu6sNpGKc5Fut-dL71PmRlu34RO-MIQpYeuknmvL712g3JqxkW-PpNyYUqNKEY5Bmij8ND_w-aUva_Q_WOJM7OtEtHSSImSEdLGNZ08XQwepJnjJZDRvs9hke1HLmHi2wzKGzYXhbJDNeZck8yAVsLqJajwuxIdNUFZQT-xx9UutahJefB4g9NdPowX8KGZY6CiQDy-DsS5GyzKMcokSFTnOLEm8qQMiWLHhMGPTZr0K6-aHaiohk2DzeaLNpz5h8WcaKDs8xuEOfYu0D2RvmP0fcE8DEzV1i2R8gYErOVhwjIQRXU-TPp0Ie9zz)

Patriot,

**I hate this part.**

I've told you about my career in public service, raising two young daughters with my wife, and running a small business near our home in North Carolina.

[](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d04360b12a1c4af89040a66c63a802c3&_e=vxES3zzUh2tvKl2csbxmLpii0cRobRQ8DWIdhANABHICGJDlCDm5-FwWDZVF9EGx_T4I7FMhN7AKgAWoJB-SI5dGXrjueZN0hiLqriih9mFgCLHMLg8-I1W7qP7IhoSF6Fo2lm6hsYN5CmysVnHO7P1QqdruQFwCX2QLahee8wVQdmf5hut2RxCHIZY4t6MkeWPrHqBhZuikeyxMkikNyfjQ4x1iSXU2gxw4hfsVJzHb3FhArESazxOQPMA_QXv8-Ogk5eJIH7aeGdvAZQXpf48PPLaBkgWvPMXHADbwH7D4yljuuxReCwu0lhADClMGy0fMJFhA7D6FsLeuNw4FZOu8RTG99ExZadtH7pOTfK-0kgxm419RHGSlRNseiq5YdJXHm8gOc4jgYwEZmNwQ9hkWMWA6pLK4y2eIaP_Zun9FAWYFg4rmH1kM-U15C3vzr9kVIw-CEenHNEObZMSX8NTkWWNTqQhNp1Cak1AEfzxpb9oOQ63c5Jv0wRu8s-rWfmhO-UKgsIREPp6lNOpb98n2mlZsSBiduIsjNSzk5K8%3D)
I could talk to you all day about faith, family, and freedom, and even firearms, but I HATE talking to you about finances.

**There, I said it -_campaign finances_ , to be exact. **

Running for Congress to serve you, protect families like mine, and make our nation great again is truly such an honor. After serving in Afghanistan I could tell you a million times over how precious our freedom is, but the hard truth is that without a solid foundation of campaign finances, authentic candidates who want to Save America get nowhere.

Our campaign is facing a MAJOR Fundraising Deadline, and we still haven't reached our goal. Deep-pocketed liberals are working hard to target every single conservative candidate in the country and we NEED to push back. We can't afford to lose a single seat, **so I 'm coming to you with one honest ask.**

**[I need your help. Can I count on you to chip in a few bucks?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d04360b12a1c4af89040a66c63a802c3&_e=vxES3zzUh2tvKl2csbxmLpii0cRobRQ8DWIdhANABHICGJDlCDm5-FwWDZVF9EGx_T4I7FMhN7AKgAWoJB-SI5dGXrjueZN0hiLqriih9mFgCLHMLg8-I1W7qP7IhoSF6Fo2lm6hsYN5CmysVnHO7ElFLVr-ntBlhy2ZMhCmbE6mFECWn3NZpgeNUwxOUChZDXmvYSKpfzmZxPogEfL4s2BjDqLyUS0LlboV1P-G0c8LO327EUzHnW697aH_GV6DDm2igmy07QXkBc2G4xjKY8qi6-71fq4DeH4StDw7UsKWv3Ana9ih3nfFdC9Uswvg2ASiH6r9104C1F3wRHM-4gnzdwDhXZldjE62yLWstGbEqICbQ5AOxExvfOmyFtZyB-OqZMqAt_q5S_epsbAbCnCKvff4DVQo6IhHmNPBpTz5ehmFRQwbJ5oRvnups5xU11971firp45ObzFz_bUJxkJGPWnrG_hCPCIzVi0MigFpoG25dm0hYp96pCcIozinnO6oU-PpZXMAVc9vr0C2PsQ653lIHl1HMgKosShJXCvIjL__SImSP9FTVI2v0SHA)**

It really would make a huge difference to the future of this campaign. You and I are both committed patriots focused on saving our country. Please consider supporting our campaign today.

_Pat Harrigan_

| Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624
---

name: Team Magaziner
subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Joe Neguse and AOC are following my lead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/lobbylist-ban [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/lobbylist-ban]
Hi folks,
In Washington, the revolving door is spinning faster than ever—and too many members of Congress have come to embrace it. The American people should have confidence that elected officials in Washington are there to represent them, not to audition for high-paying lobbying jobs with special interests.
That's why fifteen years ago, as a new senator, I introduced legislation that would ban members of Congress from ever becoming lobbyists.
Unfortunately, special interest groups and powerful corporations' sway over our politics has only grown since then.
That’s why I’m so glad to see Congressman Joe Neguse and Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez joining me in this fight and championing my lobbying ban in the U.S. House.
The Close the Revolving Door Act of 2025 would:
- Introduce a lifetime ban on former members of Congress from becoming lobbyists.
- Ban senior congressional staff from lobbying Congress for six years following their departure from service.
- Increase fines for violations of the Lobbying Disclosure Act from $200,000 to $500,000.
This legislation is a no-brainer that would hold Congress accountable to the people, not special interests, and slam shut the revolving door of influence in Washington.
Friend, if, like me, you believe we need to restore trust in our elections and government, add your name to our petition supporting a ban on members of Congress from becoming lobbyists >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/lobbylist-ban]
STOP THE REVOLVING DOOR [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/lobbylist-ban]
After you've added your name to our petition, consider chipping in a few bucks to my campaign before our July fundraising deadline on Thursday. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250729_lobbylistban_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250729_lobbylistban_act]
It is the first step in restoring the American people’s faith in our government and institutions.
Thank you,
Michael

Hi Derek, it's John.
First, Trump swore he wouldn’t touch Medicaid.
Then, he gutted it – to bankroll tax cuts for his rich buddies.
Now, ****300,000**** Pennsylvanians – kids, cancer patients, seniors – are gonna lose coverage.
➡️ Rural hospitals? Shutting down.
➡️ Nursing homes? Kicking seniors out.
➡️ ERs? Packed worse than ever.
We’ve got our first end-of-month deadline since Trump signed this terrible budget into law coming up. I’m not gonna sugarcoat it – we’re in a tight spot.
**
We need to raise $20,000 by Thursday at midnight to show Republicans that we are absolutely not backing down.**
Because when folks head to the ballot box, they need to know _exactly_ who did this – and vote to kick their asses out of Congress, so we can have a government that actually works for the people who make this country run.
**[So will you pitch in $5, $25 – whatever you can – to help us hit this goal and keep on swinging?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk175-fr-fl-v2&t=11&akid=10226%2E434096%2EJS7CUB)**
