name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: I won’t stop ringing the alarm bell on Epstein
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
As more damning photos of Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein together hit the press, Trump is calling the mounting evidence against him “boring” and “bullshit.” **Peter, that’s a slap in the face to Epstein’s victims and anyone who actually values justice and accountability.** No one, no matter how wealthy, how well-connected, or how powerful they are, should be above the law; this shouldn’t be a partisan issue. **Here’s how I’m holding them accountable, Peter:**
* As a member of the House Oversight Committee, I stood with my colleagues to subpoena the Department of Justice for the Epstein files. _Then, Mike Johnson rushed us out of office until September._
* As a member of the House Education and Workforce Committee, I proposed an amendment to require the Department of Labor to include case studies about Epstein’s affairs as part of training efforts. _This measure was blocked by the GOP leadership within the committee—they pulled the entire bill to avoid a vote on my amendment._

**Republicans are throwing last-ditch roadblocks in our way to dodge accountability for Epstein’s crimes._Who are they trying to protect?_** **[I won’t stop ringing the alarm on this, Peter, so can I count on your support if you’re standing with me in this work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112368980/560279749/-912468211?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDc1NjIwMC1jMDZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=km9sSx8ISltWu7RAGpGSCjQzxBh6Nq41z3_6qsuOdBE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112368981/560279750/-912468211?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDc1NjIwMC1jMDZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=km9sSx8ISltWu7RAGpGSCjQzxBh6Nq41z3_6qsuOdBE=)

clean_body: | As more damning photos of Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein together hit the press, Trump is calling the mounting evidence against him “boring” and “bullshit.” Peter, that’s a slap in the face to Epstein’s victims and anyone who actually values justice and accountability. No one, no matter how wealthy, how well-connected, or how powerful they are, should be above the law; this shouldn’t be a partisan issue. Here’s how I’m holding them accountable, Peter: As a member of the House Oversight Committee, I stood with my colleagues to subpoena the Department of Justice for the Epstein files. Then, Mike Johnson rushed us out of office until September. As a member of the House Education and Workforce Committee, I proposed an amendment to require the Department of Labor to include case studies about Epstein’s affairs as part of training efforts. This measure was blocked by the GOP leadership within the committee—they pulled the entire bill to avoid a vote on my amendment. Republicans are throwing last-ditch roadblocks in our way to dodge accountability for Epstein’s crimes.Who are they trying to protect? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

abuses of power targeting Trump and countless other American
citizens," Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. "Along with
bringing transparency and accountability back to the FBI, Kash will
return the agency to its core mission, legitimate law enforcement that
will protect the rights of law-abiding Americans and prosecute
legitimate crimes."

corrupt. From sitting on Hunter Biden’s laptop in order to influence
the 2020 election, the raid of President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home,

Catholics, this FBI has been turned into the political police for
partisan leftists. Accordingly, Wray should be subject to criminal
investigation."

[13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] February 20, 2025 Kash Patel Should Open Wide the FBI’s Files [] Source: Judicial Watch [] "Kash Patel should open wide the FBI’s files and expose its abuses of power targeting Trump and countless other American citizens," Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. "Along with bringing transparency and accountability back to the FBI, Kash will return the agency to its core mission, legitimate law enforcement that will protect the rights of law-abiding Americans and prosecute legitimate crimes." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] December 11, 2024 Judicial Watch Statement on Resignation of FBI Director Christopher Wray [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "The FBI is irredeemably corrupt. From sitting on Hunter Biden’s laptop in order to influence the 2020 election, the raid of President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home, and the censorship of Americans, to the targeting of traditional Catholics, this FBI has been turned into the political police for partisan leftists. Accordingly, Wray should be subject to criminal investigation." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] April 09, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues for Emails of Anti-Trump FBI Executive Accused of Harassing Whistleblowers [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the Department of Justice for emails of Dena Perkins, a section chief of the FBI, regarding whistleblower retaliation. Perkins was among several FBI officials reportedly fired by the Trump administration. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Tobias Read
subject: The greatest threat to election security →
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250729em-threat [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250729em-threat]
Hi, folks. It’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I’m raising the alarm about the biggest threat to our elections, and it isn’t foreign hackers — it’s coming from the very top .
Since I took office, I’ve watched with growing alarm as the Trump Administration takes deliberate, calculated steps to undermine the principles that govern our democracy. What’s happening now isn’t politics as usual—it’s a coordinated effort to erode public trust in our democracy under the false banner of “election integrity.”
Here’s what worries me most:
* Federal overreach : Policies like the “Election Infrastructure Information Sharing” initiative may seem protective—but can be twisted to suppress dissent.

* Intimidation of election officials : They face threats, malicious packages, and attempts to undermine locally run elections.

* Centralized control : When federal authorities try to dictate how we run our ballots, they erase the role of voters and local administrators in Oregon.
As Secretary of State, my job is to defend local control, protect our election workers, and preserve fair, accessible and transparent elections.
But I can’t do it alone.
I’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 before the end of July to continue powering my operation. Can you chip in $5, $15, or $50 today to help me reach my goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250729em-threat]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250729em-threat]
Every dollar helps us communicate with voters around the state and support pro-democracy candidates in every corner of Oregon.
Our democracy isn’t safe from the top unless we act.
Thank you,
Tobias ReadTobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250729em-threat]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Could I give you a call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I hope to talk to you over the phone pretty soon.
#
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250729-1?refcode=em20250729-2224&amount=5&refcode2=2224_21716_jXKw2w&akid=2224%2E21716%2EjXKw2w)
Hey – it’s Sarah.
**Do you have a sec to chat with me over the phone? 📞**
The reason I’m asking is because I’m planning on calling a few supporters who chip in to our campaign ahead of Thursday’s fundraising deadline.
[**Would you donate $5 or any amount you can afford today? I’ll be calling a handful of folks who pitch in, and I’d love the opportunity to speak with you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250729-1?refcode=em20250729-2224&amount=5&refcode2=2224_21716_jXKw2w&akid=2224%2E21716%2EjXKw2w)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250729-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250729-2224&refcode2=2224_21716_jXKw2w&akid=2224%2E21716%2EjXKw2w)**
Don’t get me wrong. I love that you and I can communicate via email. These emails are one of the very best ways for us to stay connected about what I’m up to in Congress and all the progress we’re fighting for together here in Delaware.
**But there’s truly nothing like a good old-fashioned phone call, and I’d love the opportunity to connect with you to hear what’s on your mind.** I know too many folks in Delaware and across the country are worried about what’s ahead. Whether you’re concerned about the future your kids will inherit, frustrated by what’s happening in Washington, or if you want to chat about what’s giving you hope, I want to hear from you.
[**I can’t wait to start calling a few members of this team who pitch in ahead of Thursday night’s deadline. Can I put you down for a $5 donation to support our fight for Delaware’s working families?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250729-1?refcode=em20250729-2224&amount=5&refcode2=2224_21716_jXKw2w&akid=2224%2E21716%2EjXKw2w)
Hope to chat very soon!
\- Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250729-1&t=1&refcode2=2224_21716_jXKw2w&akid=2224%2E21716%2EjXKw2w)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2224%2E21716%2EjXKw2w)

name: Haley Stevens
subject: If Rogers wins, Trump wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Trump officially endorsed my opponent, we need to respond

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4280?t=2&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens.
It’s official: **Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, in Michigan’s battleground Senate race.**
This isn’t a surprise – Rogers has spent years kissing up to Trump. MAGA megadonors even spent nearly $80 million last year trying to buy a Senate seat for Rogers. And now with Trump’s backing, we know what’s coming: a flood of GOP dark money and billionaire-funded attacks.
**We can fight back, but I need your help.** The deadline to hit our critical $200,000 end-of-month fundraising goal is right around the corner, and we need the resources: _[**Will you rush $5 to help me compete against Rogers’ war chest and keep Michigan blue?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4281?t=3&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)_
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4282?t=4&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
null, keeping Mike Rogers out of the Senate isn’t just about our race in Michigan. It’s about flipping the Senate blue and stopping another MAGA loyalist from rubber-stamping Trump’s chaos agenda: gutting Medicaid, raising prices with reckless tariffs, and forcing working families to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan – from helping save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession to flipping a red House seat blue and delivering real results for working people. I’m in this race because Michiganders deserve a senator who fights for them, not someone who takes orders from Donald Trump.
**Here's the truth: Polling shows I’m the only Democrat who can beat Rogers.** GOP operatives even told _The Hill_ __ that __ I’m their **_toughest_** general election opponent. But to keep this lead – and win – I cannot miss this $200,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.
**[I’m personally asking, null: Will you chip in $5 before midnight to help us reach our goal, keep Michigan blue, and defeat Trump’s handpicked candidate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4281?t=5&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4283?t=6&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4284?t=7&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4285?t=8&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4282?t=9&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
Thanks for standing with me.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4286?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4280?t=11&akid=490%2E49239%2EeXyZo_)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

| | | **👋 **To everyone who has supported us so far:

We know that you’ve been receiving a lot of fundraising emails recently, but we’ve got an important message for you, and we hope you’ll read this email from start to finish.

* _**Save Democracy:** Support our Soundcheck Fund to create an ecosystem of independent media--**free of corporate control** --to [Save our Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/30d0e4c6-5028-4b8d-8894-6677007ff72d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
[Join Our Community!](https://substack.com/redirect/a56fcd94-048d-479b-84ca-9903860f0aea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**By David Shuster**
Somewhere amidst the hills of Turnberry, where brave Scots once clashed and bled for concepts like honor and dignity, a man lacquered in orange foundation and stuffed in an armored golf cart recently declared himself victorious--over truth, etiquette, and the concept of par.
Yes, Donald J. Trump, the golf world's self-anointed Hercules of the Handicap, has added another golden feather to his cap--a cap, one assumes, that was marked "Make Mulligans Great Again." According to multiple reports and videos, the President of these Disunited States trampled the rules of golf like a rhinoceros loose on the 18th green.
Trump moved his ball not once, not twice, but habitually. Shots were reimagined, distances conveniently forgotten, and [scores reported with the same fidelity Trump brought to inauguration crowd sizes](https://substack.com/redirect/06d86fef-240a-45e4-a714-f8b4991be36f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and net worth declarations.
Trump waddled across Turnberry like an overweight duck, proclaiming imaginary eagles while his playing partners blinked into the wind. Cameras captured some of Trump's cheating.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b404185b-65cd-4be9-b874-6a6a9e90564b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Including the surreal moment his own caddie pulled a ball out of a pocket and threw it onto the fairway, safely away from a sandy bunker Trump had targeted like an expert. The hosts of [CBS News This Morning](https://substack.com/redirect/fc02cbc0-aba7-449d-93cd-bb477b24acab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) openly laughed at Trump and his co-conspirator, with one anchor declaring, "come on, you can't be doing that."
Let's be clear. The game of golf, admittedly [a pastime for the idle rich](https://substack.com/redirect/62aab1b1-5efd-4076-9e37-9a524d179bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), is governed by a code of honor. A golfer keeps his or her own score and plays the ball where it lies.
A true golfer does not helicopter into the rough, kick his ball back onto the fairway with the discretion of a Clydesdale, and then claim a birdie with the sanctimony of a choirboy. [But truth and Donald Trump have never been close](https://substack.com/redirect/a1e0845d-2cf7-4746-983f-a991502b881b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enough to be a golf pairing.
A few years ago, Sportswriter Rick Reilly wrote a book titled "Commander in Cheat"-- based on the author's interviews with Trump caddies. Trump's own employees noted Trump cheats all the time and said Trump kicks his golf balls into better positions so frequently that the caddies call Trump, "Pele," as in the soccer star.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f938df03-c6f8-46ac-82f3-0037a9907134?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**It is a marvel, truly, how[Trump reduces every field of human endeavor to a con game](https://substack.com/redirect/12c7cbd9-6061-416b-a719-0b3486a6f3fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** Whether it's real estate, politics, or a gentleman's game in the Scottish breeze, Trump arrives and deploys the same behavior: bluster, fraud, and a pathological allergy to losing.
One imagines Trump at the Battle of Bannockburn, insisting the Scots had surrendered because _he said so_ , and awarding himself a Medal of Honor for "tremendous courage under metaphorical fire."
The golf ball, like the truth, remains indifferent to Trump's wishes. And yet he bludgeons both with equal enthusiasm. He is the first man in history to lose at golf while insisting he won, to claim the moral high ground while knee-deep in bunkers of his own making.
**If golf reveals character, then Trump is a man whose soul resembles a water hazard: shallow, murky, and surrounded by warning signs.**
Thankfully, the game of golf has survived far worse than Trump. Golf has persevered [despite titanium drivers, reality TV, and even Patrick Ree](https://substack.com/redirect/e825cf6d-33d4-43ed-a78b-462be72f5105?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)d.
What matters is that we, the public, remember what the Scots knew long ago. The wind may howl [and the liars may bluster](https://substack.com/redirect/6d8af40e-2214-4baa-b893-c1dbbcde39e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but in the end the scorecard doesn't lie. [Only Donald Trump does](https://substack.com/redirect/a03d8bb3-b127-4a09-8f1e-b23905afbc3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58c64422-ea8f-4688-bcea-cd1302a406df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Clad in Titleist and swinging a club over the graves of decency and decorum--and his first wife, Ivana; yes, her obviously sentimental burial was on his golf course in Bedminster, NJ--Donald Trump is not a golfer. He is a cheat.
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."_

clean_body: A man so pathetic, so filled with self-loathing, envy, jealousy, such a Grand Canyon of emptiness inside, he's President of the United States and still has to cheat at golf | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A man so pathetic, so filled with self-loathing, envy, jealousy, such a Grand Canyon of emptiness inside, he's President of the United States and still has to cheat at golf | | | Jul 29 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- `Independent Media Just .26/day With Paid-Community-Member Benefits!` Connect With Us: Weekly AMA w Cliff & David! Comment on all content and DM us Behind The Velvet Rope: Insider stories, behind the scenes video, including bloopers Deserved Recognition: Shout-outs during our weekly show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter" Save Democracy: Support our Soundcheck Fund to create an ecosystem of independent media--free of corporate control --to By David Shuster Somewhere amidst the hills of Turnberry, where brave Scots once clashed and bled for concepts like honor and dignity, a man lacquered in orange foundation and stuffed in an armored golf cart recently declared himself victorious--over truth, etiquette, and the concept of par. Yes, Donald J. Trump, the golf world's self-anointed Hercules of the Handicap, has added another golden feather to his cap--a cap, one assumes, that was marked "Make Mulligans Great Again." According to multiple reports and videos, the President of these Disunited States trampled the rules of golf like a rhinoceros loose on the 18th green. Trump moved his ball not once, not twice, but habitually. Shots were reimagined, distances conveniently forgotten, and and net worth declarations. Trump waddled across Turnberry like an overweight duck, proclaiming imaginary eagles while his playing partners blinked into the wind. Cameras captured some of Trump's cheating. Including the surreal moment his own caddie pulled a ball out of a pocket and threw it onto the fairway, safely away from a sandy bunker Trump had targeted like an expert. The hosts of openly laughed at Trump and his co-conspirator, with one anchor declaring, "come on, you can't be doing that." Let's be clear. The game of golf, admittedly , is governed by a code of honor. A golfer keeps his or her own score and plays the ball where it lies. A true golfer does not helicopter into the rough, kick his ball back onto the fairway with the discretion of a Clydesdale, and then claim a birdie with the sanctimony of a choirboy. enough to be a golf pairing. A few years ago, Sportswriter Rick Reilly wrote a book titled "Commander in Cheat"-- based on the author's interviews with Trump caddies. Trump's own employees noted Trump cheats all the time and said Trump kicks his golf balls into better positions so frequently that the caddies call Trump, "Pele," as in the soccer star. | | ---|---|--- It is a marvel, truly, how. Whether it's real estate, politics, or a gentleman's game in the Scottish breeze, Trump arrives and deploys the same behavior: bluster, fraud, and a pathological allergy to losing. One imagines Trump at the Battle of Bannockburn, insisting the Scots had surrendered because he said so , and awarding himself a Medal of Honor for "tremendous courage under metaphorical fire." The golf ball, like the truth, remains indifferent to Trump's wishes. And yet he bludgeons both with equal enthusiasm. He is the first man in history to lose at golf while insisting he won, to claim the moral high ground while knee-deep in bunkers of his own making. If golf reveals character, then Trump is a man whose soul resembles a water hazard: shallow, murky, and surrounded by warning signs. Thankfully, the game of golf has survived far worse than Trump. Golf has persevered . What matters is that we, the public, remember what the Scots knew long ago. The wind may howl , but in the end the scorecard doesn't lie. . | | ---|---|--- Clad in Titleist and swinging a club over the graves of decency and decorum--and his first wife, Ivana; yes, her obviously sentimental burial was on his golf course in Bedminster, NJ--Donald Trump is not a golfer. He is a cheat. David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITCA79ZIkpZm9W8Phbh2bOzNdvByoQ6NI5L3f2hg-w1EGSWmZMfH9iZH-G54O54fGCG68Gxih1VCd9TjuxoGlI2CAknK4SF8NULKYWwKamKl2O2HcumZaayiBlXDFcJuIgdiWXKaf7OiuGG3Mx6yzhPo1HtaVSobxV9U1Cx5n9OqZavGy326C_ZNko9woHnJps7o56GyX5xUaZtNHvgi9y6Q/4il/k0dvpfhVRS2BGe-wEDmdSQ/h0/h001.mlInFzSG6BxxnJARfnBupLumSVHRYDHb0p4m3gSEsJQ)
---
Peter,

When you are running for Congress in a district that spans more than 7,000 square miles, you learn quickly that nothing happens by accident. The doors do not knock themselves. The maps do not organize themselves. The press releases, the policy plans, the car rides across seven counties in one week--none of it runs without real people showing up, planning ahead, and working their hearts out. And the truth is, we can only do that work if we know we'll have the resources to back it up. **That 's why I'm asking you to consider becoming a monthly donor to our campaign.**
---
[ **BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR TODAY** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUC8UJht8Wlu-rwGwsSa82fKfjzLCpOr6F_SXfz0EZmbUK7OqDomlSxXZzuOphPiTlJwIXGy8QMiC2f0VbDCPG8-2kFDV0K8XuZgSPP_pmRoorBetXuKSGwYrZ0FSz4OVYU64ZGMzprueI6TdV0qylPD0zmU9oWaclfIGgXdE2l72kQ8d5uiyJzaGcUsvcDlbMyAbYCC1RnQVFvaSxwiU9dhou6tfbdKxH2NkNRS8DhGkeVJjvI2VHE5fa2goayB99QzSjV_x2DvgfPtE7SmlaNByELTkeLa9HSlKz09ycddEJWPtz8Dou59NAkbtoSQm_s/4il/k0dvpfhVRS2BGe-wEDmdSQ/h1/h001.1OBceZDIKT4g_mHEsKvl6DIWaZq1aIBqEsMcXJMBaVg)
---
Recurring donations are the engine of any grassroots movement. They allow us to build a budget that is stable and strategic without relying on last-minute fundraising flurries or one-night surges. That's the kind of sustainability that lets us hire staff, book venues, and order printed materials weeks ahead of time instead of juggling finances to make sure we'll have enough in the bank. Unlike my opponent, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, we are not running this race with corporate PAC money or cash from rent gouging real estate industries. We are not flying off to elite conferences in DC funded by right-wing billionaires and collecting checks from them. We are not giving keynote speeches about how to purge working people from the Democratic Party. **We are building something honest and driven by our friends and neighbors. ** And we are doing it in the face of an opponent who has abandoned the most basic tenets of the Democratic Party.
An opponent who has championed legislation that insults the disability community and every civil rights activist who paved the way for leaders with chronic illness, neurological conditions, and invisible disabilities to serve with honor. If we are going to win this race, and bring honest Democratic leadership back to WA-03, we need steady hands behind us. We need you. [**Will you become a monthly donor to help us build a campaign rooted in care, courage, and community?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUC8UJht8Wlu-rwGwsSa82fKfjzLCpOr6F_SXfz0EZmbUK7OqDomlSxXZzuOphPiTlJwIXGy8QMiC2f0VbDCPG8-RKxCwHlTOzMENGjI38nA0WSi14-nLMxy5dDdzRWmDihVzJr0UaBYhkHMIcbzQAtZKHvz3qFjGwUvuHrYOlO4R8VV-y3LULBUr60PUrcqJEEyG4QWY_BfbUlxBZg9WEwOYrTLO2C-BLz9U8mBKoOTurSS9Tvy0SnU6mWZvbA87H2dMpwuapt4RFo7vESsysP811Cf9Da3SI4QLWtMh2PTMyqxIcmfcnua5eSCBMJ_0to/4il/k0dvpfhVRS2BGe-wEDmdSQ/h2/h001.JDfpgonDFHT1nmZLKtlWaV0Mww6WwJ3sQnvcrjE2yQk) Let's Heal Washington! Brent Hennrich

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: One win away from breaking a GOP supermajority.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Democrats are just one seat away from breaking the GOP supermajority in the Iowa Senate. This is a toss-up race, so it’s imperative that we build an unstoppable movement and reach every voter we can. | | |
---
| |
---|---

But this race is a TOSS-UP, so it’s imperative that Democrats build an unstoppable movement and reach every voter we can. ** [A generous group of donors is triple-matching every donation to the DLCC ahead of our July 31st deadline. name: Lamisa
subject: A Big Hello from Your New Organizing Manager!
body:
My name is Lamisa, and I'm excited to introduce myself as the new Organizing Manager at End Citizens United! | | |
---
| |
---
| | Hi Friend, My name is **Lamisa** , and I'm excited to introduce myself as the new **Organizing Manager at End Citizens United**! I’ve spent the past several years organizing for different campaigns–starting with a local race where the candidate took a bold stand against corporate greed. Since then, I’ve been all in on fighting back against big money in politics. Now, I’m bringing that passion to ECU, and I can’t wait to organize _with you_. We’re kicking things off with an **organizing briefing TOMORROW** , and you’re invited! ECU just launched our own organizing effort ahead of the midterms next year. During the call, we will:
* Break down our strategy
* Talk about what’s at stake
* Share ways you can get involved

🗓️**** Date: **Wednesday, July 30th (TOMORROW!) ****⏰** Time: **7:00 pm ET**

clean_body: My name is Lamisa, and I'm excited to introduce myself as the new Organizing Manager at End Citizens United! | | | | | | | Hi Friend, My name is Lamisa , and I'm excited to introduce myself as the new Organizing Manager at End Citizens United! I’ve spent the past several years organizing for different campaigns–starting with a local race where the candidate took a bold stand against corporate greed. Since then, I’ve been all in on fighting back against big money in politics. Now, I’m bringing that passion to ECU, and I can’t wait to organize with you. We’re kicking things off with an organizing briefing TOMORROW , and you’re invited! ECU just launched our own organizing effort ahead of the midterms next year. During the call, we will: Break down our strategy Talk about what’s at stake Share ways you can get involved 🗓️ Date: Wednesday, July 30th (TOMORROW!) **⏰ Time: 7:00 pm ET | | In the meantime, I invite you to join our growingonline organizing community on Slack. It’s where we share ideas, stay connected, and take action together. We’re building a powerful network, and your voice is an important part of it.** | | Ready to make a difference? Let’s build something powerful – together. Can’t wait to meet you tomorrow! More coming soon, Lamisa HasanOrganizing ManagerEnd Citizens United | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund 100 M Street SE Suite 1050 Washington, DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
|
#
---
We just celebrated Portland Pride, Peter, and it reminded me of exactly what I’m fighting to protect: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369605/560281907/-773863328?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTdlZDM2My1jMjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lTqfFqZD1dqq_m5ZpsqbNYGSqj-bz48NAkKqmCLoHl4=) **The right to live authentically — free from hatred or government interference.** Coming out in my early twenties wasn’t easy, but I learned through that journey that being out became a personal responsibility, a way to rise above intolerance, a way to change the world around me. I’m committed to continuing the work to make sure Oregon remains a place where we can live authentically, love who we love, and all thrive together. name: Mantra Dave
subject: Just as we feared…
body:
The GOP is targeting our district. | [
](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369628/560282127/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODcwYzgxOGEtYzI2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0oWhvXpYHIjSwjv6lhZqsF54wRS0Bjvj01BCQ_U3sg=) | Peter, Just as we feared: Our opponent Kevin Lincoln jumped into the race, and now national Republicans are wasting no time trying to tear Josh down. [_**They just launched a new attack ad filled with lies and misinformation. Click here to see it for yourself and then donate to help us fight back!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369629/560282128/1193560592?&refcode=E14386-20250729-AttackAd-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODcwYzgxOGEtYzI2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0oWhvXpYHIjSwjv6lhZqsF54wRS0Bjvj01BCQ_U3sg=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369630/560282129/1193560592?&refcode=E14386-20250729-AttackAd-Image-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODcwYzgxOGEtYzI2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0oWhvXpYHIjSwjv6lhZqsF54wRS0Bjvj01BCQ_U3sg=)** [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369631/560282130/1193560592?&refcode=E14386-20250729-AttackAd-SB-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODcwYzgxOGEtYzI2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D0oWhvXpYHIjSwjv6lhZqsF54wRS0Bjvj01BCQ_U3sg=) It’s not a coincidence that Republicans are launching this attack ad right after our opponent launched his campaign. Josh has the courage to stand up to them, and they don’t like it, so they’re trying to take him down. **Let’s be clear: Donald Trump and Speaker Mike Johnson are targeting California’s 9th district. This summer, our EMILYs List women are _everywhere_. They're showing up in communities, city halls, and state capitols while Republican opponents hide behind dark money and extreme agendas. Our candidates are doing more, working harder, and putting people first.

But here's the hard truth: Republicans are still outraising us. I know "fundraising numbers" can sound like just another political headline, but behind every dollar is something real. More funding means more field offices, more organizers knocking doors, more ads reaching undecided voters, and more chances to push back against Republican disinformation.

Republicans know this. That's why they’re already pouring _millions_ into these races — trying to outspend us before voters even tune in. This is alarming, but we’re still early enough in the cycle to make ground.

clean_body: EMILYs List women are fighting for our rights. But Republicans are flooding the field with cash. | = Hi Peter, I'm Callie Fines, CFO at EMILYs List, and I wanted to personally check in with you. This summer, our EMILYs List women are everywhere. They're showing up in communities, city halls, and state capitols while Republican opponents hide behind dark money and extreme agendas. Our candidates are doing more, working harder, and putting people first. But here's the hard truth: Republicans are still outraising us. I know "fundraising numbers" can sound like just another political headline, but behind every dollar is something real. More funding means more field offices, more organizers knocking doors, more ads reaching undecided voters, and more chances to push back against Republican disinformation. Republicans know this. That's why they’re already pouring millions into these races — trying to outspend us before voters even tune in. This is alarming, but we’re still early enough in the cycle to make ground. That's why I'm reaching out today. We're updating supporter records across the country as we look ahead, and here's what we pulled for you: Supporter Record for Peter 📅 Cycle: 2025–2026 💪 Status: Pending Support | = Every dollar you give now powers the women who are on the frontlines — running for governor, state legislature, Congress, and beyond — to protect our freedoms and defend reproductive rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List Thank you for your support! Donation records are tied to email address, so if you've donated very recently, with a different email address, or offline, the information above may not reflect your complete donor record. But don't worry, we have your gift recorded! = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? subject: The least productive Congress in HISTORY

body:
Yet, they cause so much damage...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369934/560283218/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250729Least_N_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzU4NDEyZi1jMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ciYxIRuYl5UpRUTqbSqr_jVsgsMomACLmgNZ_2w5qLg=) Trump is taking us backwards, Peter.

It has been reported that this GOP-led Congress is one of the least productive in history – passing only 27 bills. Even with a GOP majority in the House, Senate, and White House, Republicans are still plagued by chaos and disarray.

Despite this fact, Republicans have managed to make the largest cuts to Medicaid and SNAP in US history. They have slashed funding for our communities, from education to food safety, and have even gone as far as to claw back funding that was already approved on a bipartisan basis for foreign aid programs, public broadcasting, and more.

While they have accomplished _almost nothing_ , most of the GOP-led efforts have been detrimental to our nation and have contributed to making life more expensive for the vast majority of people. All so they could give massive handouts to billionaires.

[**We’ve seen enough. We must flip the House blue and hold Republicans accountable for their destruction, but we cannot do it alone. Together,

Team Shontel Brown
Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially in the race for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m ready to serve again.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369960/560283250/-1403504116?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_CooperSplit_250729_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZkOGE1MC1jMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A1U9SYoSBaOnWVKDK9mMCUWhnqwV8ROFd9bb7bH7Zas=) With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: **I am running for U.S. Senate.**

**I’m Roy Cooper.** I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor.

[**_Now, I am asking for your support to serve our nation as the next Democratic United States Senator from North Carolina. I’m grateful that the Ohio Democratic Party is already on our team, and if you’re ready to join us, please split a donation between our team and theirs right now >>>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112369961/560283251/-1403504116?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_CooperSplit_250729_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZkOGE1MC1jMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A1U9SYoSBaOnWVKDK9mMCUWhnqwV8ROFd9bb7bH7Zas=)

Democrats’ best hope of stopping the chaos in Washington is to retake the Senate in 2026, and our race here in NC is set to be the most competitive election next year. We can’t take back the Senate without flipping this seat from red to blue — and The Hill has rated our race the most likely Senate seat to flip.

Here’s something you may not know about me: **I’ve already won some of the most competitive elections here in battleground North Carolina.** I won my elections for Governor in 2016 and 2020 — the same years that Donald Trump carried the state.

NC is one of the last, true purple states, but we’ve proven together that Democrats can win. We know what we have to do.

As Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, cleaner air and water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy.

**I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward.**

[**_I have never taken running for office lightly, and I know that winning this race won’t be easy. But together, we’ve won the toughest fights before. We can win now. clean_body: I’m ready to serve again. | = With great humility and endless hope for the future of America, I have an announcement to make: I am running for U.S. Senate. I’m Roy Cooper. I had the honor of serving North Carolina as Attorney General and Governor. = Democrats’ best hope of stopping the chaos in Washington is to retake the Senate in 2026, and our race here in NC is set to be the most competitive election next year. We can’t take back the Senate without flipping this seat from red to blue — and The Hill has rated our race the most likely Senate seat to flip. Here’s something you may not know about me: I’ve already won some of the most competitive elections here in battleground North Carolina. I won my elections for Governor in 2016 and 2020 — the same years that Donald Trump carried the state. NC is one of the last, true purple states, but we’ve proven together that Democrats can win. We know what we have to do. As Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, cleaner air and water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. I will not back down. I refuse to let Republicans in Washington take this country backward. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Roy Cooper and the Ohio Democratic Party: = = = = = = Thank you for being with me, Roy Cooper = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

| | It's Molly. If you don't know me already, I'm Jeff's Finance Director. With just a few days left until our July fundraising deadline, I wanted to give you a quick update: we're within reach of our campaign launch goal, and with you on our team, I know we can close the gap. Every dollar we raise by midnight on July 31 will go directly to expanding our organizing efforts, fighting back against whatever Republicans throw at us, and powering rapid-response efforts to hold Trump and his allies accountable. The road to taking back the Democratic Senate Majority runs through races like ours, and we must build a powerful, engaged grassroots movement to win this race and supercharge Democratic candidates down the ballot, too. From protecting our freedoms to fighting for working Oregonians to defending democracy, Jeff has never wavered in taking on Donald Trump and the MAGA agenda. He's one of the Senate's boldest progressive voices, and he's exactly the kind of leader we need in this critical moment. [**But none of this work happens without grassroots support. Every dollar we raise by midnight on July 31 will go directly to expanding our organizing efforts, fighting back against whatever Republicans throw at us, and powering rapid-response efforts to hold Trump and his allies accountable. The road to taking back the Democratic Senate Majority runs through races like ours, and we must build a powerful, engaged grassroots movement to win this race and supercharge Democratic candidates down the ballot, too. From protecting our freedoms to fighting for working Oregonians to defending democracy, Jeff has never wavered in taking on Donald Trump and the MAGA agenda. He's one of the Senate's boldest progressive voices, and he's exactly the kind of leader we need in this critical moment. = = Thank you, Molly McGuire Finance Director Jeff Merkley for Oregon | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Peter,

The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country -- **stopping** criminals, **deporting** illegal aliens, and **enforcing** our immigration laws.

But instead of support, they're being smeared by radical activists, open-border politicians, and the liberal media. **T****hey 're being called racist. Oppressive. Even heartless.**

**We won 't stand for that.** Heritage Action is launching our **National ICE Survey** to show that the American people stand with our defenders -- not the lawbreakers.

**Will you take just 30 seconds to make your voice heard?**

clean_body: The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country... | | | Peter, The men and women of Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) risk their lives to protect this country -- stopping criminals, deporting illegal aliens, and enforcing our immigration laws. But instead of support, they're being smeared by radical activists, open-border politicians, and the liberal media. They 're being called racist. Oppressive. Even heartless. We won 't stand for that. Heritage Action is launching our National ICE Survey to show that the American people stand with our defenders -- not the lawbreakers. Will you take just 30 seconds to make your voice heard? | | By submitting your answers, you'll help Heritage Action deliver a message to DC: We still believe in law and order, and we support the agents who enforce it. subject: We need to level with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump and his MAGA allies don’t take breaks.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250729-5291-footer&t=1&akid=5291%2E420207%2E627Rd7)
We need to level with you, Peter:
**Every summer, political fundraising takes a serious nosedive. People unplug — and we get it.**
But here’s the problem: _Trump and his MAGA allies don’t take breaks_. They’re still out there, dismantling our democracy and attacking our neighbors. And if we sit back, even for a moment, we risk losing so much ground.
That’s why Pramila is fighting harder than ever — for abortion rights, for immigrant families, for working people everywhere — by hosting grassroots organizing trainings and holding the Trump administration accountable in Congress.
But we can’t do this without grassroots support.
**So with our big end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on Thursday night, we have to ask:[Will you step up and chip in $3 to help us reach our $33,000 goal before the deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250729-1?refcode=em20250729-5291&amount=3&refcode2=5291_420207_627Rd7&akid=5291%2E420207%2E627Rd7)**

We need you in this fight — summer slump or not.
Thank you,
Team Jayapal

name: RubenGallegoForArizona.com
subject: 🌞 Team Gallego: We respectfully request that you read this email 🌵
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

🌞 To all of Ruben Gallego’s supporters 🌵
We are asking you, humbly: Don’t click away from this email.
This is one of the last opportunities Ruben has to reach his goals before our end-of-month deadline on Thursday.
And the truth is, the vast majority of people who read this email won’t give; they’ll look the other way. We’re hoping you’re different.

As a matter of fact, _we need you to be different._
As you read this, Ruben is speaking out against Trump and Republicans in Congress as they try to destroy the services millions of Americans depend on. He’s traveling the country to reach people we need to pull to our side. He’s doing interviews and media daily to reach even more people nationwide.

The way we retake the momentum from Trump right now is you.
If everyone reading this donated just $5, we would raise enough to run our operations for months. We would break records. We’d even have enough to support other candidates who are in tough campaigns over the next two years.

Donations of $5 or $10 at a time are the primary way we fund our operations. And believe it or not, none of this comes cheap.
That’s why we need your help. We’re passionate about the way we fundraise because ultimately this campaign is powered by you. But with time running out before this deadline, we’re hoping you can help us meet our goals before midnight on Thursday.

If holding Trump and the GOP accountable, fighting back in Arizona and around the country, and supporting folks who need to win elections to check the Trump's sounds good to you, please:

The way we retake the momentum from Trump right now is you. If everyone reading this donated just $5, we would raise enough to run our operations for months. We would break records. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112370427/560284875/1631137775?refcode=em-7.29.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODczMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjBlODliMy1jNTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q7CundQpAe6P5soUbyoU0f0q3QYR52Co0jfe98ikVvk=)

body:
We’d hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/24Z_uglcS0W47A1eQlEQag2?unsubscribedata=fEj3D7EtbQsG%2FxnZJFQ0rS0fObMqryP03mTYvJaXKB5PUhtRoOhYTj%2FHPf384PjM61VDEe6Sb%2FqnpH7WfV67pMrnzCoPQX%2ByO%2FppSuizfoXHaVt3Rc%2BTqOH4vM8fpyMzIfDgdgSo3GNISx%2FB1gLEMQqa%2B18MpekETbrmCM3nduEGlmnFgdKsABHLqljLxeaQnP%2BVwI6Q5wH1Oqbon9zoJ1P7X41D6oVnsV9khqNgi3UzGMq7JKeh1Maoz7Mm2XdmCYX9xklS874DMr%2FW2JIrny%2FI3hijfPGYhdwEHYR29Hlyef0%2FV5d%2B0VCby4yzUB8jg9svJBkSK%2Bi2OHxR5KDUrVxbee9cMM8F1ufDkGPbffGz9%2FKn9CC%2Fo91WU4dcuGOZ4%2BDWwkyRmfPeuxVk%2B%2Bn4AkdHQz9XuGHGUQp%2BWpFzAqlbnixFzRJdyc4vEzO0BlNm]
You’ll want to see this:

AOC just took a bold stand — and called on Americans everywhere to fight hard too:

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’ll keep this quick:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I wanted to catch you before you log off for the night.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4895%2E35263%2EZjv7Yl)
Hi Peter, I’ll keep this quick: I wanted to catch you before you log off for the evening, because we’re just 2 days away from our July end-of-month deadline, and we still have some ground to cover. Republicans are pushing an agenda that puts the ultra-wealthy first and working families last, and they’re targeting Democrats who actually fight for progress to help hold onto their Senate majority. Our work isn’t just about fighting for what’s right in Wisconsin — it’s about helping Democrats flip seats across the country and fight for the progress we all deserve. **That’s why your grassroots support matters so much right now. If you’re able, will you chip in to help us close the gap?[secure.actblue.com/donate/stb-em-july25](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-july25.PrghHS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4895%2E35263%2EZjv7Yl)** Thanks for being part of this team. — Tammy

Peter,

Jimmy has stood up consistently to fight this Administration and its sweeping deportation policies, cuts to healthcare and nutrition programs for working families, and willingness to increase the national debt.

When we talk about meeting our **$25,000 goal** , it’s not just about fundraising, it’s about fueling this work. It’s about making sure we have the tools to fight for housing that working families can afford, clean air and water for our kids, and public safety rooted in real investment.

We’re proud of what we’ve done so far. But we know the road ahead is long, and the opposition is organized. We need to be ready.

**Riverbend Ranch**
Riverbend Ranch has been around for 35 years, selecting cattle that have higher marbling and tenderness than any other beef. You cannot get this beef in your grocery store. Riverbend Ranch ages their beef for 21 days and you'll find it more tender and flavorful than even the finest restaurants. So, if you're ready to have the best steak of your life, head to https://www.riverbendranch.com. Use promo code: SEAN to get $20 of your first order.
**Delta Rescue**
Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: https://deltarescue.org/
In the historic trade deal with the EU comes a $750 billion investment in U.S. energy over the course of three years. This includes oil, natural gas and nuclear energy, a deal that has the EU buying from the U.S. opposed to Russia which would be a major rearrangement of energy flows. The president also explained how giant windmill eyesores are also the least effective source of energy and harming our environment. From harming thousands of birds and sea life to the undegradable propellers, wind energy is nothing more than a waste of money. Daniel Turner the Founder and Executive Director of Power The Future is here to break down everything in this new energy deal. As Kamala Harris weighs her future, she certainly couldn't be bothered to appear at a youth voters summit. The Gen Z vote is split with 52 percent of men voting Republican and 58 percent of women voting Democrat. Link Lauren is here to weigh in on this gender gap within Gen Z. As President Trump takes on institutions like Harvard and Columbia, are Republicans overall winning the culture war? Woke gargoyles are mad at Sydney Sweeney. Did you know that being hot is actually racist? Link Lauren is here to unpack everything in the cultural landscape.

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Quick note from me on the latest polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I won’t take up too much of your time, but I needed to reach out. |
#
---
Hey folks, this is Mikie Sherrill. I won’t take up too much of your time, but I needed to reach out. The fact is, four polls have now come out showing me with only a razor-thin lead over my opponent Jack Ciattarelli — with more than enough undecided voters to swing the race in his direction. Even worse, the latest poll found that the constant lies being spread about me by Ciattarelli’s super PAC actually work. When enough voters hear these false attacks — and the attacks go unanswered — the data shows that Ciattarelli can pull ahead. Here’s what this all means: **1) We don’t need to panic.** I’ve spent my life running toward tough fights — and I’ve spent my career in public service winning one tough race after another. I’m ready for this challenge. **2) We can’t get complacent.** We need to reach out to every voter we possibly can and make sure they know the truth about my record and my vision for New Jersey’s future. And we need to make sure folks know my opponent’s agenda, which is to support every single move Donald Trump makes no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. **Folks, I’m going to be honest with you: fighting back against the attacks we’re facing, holding our opponent accountable for his record,_and_ spreading our positive vision for the future will all take resources — more resources than we currently have.** **[So that’s why I HAVE to reach out to this grassroots team and ask for support. We’re locked in an incredibly competitive race, and the data is black-and-white that if we sit back and let Ciattarelli’s MAGA backers attack us without fighting back, we may lose this race. Can I count on you to split a few dollars between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC to help power our fight and win this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112371106/560287452/1899267694?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWFhZGVlNWQtYzc2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jrzuXX8Nh9wT60kBDFeXxLM692eNsqWkbFPCNGHuV3k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mikie Sherrill __and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112371107/560287453/1899267694?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWFhZGVlNWQtYzc2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jrzuXX8Nh9wT60kBDFeXxLM692eNsqWkbFPCNGHuV3k=)

name: Wes Moore
subject: This takes more than passion
body:
Peter, can I tell you this?
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=378%2E1086043%2EmuAa_h)
Peter, can I tell you one of the best parts of this job?
It’s the people I get to serve and the team I get to lead: **public servants who believe deeply in Maryland’s future and fight for it every day.**
Together, we’re holding the line against chaos in Washington while making real progress here at home — from boosting public school funding to protecting federal workers and strengthening our economy.
But this work takes more than passion. _It takes grassroots support to keep up our fight._
**[Can you chip in $5 today to sustain our work? Our end-of-month deadline is coming up quick and your support before then will have a big impact.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250729-2?refcode=em-20250729-2&refcode2=378_1086043_muAa_h&akid=378%2E1086043%2EmuAa_h)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250729-2?amount=5&refcode=em-20250729-2&refcode2=378_1086043_muAa_h&akid=378%2E1086043%2EmuAa_h)**
I’ll need you with me to continue making progress for the state we love so much, **_so thank you._**
Elevate,
Wes
[
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250729-2&t=2&refcode2=378_1086043_muAa_h&akid=378%2E1086043%2EmuAa_h)** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: The GOP is trying to tip the scales in their favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Trump and national Republicans are trying to recruit a new candidate to enter this race.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1673%2E582294%2ECsCzaT)
Team,
Right now it’s being reported that Donald Trump and national Republicans are working behind the scenes to recruit a hand-picked candidate to run for Senate in New Hampshire. They think they can hand pick someone, boost them with millions, and flip this seat to push their extreme MAGA agenda.
But we have something they don’t: a grassroots team that knows New Hampshire and shows up when it counts.
Chris Pappas is running for Senate to continue fighting for working families and communities across the Granite State. But he needs your help if he’s going to win.
We have just a few days left to hit our end-of-month goal of raising $20,000 from emails just like this one.**And we can’t afford to fall short.**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Dear Peter,
It’s Katie Porter. We’ve set a goal of raising $80,000 by the end of the month, and I want you to hear directly from me about why.
It takes tens of millions of dollars to run a winning campaign in California. We need these resources to buy TV ads, pay staff, and travel across the state meeting voters in their communities.
While a lot of this spending happens in the last few months before the election, the fundraising is a year-round endeavor, because we can’t raise millions of dollars overnight.
For a campaign like this one that rejects donations from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, we have to work even harder to secure the resources we need to win.
That’s why we set goals every month, even a year before the election, to keep us on track.
Like every campaign I’ve run before, I’m counting on grassroots donations to help me get into office, so I can fight like hell for working families.
**[Will you please consider chipping in $5 today? Every dollar will help us hit our goal in 2 days—and win the election next year.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250729_1_ak?refcode=em20250729-39935&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39935_3422442_mDzc5_&akid=39935%2E3422442%2EmDzc5_)**
—Katie

On the campaign trail last year, Donald Trump promised the American people transparency about the Jeffrey Epstein files. **But that was before the Justice Department told Trump that his name appears “multiple times” in the files**.
Now, Trump is calling the case a “hoax” and refuses to appoint a special counsel to investigate it. His Senate Republican colleagues are blocking a resolution to release the files. And his inner circle at the White House is doing everything they can to keep the truth from coming out.
Why, friend? What is there to hide?
It’s disturbing to know Trump is specifically named in official government documents about such horrifying crimes. Transparency and accountability is the _least_ that the American people – and Epstein’s victims – deserve in this case.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112371809/560289897/1833512440?refcode=250729_MFC_SpeakUP_Wrench&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDAwYWFjMC1jODZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Uon6PvtdnhHRC4gnSW1HH93SeZphrtrggk1BHu_D-w=) Folks, it’s hard to watch Trump dismantle our government and democracy. **_But I am here to remind you - together, we can stop some of the terrible things and minimize the harm of his administration._** At Speak Up PAC, we are supporting people, candidates, and organizations that are standing in the way of Trump. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
Hey folks,
Our team is hard at work reaching voters across the Commonwealth about Jay's vision for our future. Here’s one of Jay’s top supporters out knocking doors!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?]
We can’t all be as cute as Jay’s #1 fan, but every single person on this team played an invaluable role in getting us this far. Thanks to your support, our team was able to win the Democratic nomination for Attorney General and get one step closer to defeating MAGA extremist Jason Miyares this November.
But it’s no easy cruise to the finish line.
This race is shaping up to be one of the closest in the country this year – last time, Miyares won by less than a percentage point!
Miyares and his rich buddies are ready to spend millions to protect this seat because they know that Jay Jones will stand in the way of Trump's dangerous agenda.
With less than four months until Election Day, we’re running at full speed – and we need you to join us. With your help, we can win this tough race and flip Virginia blue.
Can you fuel our grassroots effort by chipping in $15 right now? Your donation will help us train more volunteers, print canvassing materials, and keep our ads on air – and we need all the help we can get: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election_em_q32025?amount=15]

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Real efficient of them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The contrast couldn’t be more stark

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---
You might have recently seen the news that Speaker Johnson ended the House session very early to avoid having to vote on releasing the Epstein files. That’s how far they will go to evade transparency and follow Trump’s orders. So, even though the country is experiencing an affordability crisis right now, House Republicans would rather not get to work on it. Even though inflation surged by 2.7% in June, House Republicans would rather not get to work on it. Even though child care costs are now more expensive than a mortgage in 45 states — and have jumped 29% since 2020 — House Republicans would rather not get to work on it. Real efficient of them. This halt in the House of Representatives is just another way Trump and the GOP are not making good on their promise to lower costs for families. But I’m still going to keep doing everything I can to pass important plans and get things done for the American people. In fact, I’ve recently introduced my bipartisan “Renewing Opportunity in the American Dream to Housing Act” — which would invest in expanding housing supply and address the housing affordability crisis. It just passed in the Senate Banking Committee. I’m going to keep fighting to pass the policies that will help working people _right now._ GOP leadership is free to pitch in whenever they come to their senses and realize that they’re here to represent the voters who elected them — not Donald Trump. [**We must keep fighting with the tools and the Congress that we have — and I’m knocking on every single door that might be open to making real change. Will you chip in anything you can to help fuel this work in the Senate?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=8&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---

---
The contrast couldn’t be more stark. As college becomes increasingly out of reach for students, the GOP responds by reducing Pell grants and federal loans for students. Health care costs are skyrocketing, and the GOP thinks it’s a good idea to kick 16 million people off of their health insurance. While costs climb for basics like groceries and household items, Trump and his lackeys in Congress are doubling down on their disastrous on-again off-again tariff policies. And now they’re showing that they’d rather shield the Epstein files that Donald Trump doesn’t want discussed instead of doing anything to tackle the affordability crisis we’re in. Democrats must retake our majorities in the Senate and the House in order to mitigate the damage from the Trump administration and actually pass the economic reforms that working families need — and I’ll do everything I can to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026. But I also refuse to throw my hands up and wait until then to try to make progress. **I’m going to keep trying to get things done with the Congress we do have now, fight back against the far-right, and elect more fighters for the working class in 2026 and beyond.** [**If you’re able to, will you pitch in whatever makes sense to support our grassroots movement focused on making real progress for working people? I would be incredibly grateful.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=14&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3068?t=12&akid=2605%2E4032634%2EvvKoc3)
---

body:
This seat is a must-win if we want the majority in 2026.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112372265/560291310/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUyZDRkYy1jYTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ86XHkUTuZBRu3i3O3E_OYTS5YeZzXzeL21OYLT9M0=&emci=dbe134f8-f56b-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=01e2d4dc-ca6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9818364)
---

| | After the damage Senate Republicans have wrought this month – from their Medicaid-gutting tax cut for billionaires to their defunding of public broadcasting outlets – it's never been clearer that **we must take back Congress in 2026.** Fortunately, an incredible candidate just stepped up in one of our best opportunities to flip a seat: **former North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper announced yesterday that he's running for Senate.** North Carolina's open seat is a must-win if we want to take the majority. [**Together, we can win this race and elect a proven people's champion to the Senate. Will you split a contribution of $3 or another amount that's right for you between Roy's campaign and mine to get him started off strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112372266/560291311/-1250297202?refcode=2025-07-28-cooper-launch&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=01e2d4dc-ca6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUyZDRkYy1jYTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ86XHkUTuZBRu3i3O3E_OYTS5YeZzXzeL21OYLT9M0=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112372267/560291312/-1250297202?refcode=2025-07-28-cooper-launch&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=01e2d4dc-ca6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUyZDRkYy1jYTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ86XHkUTuZBRu3i3O3E_OYTS5YeZzXzeL21OYLT9M0=) Republicans are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. **Roy's had enough.** He knows these are no ordinary times. He's running because elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don't seem to share that sense of duty. They're tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires' pockets. They're cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe. _They're punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong._ Something has to give. There's another path. When Roy was Governor of North Carolina, they _expanded_ Medicaid. They passed pay raises for public school teachers and built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in the people. _Washington can look like this, too._ It's time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve. If this is the America you believe in, Roy's campaign is for you. [**Roy's in for a tough election in North Carolina, but he's won the toughest races before. Your donation today will help him take on the challenge of one of the most competitive Senate races in 2026. Please give whatever is right for you and split a donation between our campaigns today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112372268/560291313/-1250297202?refcode=2025-07-28-cooper-launch&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=01e2d4dc-ca6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWUyZDRkYy1jYTZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJ86XHkUTuZBRu3i3O3E_OYTS5YeZzXzeL21OYLT9M0=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Roy Cooper and Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: This seat is a must-win if we want the majority in 2026. | | | | After the damage Senate Republicans have wrought this month – from their Medicaid-gutting tax cut for billionaires to their defunding of public broadcasting outlets – it's never been clearer that we must take back Congress in 2026. Fortunately, an incredible candidate just stepped up in one of our best opportunities to flip a seat: former North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper announced yesterday that he's running for Senate. North Carolina's open seat is a must-win if we want to take the majority. = = Republicans are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. Roy's had enough. He knows these are no ordinary times. He's running because elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don't seem to share that sense of duty. They're tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires' pockets. They're cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe. They're punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong. Something has to give. There's another path. When Roy was Governor of North Carolina, they expanded Medicaid. They passed pay raises for public school teachers and built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in the people. Washington can look like this, too. It's time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve. If this is the America you believe in, Roy's campaign is for you. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Roy Cooper and Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Onward, Ron | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. clean_body: Do you approve of Donald Trump, Peter? | Peter, A Gallup poll just reported that President Donald Trump’s job approval rating has dipped to 37%, the lowest of this term. And it’s no surprise. He’s gutting programs that millions of seniors and working families rely on. He’s eroding democratic institutions and weakening the guardrails that protect our freedoms. And he’s using the presidency to boost his own wealth and reward his billionaire allies. We just launched a live poll to confirm that Trump’s approval is cratering — and we need your response: | LIVE POLL: Do you approve of Donald Trump? | | ---|--- Thank you for speaking out. — Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable and expose his broken promises — but we can’t do it without you!
