name: Jesse Binnall, The Kash Foundation
subject: Law enforcement officers are being handcuffed
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e28470617/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRlFHRlpnalNXWg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3Mjk/LbmNsN3laUzZ6Qg/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V002STV5dlBscw/gaIlMXA/sdpb2a16fde)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e28470617/VaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vc2ItZG9uYXRlLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3Mjk/LbmNsN3laUzZ6Qg/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1rZjI1MDcyOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwOTNfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWxvZ28/gaIlMXA/s2t08bdc961)
Patriot,

You, me, and every American should be terrified.

Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country:
* In _**Los Angeles**_ , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots.

* In _**Washington, D.C.**_ , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement.

* In _**Chicago**_ , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.”

* In _**Texas**_ , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of _“whipping”_ illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted.

**You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge.**

But I have a plan to fight back.

My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation.

[The Kash Foundation, founded by Kash Patel, supports law enforcement who are being politically targeted, wrongfully prosecuted, and silenced for doing their jobs.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

_Although Kash has been called to a new mission,_ the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability.

But we can’t do it alone.

[Please donate any amount you can afford to support the Kash Foundation’s mission today. We are looking to raise $56,000 this month to support our nation’s law enforcement. Click here to donate >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[DONATE](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price.

This is what is at stake:
* **The radical Left is targeting law enforcement:** They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back.

* **Crime is spilling into every neighborhood:** Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities.

* **Emergency response is slowing down:** In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives.

Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country.

The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth.

And we’re asking you to join the force.

Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe.

[Please donate today because when law enforcement calls for backup, you answer!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[DONATE](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
When others turned their backs, we stepped in.

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:

* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

And with your help, we’ll do even more.

**You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear.**

We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold.

[So with that in mind, if you can afford to send $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even more – I hope you do.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[DONATE $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Thank you for answering the call and fighting with The Kash Foundation for a better future, promoting public interest, civil liberty protections, and real justice.

For law, order, and liberty,

Jesse Binnall
President
The Kash Foundation
Disclaimer: _Kash Patel founded the Kash Foundation but is no longer affiliated in any capacity. The Kash Foundation is an independent nonprofit not endorsed by, associated with, or influenced by the Federal Bureau of Investigation, the Department of Justice, or any government agency._

The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution.

If you would like to make a tax-deductible gift to The Kash Foundation via check, a family foundation, donor-advised fund, or qualified contribution from your IRA or other retirement account, you can find our EIN and mailing address below:

**EIN:** 88-1807315

**Address:**
The Kash Foundation
717 King St., Suite 300
Alexandria, VA. 22314

By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive unlimited calls and recurring SMS/MMS messages, including artificial, pre-recorded, auto-dialed, and automated calls and texts to that number from The Kash Foundation. Msg&data rates may apply. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e28470617/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3Mjk/LbmNsN3laUzZ6Qg/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V002STV5dlBscw/gaIlMXA/sfldef72fac)

name: Powered by People
subject: Our goal and what it means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
The fights are only going to get tougher, and the stakes will only get higher.
#
**Beto needs your help.**
He’s been hard at work mobilizing people across the country to fight back against Trump’s attacks and power grabs.
We can’t afford to let up, which is why we are planning to stay on the road hosting town halls to connect with even more voters.
[**But that takes serious resources. Can you chip in now to help us reach our $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and fund even more town halls?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250729-1.x6FWSt&refcode=ema20250729-240256&t=2&akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250729-1.x6FWSt&refcode=ema20250729-240256&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W)**
Powered by People is built on grassroots support. We can only go as far as supporters like you take us.
So far, we’ve met with thousands of voters, listened to what’s on their minds, and shared real ways they can take action right now to help protect our democracy.
But the fights are only going to get tougher, and the stakes will only get higher.
As we write this, Donald Trump and Greg Abbott are trying to push through a redistricting plan that will strip representation from voters across Texas, and consolidate even more authoritarian power.
That’s why we set a goal of raising $25,000 by the end of July: to make sure we have the resources needed to do _everything possible_ to empower our communities to fight back.
[**Can we count on you to chip in your first $3 to help us show up, organize, and fight what’s happening head on?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250729-1.x6FWSt&refcode=ema20250729-240256&t=4&akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250729-1.x6FWSt&refcode=ema20250729-240256&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250729-240256-footer&t=24&refcode2=240256_444211_56-x7W&akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=240256%2E444211%2E56-x7W).

GOP Rep. Jeff Van Drew **[clashed with gun-grabbing Democrat](https://substack.com/redirect/e77e949f-1f9e-4dc9-91b2-e434158fe939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Rep. Dan Goldman for wanting to "punish" legal gun owners while criminals run wild with firearms.
This was brutal...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e77e949f-1f9e-4dc9-91b2-e434158fe939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e77e949f-1f9e-4dc9-91b2-e434158fe939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Goldman started by **[accusing Republicans of"once again not backing the blue."](https://substack.com/redirect/e77e949f-1f9e-4dc9-91b2-e434158fe939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"They, when it's convenient, want to talk very much about backing the blue, and if someone flees from a law enforcement officer they obviously should be deported, and yet if someone actually commits a crime against a law enforcement officer, totally fine for them to have a gun!" Goldman said.
"If a single Republican member can explain a good rationale that doesn't rely on some blanket 2nd Amendment right,..." he continued, before dropping the thought. "It's just baffling that you're so partisan that you can't even look at an amendment in some sort of objective manner!"
**[Van Drew fired back,"Speak to your local law enforcement! Go out in the streets..."](https://substack.com/redirect/e77e949f-1f9e-4dc9-91b2-e434158fe939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"We're too permissive!" he continued. "We let people out who have committed serious crimes too early and too easily and its wrong! And they are carrying. There's people carrying no matter how restrictive you are because they're carrying illegally!"
"So I guess all the criminals, before they went out and held up a bank, before they went out and killed somebody, they went to a gun store and had a pin put in so they could only carry ten rounds?!" Van Drew joked, referring to New Jersey legal limitations on round capacity.
"Come on!!"
Watch the fiery clash here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e77e949f-1f9e-4dc9-91b2-e434158fe939?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Together with Goldco**
# **[Texas, Florida, and Missouri just rewrote the rules on money](https://substack.com/redirect/91e3e5db-10a4-424d-9d69-e261ac11e594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91e3e5db-10a4-424d-9d69-e261ac11e594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Governor of Florida just created a new opportunity for you. One that could put you ahead for the first time in years.I know this sounds unbelievable, but the details prove everything.
Because on May 27th, Governor DeSantis just signed HB 999 making gold and silver legal tender in Florida, following Missouri. Then on June 29th, Texas followed suit, legalizing Gold as money.
Starting next year, Starting July 2026, Texans, Missourians, and Floridians can pay state taxes with gold coins. They can buy groceries with silver. Even use PayPal for precious metals transactions.
But here's the opportunity, if you're bold enough: When gold restrictions were lifted in '74, smart Americans who got positioned early saw 179% gains by 1980.
That's like getting 18.6% returns a year, for six years straight. And in the past 12 months alone, Goldman Sachs reports that its _**["Nearly doubled the returns of the S&P 500 Index."](https://substack.com/redirect/40b9c7a2-22d9-4807-8bda-42ab5268d3e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
Now this new event could trigger one of its biggest moves yet.
As much as 50% or more in the coming years. But the clock's ticking.
**[>>> Get the details here.](https://substack.com/redirect/91e3e5db-10a4-424d-9d69-e261ac11e594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/91e3e5db-10a4-424d-9d69-e261ac11e594?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: This is worse than I could have imagined
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112372705/560292620/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVmMjYzOC1jYzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8WMBvDczNpCB379EPuH4tdyCELZcbLRUwyD3a634Oo=&emci=b45f2638-cc6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=ba5f2638-cc6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15529135) | Team, Republicans in Congress and the Senate have passed the worst budget proposal I could have imagined. Cutting Medicaid funding and SNAP benefits while _increasing_ the national debt? Ending clean energy programs? Giving high-income people tax cuts, but doing nothing to address the affordability crisis for millions of Americans? It is all wrong. It is a terrible proposal, and I am doing everything I can to stop this budget in its tracks. **But I cannot do it alone. body:
#

Friend — we have three very important things to tell you:
1\. To take back the Senate, Democrats need to hold every seat that’s up for re-election in 2024 — AND take FOUR more seats from the GOP.
2\. There is no one in office today with as much experience winning tough campaigns as Mark.
3\. Mark has become one of the most in-demand surrogates for candidates in must-win campaigns from coast to coast.
What all of that means is that Mark and this team are as busy as we have ever been — and we wouldn’t have it any other way. We can have a real impact this cycle, and Mark’s proud to do the work.
It also means we need to raise a significant amount of resources to keep pace with the demands of this election. And right now, the tough truth is that we’re not hitting our goals.
We have an end-of-month fundraising deadline on July 31st, and it’s a critical milestone. What we raise in the next two days will determine how much Mark can do to turn the tide in 2026.
It’s a lot of pressure, but it’s our hope that this kind of honesty will convince you to pitch in and help us hit our goals.
Now, the ball is in your court. [**So, can you make a donation ($3 or anything you can give) to help Mark catch up and crush his fundraising goal before that deadline on the 31st?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-july25.pQQVdM&refcode=em250729-2-f&t=1&akid=6136%2E6688874%2EmQ7MbO)

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: DNC Launches Distributed Organizing Program, Deploys Grassroots Activists to Contact Voters in Texas to Fight Trump and Abbott’s Gerrymander
body:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
# DNC Launches Distributed Organizing Program, Deploys Grassroots Activists to Contact Voters in Texas to Fight Trump and Abbott’s Gerrymander
---
| | | _DNC has already sent over 250,000 texts to mobilize against Republican’s scheme to rig the maps, will deploy 30,000 volunteers to take action against Texas Republicans_
Today, ahead of the final sham Republican redistricting field hearing in Arlington, the Democratic National Committee announced a new national organizing program aimed at deploying its 30,000 volunteer organizers to contact persuadable Republican and independent Texas voters to let them know exactly how Greg Abbott and legislative Texas Republicans are attempting to disenfranchise their vote and rig the Texas maps at the behest of Donald Trump. Instead of focusing on flood relief, Texas Republicans are focused on rigging the map in a last ditch effort to hold their House majority. Polling shows that this effort is [widely unpopular](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f55bdcb33c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) by Texans of all stripes, and now the DNC is targeting persuadable Texans to let them know the names exactly behind this.Through geotargeting and identification of persuadable Republican targets via the DNC’s data and analytics team, the DNC’s organizing team will make persuasion calls to thousands of Texas voters in key Republican districts along with deploying Texas volunteers to tell their stories and submit public comments, call their own state representatives, and organize in-person and online to build Democratic power in the state. This new initiative adds to the DNC’s robust engagement in the Texas legislative battle already, where organizers have:
* Sent 250,000 texts recruiting Texans to turn out for the redistricting field hearings in Austin, Houston, and Arlington.
* Activated Texas creators to show up and cover the hearings, including 10 more creators today in Arlington.
* Mobilized Texans across the state to share their stories and tell the country how this gerrymandering scheme will affect them through submitting virtual public comments.

**DNC Chair Ken Martin issued the following statement:**

“The DNC is all hands on deck to hold Donald Trump and Greg Abbott accountable for their scheme to use the tragic Texas floods as cover to redraw the Texas maps in a last-ditch effort to save the Republican majority. Through our 30,000 person strong distributed organizing program and our state-of-the-art data and analytics team, for the first time, the DNC will directly call persuadable Texas Republican voters and make sure they know exactly how Texas Republicans are trying to disenfranchise their vote. Republicans know that the only way they hold onto the majority is by rigging the system but it won’t work. Democrats will hold Republicans across the country accountable for their vote to rip away health care and food access and that starts with organizing from the ground up.”**Texas Democratic House Caucus Leader Rep. Gene Wu issued the following statement:**

“The DNC has been a leading supporter of our caucus since Trump and Abbott first introduced this cynical scheme. Their new initiative to contact persuadable Republican voters across the state and deploy organizers directly against Republican state reps is exactly the type of partnership Texas Democrats need. Building power starts across our communities and I thank Chair Martin and the DNC’s distributed organizing program for mobilizing Texans to fight back against this Republican ploy.”

---
| ###
---
|
---
| | | | |

---
| | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/8700b0e661c0/dnc-initial-seven-figure-investment-into-virginia-coordinated-campaign-2710238?e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Trump’s 2025 Economic Revolution Is HereAre Your Retirement Savings Ready? President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country’s history. His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth—if you’re prepared. But here’s the catch:This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account—like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today’s world, all it could take is one major event—another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash—to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard—not just survive—during Trump’s economic revolution, this is your wake-up call. We’ve outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the 2025 Retirement Protection Guide — and it’s completely FREE. Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises. Time is short. Trump’s reforms may be coming fast—and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don’t want to take with your retirement savings. > Get your FREE copy of the2025 Retirement Protection Guide today << GET THE FREE GUIDE Donald Trump is not affiliated with and does not endorse Goldco Direct LLC. name: Fair Shot PAC
subject: While Republicans hide, Democrats show up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
This is how we flip red seats. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373249/560294554/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjgwYTIyZi1jZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrvJCCjNnutRYzHyhEv_g8A6irbo7uF1srzTkGtYKvo=)
---
Peter — Congress might be in recess, but Democrats aren’t taking a break. From deep red districts in Arizona to competitive seats in Nebraska, Democrats are hitting the road this August. They’re holding town halls, talking directly to voters, and exposing the real cost of Trump’s so-called “economic policy” — higher bills, gutted health care, and tax giveaways for billionaires. While Trump and extreme Republicans slash funding for working families, they’re shying away from holding town halls. They’re hiding, dodging questions, and avoiding accountability. But Democrats? They’re showing up, town by town, district by district, to make one thing clear: **👉If Republicans won’t stand up for their constituents, Democrats will.** This is what organizing looks like. And this is how we flip red seats and take back the House. From deep red districts in Arizona to competitive seats in Nebraska, Democrats are hitting the road this August. They’re holding town halls, talking directly to voters, and exposing the real cost of Trump’s so-called “economic policy” — higher bills, gutted health care, and tax giveaways for billionaires. While Trump and extreme Republicans slash funding for working families, they’re shying away from holding town halls. They’re hiding, dodging questions, and avoiding accountability. But Democrats? They’re showing up, town by town, district by district, to make one thing clear: 👉If Republicans won’t stand up for their constituents, Democrats will. This is what organizing looks like. name: New Dems
subject: Trump administration’s cuts, closures, delays to Social Security are hurting Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
We’re sounding the alarm!

| | Earlier this year, Trump’s administration cut nearly 7,000 jobs at the Social Security Administration.

**Not long after, the agency announced plans to close field offices, encourage early retirements, and reassign staff** — _moves that are already leading to longer wait times and delayed access to critical benefits._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373673/560295846/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2JlZGJjMi1jZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7jAIw4pqWnYgXJHgMMHF1O2nCVFmVY9hf9SY1EoSAk=&emci=0f6fc817-b06c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47bedbc2-cf6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [STAND WITH NEW DEMS TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY, ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373675/560295848/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2JlZGJjMi1jZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7jAIw4pqWnYgXJHgMMHF1O2nCVFmVY9hf9SY1EoSAk=&emci=0f6fc817-b06c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47bedbc2-cf6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)
---
With fewer staff and strained resources, many Americans are beginning to feel the impact.

**Millions of children, seniors, and people with disabilities rely on Social Security to cover basic needs like rent, food, and life-saving medication.** Delays in benefits can have serious consequences for those who depend on these programs the most.

**And with the GOP’s recent passage of the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history, vital safety net programs like Social Security are under more pressure than ever.**

**[New Dems are working in Congress to defend these essential programs and protect the people who rely on them but we need your voice in this fight. Will you add your name to stand with us and protect Social Security? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373677/560295850/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2JlZGJjMi1jZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7jAIw4pqWnYgXJHgMMHF1O2nCVFmVY9hf9SY1EoSAk=&emci=0f6fc817-b06c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47bedbc2-cf6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**
[STAND WITH NEW DEMS TO DEFEND SOCIAL SECURITY, ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373678/560295852/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250729_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2JlZGJjMi1jZjZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7jAIw4pqWnYgXJHgMMHF1O2nCVFmVY9hf9SY1EoSAk=&emci=0f6fc817-b06c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=47bedbc2-cf6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

clean_body: We’re sounding the alarm! | | Earlier this year, Trump’s administration cut nearly 7,000 jobs at the Social Security Administration. Not long after, the agency announced plans to close field offices, encourage early retirements, and reassign staff — moves that are already leading to longer wait times and delayed access to critical benefits. | With fewer staff and strained resources, many Americans are beginning to feel the impact. Millions of children, seniors, and people with disabilities rely on Social Security to cover basic needs like rent, food, and life-saving medication. Delays in benefits can have serious consequences for those who depend on these programs the most. And with the GOP’s recent passage of the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history, vital safety net programs like Social Security are under more pressure than ever. Thank you! | | Friend — The vast majority of our legislators in Congress have never been poor. They’ve never been hungry. They’ve never been disabled in an ableist world. [**I ran because it was the natural next step in my work fighting for justice. For peace. For the communities that built me. I ran to bring the voices of our community and people across the country who don’t have a voice and have to fight for everything they have every day. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373702/560296101/-484676713?refcode=E14378-20250729-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE4ZWY0ZTktY2Y2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CHqjYqvNZsk4fm66NcjXU4by8oMj--i3T__ssmAH3B0=) I’m a single mom. I’ve relied on WIC and food stamps. I know the struggle because I’ve been in the struggle my entire life. After seven months in Congress, I see more clearly than ever that we need more fighters like me in Congress to represent the lived experiences of millions of Americans. It’s time our legislature starts looking and sounding a lot more like our community spaces. And in times like these, we need voices like mine, representing the values of our entire community, more than ever. We need a fighter who won’t wait until 2026 to advocate for the people. We need an insurgent voice speaking for us when no one else will. [**My re-election campaign isn’t about just protecting this seat. We’re building the kind of progressive power it’ll take to undo the damage the Trump administration has done and build a stronger social safety net in the years to come. Donate towards my $5,000 July fundraising goal today >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373704/560296138/-484676713?refcode=E14378-20250729-EOM1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE4ZWY0ZTktY2Y2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CHqjYqvNZsk4fm66NcjXU4by8oMj--i3T__ssmAH3B0=) | [**Donate before the end of the month »** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112373709/560296183/-484676713?refcode=E14378-20250729-EOM1-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmE4ZWY0ZTktY2Y2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CHqjYqvNZsk4fm66NcjXU4by8oMj--i3T__ssmAH3B0=)

Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. clean_body: I’m a single mom. I’ve relied on WIC and food stamps. I’ve spent my life fighting for the people too often counted out—because I’ve been one of them. | = = | | Friend — The vast majority of our legislators in Congress have never been poor. They’ve never been hungry. They’ve never been disabled in an ableist world. = I’m a single mom. I’ve relied on WIC and food stamps. I know the struggle because I’ve been in the struggle my entire life. After seven months in Congress, I see more clearly than ever that we need more fighters like me in Congress to represent the lived experiences of millions of Americans. It’s time our legislature starts looking and sounding a lot more like our community spaces. And in times like these, we need voices like mine, representing the values of our entire community, more than ever. We need a fighter who won’t wait until 2026 to advocate for the people. We need an insurgent voice speaking for us when no one else will. = | = Let’s show them just how powerful we are. In gratitude, Lateefah | = = | = = | = = | * | | ---|---|--- Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com = = Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hey, it’s Gabe. As a first-generation Mexican-American, my story reflects the dreams and struggles of many in New Mexico’s 2nd. I never envisioned myself running for Congress. But in 2017, when I saw all the hateful things MAGA extremists were saying about people like my mother — who is a proud Mexican immigrant, single mom and hard worker — I knew New Mexico needed someone who would step up and fight for all of the hardworking people looking to achieve their dreams. = | | = Since 2017, hateful extremist rhetoric has only escalated from Donald Trump and Republicans. Donald Trump thinks he can say whatever disgusting things he wants on Truth Social and face zero consequences. Our community deserves better than that kind of “leadership,” and I’m determined to deliver it. = = | = | = | = | = | = | = Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. # [How You Made Let's Address This #1 -- And What We Must Do With This Platform](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169614004&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NjE0MDA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MzA2MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1NjQyMjYxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vJCU_Ri21lwsw3hVrT2NTHQb7Ecey-Ly5ndrInwf_OM)
### The power of principles over profit, purpose over prejudice, and Palestine over politics
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jul 29
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169614004&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NjE0MDA0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzgzMDYxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzU2NDIyNjEyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8dBuoP1aDBalZ3GDCiWJmZQH8RLOynIVihhvDZBACac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169614004&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NjE0MDA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MzA2MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1NjQyMjYxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vJCU_Ri21lwsw3hVrT2NTHQb7Ecey-Ly5ndrInwf_OM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=169614004&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY5NjE0MDA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NTM4MzA2MTIsImV4cCI6MTc1NjQyMjYxMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vJCU_Ri21lwsw3hVrT2NTHQb7Ecey-Ly5ndrInwf_OM)
---
| | [](https://substack..Rx_svcuMNxazeO_jw-f1xe2VkAhRy4GUwRCJaFHxYJ4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/how-you-made-lets-address-this-1?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-E9HyrgdbiuUjEUFTh5jEfe8IZo-k9n1H5fgtDd0h_U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=169614004)
I firmly believe when you stand by your principles, people of principle stand by you. Earlier this week I reported more than 300 paid subscribers to this human rights newsletter cancelled their subscriptions--many citing my human rights advocacy for Gaza.
**Here 's what has happened since.**
1. I stood by my principles and announced that I'm doubling down on condemning Israel's genocide on Palestinians and asked for more people to raise their voices to stop this holocaust. I held this [hour long live with journalist Wajahat Ali](https://substack.com/redirect/de425183-cf81-4a6d-bee4-9b978cb851d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the need for all Americans to speak up to condemn Israel's genocide on Palestine.
2. You all took action and responded in overwhelming numbers, more than I could have imagined or hoped, and [subscribed to Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/22cbf7d1-defe-4fa1-8c7b-6af04a547de9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
3. And now, just a few days later I woke up to this news.

_**Today, for the first time ever, Let 's Address This is #1 Substack U.S. Politics.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c1edc81-0d83-4355-8a92-24a1d74bda4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_This the power of principles over politics, of purpose over profit, and of Palestine over prejudice._ My immense gratitude to all of you for subscribing and for trusting me. I do not take your investment lightly, and see it as a reflection of my ardent belief that human beings are inherently good.
## What We Do With This Platform
A large platform serves no purpose if we do not use it for good. So, here is my ask of each and every single person reading this: Let us continue to relentlessly raise our voice for Gaza. Children are starving. Children are dying. This is not the time to be silent. This is the time to raise our voices even louder. This is the time to build our coalition for justice.
Accordingly, many have asked how they can support those who are suffering?
Here are three vetted organizations I am supporting for Palestine relief.
* Humanity First: https://humanityfirstusa.org/portfolio/palestine/
* Anera: https://www.anera.org/
* PCRF: https://www.pcrf.net/

I know personally doctors and volunteers for each of these orgs, and can vouch for their direct support of Palestinians. In the coming weeks I am interviewing leaders from some of these orgs. Stay tuned for that soon, and donate today if you can.
## Closing Thoughts
And finally, I must share this with each of you. I recently received a note from someone sending me an apology. Evidently, a year ago they told me to "f*ck off," offended that I called what was happening in Palestine a genocide. They stated that they conflated my criticism of the Israeli government with antisemitism, and now realized their mistake. I was grateful for their note. Then, this person asked, "How can I get involved? I'm afraid if I speak up, people will be upset it took me so long?"
Here's the truth--I am indeed seeing many voices who were silent the last 22 months of genocide, now starting speak up. And, I realize many are still timid or afraid to speak up due to internal backlash from their social circles, and external backlash from social media. To such individuals I make these three points:
1. Welcome to the right side of history, the side of justice and humanity. As Dr. King reminds us, it is always the right time to do what is right.
2. Some (many?) people will be upset with you for being silent and for waiting this long. That does not mean you should stop speaking up. They have a right to their emotions and anger, we have an obligation to continue to speak up for justice. We need all hands on deck to end this genocide, and we invite your voice.
3. How you speak up matters: Elevate Palestinian voices and those who have been doing the work. Donate to the orgs I have linked above, to verified family fundraisers in Gaza, and to journalists on the ground in Gaza doing the work.

Above all, do not relent in upholding justice. Never again cannot merely be a slogan, it must include action. Take action, donate if you can, and at a minimum, continue to speak up for justice and humanity to end this genocide. Thank you for being on the right side of history. Let's elevate our work--together.
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

---|---|---

Today, for the first time ever, Let 's Address This is #1 Substack U.S. Politics. | | ---|---|--- This the power of principles over politics, of purpose over profit, and of Palestine over prejudice. My immense gratitude to all of you for subscribing and for trusting me. I do not take your investment lightly, and see it as a reflection of my ardent belief that human beings are inherently good. What We Do With This Platform A large platform serves no purpose if we do not use it for good. So, here is my ask of each and every single person reading this: Let us continue to relentlessly raise our voice for Gaza. Children are starving. Children are dying. This is not the time to be silent. This is the time to raise our voices even louder. This is the time to build our coalition for justice. Accordingly, many have asked how they can support those who are suffering? Here are three vetted organizations I am supporting for Palestine relief. Humanity First: Anera: PCRF: I know personally doctors and volunteers for each of these orgs, and can vouch for their direct support of Palestinians. In the coming weeks I am interviewing leaders from some of these orgs. Stay tuned for that soon, and donate today if you can. Closing Thoughts And finally, I must share this with each of you. I recently received a note from someone sending me an apology. Evidently, a year ago they told me to "fck off," offended that I called what was happening in Palestine a genocide. They stated that they conflated my criticism of the Israeli government with antisemitism, and now realized their mistake. I was grateful for their note. Then, this person asked, "How can I get involved? I'm afraid if I speak up, people will be upset it took me so long?" Here's the truth--I am indeed seeing many voices who were silent the last 22 months of genocide, now starting speak up. And, I realize many are still timid or afraid to speak up due to internal backlash from their social circles, and external backlash from social media. To such individuals I make these three points: 1. Welcome to the right side of history, the side of justice and humanity. As Dr. King reminds us, it is always the right time to do what is right. 2. Some (many?) people will be upset with you for being silent and for waiting this long. That does not mean you should stop speaking up. They have a right to their emotions and anger, we have an obligation to continue to speak up for justice. We need all hands on deck to end this genocide, and we invite your voice. 3. How you speak up matters: Elevate Palestinian voices and those who have been doing the work. Donate to the orgs I have linked above, to verified family fundraisers in Gaza, and to journalists on the ground in Gaza doing the work. Above all, do not relent in upholding justice. Never again cannot merely be a slogan, it must include action. Take action, donate if you can, and at a minimum, continue to speak up for justice and humanity to end this genocide. Thank you for being on the right side of history. Let's elevate our work--together. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

| |
# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d6f58a6687&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=12c96106f0&e=5bd167f239 "Where do Latinos stand on the Issues? #bythenumbers | LIVE from NALEO Atlanta")
---

**LIVE from[NALEO Atlanta](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a17328a4e3&e=5bd167f239)**

_**Where do Latinos stand on the Issues?**_

**Analyzing the latest CBS News Poll**
With Nick Valencia & Fin Gómez

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 24
| Live from outside the **NALEO conference in Atlanta** , Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid are joined by veteran journalist **Nick Valencia ([Nick Valencia Live](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=6c4dd4df16&e=5bd167f239)/formerly CNN) and [CBS political contributor](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=14ee6b32c5&e=5bd167f239) Fin Gómez** to unpack seismic shifts in Latino politics. They unpack the [**latest CBS News polling**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=fef5f87ee3&e=5bd167f239) on Latino voters, analyze how immigration and economic discontent are driving voters away from both parties, and spotlight the **redistricting chaos looming in Texas and California**. From the streets of Delano to the suburbs of Atlanta, this episode explores the real-life consequences of political decisions—and why 2026 might be the most consequential off-year for Latino communities yet.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[CBS News poll finds support for Trump's deportation program falls; Americans call for more focus on prices](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=f876df6adb&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[Dreams of Delano: The Quiet Erosion of the Legacy of Cesar Chavez](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c413dc792e&e=5bd167f239) By: Nick Valencia Live

[RNC chair Michael Whatley and former Gov. Roy Cooper plan to run for North Carolina Senate seat, sources say](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=9f0a57b0a9&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[Immigration Enforcement Leads To Political Activism Among California Latinos](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=743762dce5&e=5bd167f239) By: KQED

[Dems' sanctuary policies shield 'gangbangers,' harm Latino families, businesses, says Hispanic GOP lawmaker](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=29c83ac500&e=5bd167f239) By: The Fox News

[East Chicago honors Hispanic political pioneers Jesse and Rosemarie Gomez](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c575c089f9&e=5bd167f239) By: Chicago Tribune

[U.S. Rep. Gabe Evans misrepresented family’s immigration history](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=0765bcf229&e=5bd167f239) By: Oklahoma Voice

[Republican redistricting push in Texas signals bet on Hispanic voter shift](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=717e1ad461&e=5bd167f239) By: Spectrum Local News

[It's not going good': Latino MAGA voters share dismay after 6 months of Trump](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=3894892fb9&e=5bd167f239) By: RawStory

[WATCH: Padilla Warning to Latino Leaders: Trump’s Cruel Immigration Overreach Has to be Our Wakeup Call](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=504f5cfa19&e=5bd167f239) By: Office of Senator Alex Padilla

[First public hearing on Texas redistricting draws opposition from Democrats](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=995635c8b6&e=5bd167f239) By: FOX 4 KDFW

[One Texas redistricting map puts Lubbock, San Antonio — 350 miles apart — in same district](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=3495117e31&e=5bd167f239) By: Austin American-Statesman

[Seven House Democrats making day trip to New Mexico amid redistricting battle](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=ebf6feb10e&e=5bd167f239) By: The Texas Tribune

[Newsom ramps up California redistricting threat as Texas weighs new Republican maps](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=9b46a6610c&e=5bd167f239) By: CalMatters

[Immigration crackdown having ripple effects at Latino festivals, spurring at least 1 cancellation](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a08e6170d9&e=5bd167f239) By: KSL

[Latino Workers Will Suffer From GOP Fiscal Plans](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1fc3ac119a&e=5bd167f239) By: Americans For Tax Fairness

[California Latino GDP surges past $1 trillion, as Latinos help power state economy](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7ca6a149b1&e=5bd167f239) By: UCLA Newsroom

[LA family evicted by landlord then threatened with ICE](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=db8d65611c&e=5bd167f239) By: The Independent
**[And More](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=0b2e46acb8&e=5bd167f239)**

subject: Trump's climate sabotage

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump’s EPA just proposed something so reckless, so dangerous, it’s hard to believe it isn’t satire.
They want to repeal the legal foundation that says greenhouse gases endanger human health and safety.
That’s right, as Americans suffer through record heat waves, deadly floods, and extreme weather linked to climate change, Trump’s EPA is trying to declare that carbon pollution isn’t a threat despite decades of evidence that proves the contrary.
Why? Because repealing this “endangerment finding” would strip away every major climate protection we have.
✅ Clean car and truck standards
✅ Power plant pollution limits
✅ Future emissions rules under the Clean Air Act
Gone. All of it.
This isn’t just climate denial. It’s climate sabotage.
At GOTV PAC, we’re doing everything we can to defeat this agenda at the ballot box by turning out voters who believe in science, in clean air and water, and in a livable future for the next generation.
But we need your help. We’re behind on our end-of-month fundraising goal, and if we don’t catch up, we’ll have to scale back key voter outreach in frontline districts.
Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us fight back and elect Democrats who will defend our planet and our people? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07292025&amount=10]

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/5OnrsGdGFseVTm4BvDHDNZ1K1keUKn9KqWP3X8_QKxBog5sK3BVpp77X0tQ8TQ7MsLBNW0dAxueWnhzospsuZqUMuPa7tyuB16zgJsCGMfKiKEGpegc_OMhOXxo0huP1tpNTB9XUCF8Q7_R_FPukrOxe5M6qRAtJ4sFGQ5jMaDWsLkcsZHxQWUpsS9_wfjXZAhaixY0Jze5C00tGcRDkc5mJMpst-grcLMPRREvC_XSe9ncOylORZKPJT7d3ueY44-F-v4_RqAe3aSZ1ml8kyv9Fa1VA3MqWHl-nxG-EBadmzc5bjqwJoWTqysVOl9w9NanA3UqvT47FDQjPV3ql6p4vdErvpB9LMj6IM7NmTlD8mI_B4y6vrvIKd8xACQ32Y4TQ6cAeEa_fD3L94in55oB7Ym3RtySAdsvelgPGDUHpPAP2Tcvk0v14E0hTaLfefqEjQjOrn7efeMpX9P_SUrNNOzOq-LB7CVLb4cRPmhXYv3LqhrZe5HkDM8HaLYZ2Ir4VO-0cI_gjCULsJsQhr7VWiNoExazDiA180yAFAI81IOFg0F4x1E2Zu-r3iF85zL6Su1ZnBlXqJKBsHZWLo1boeSs5kIt6wKxpxQLyX59wEoph65MiOYANefLJY6hyxpbfwLbUKM0gAHL2szMZsfGLWdlFB1RQKRUmHQef0ebkxxFHCXoLcpFvTXONkK7m_RbnPEwIZOPPYthU8s1Br6RGr0Vi6WXk4A/f_pc46PfLl8jwCtARzg0VNMCf66-TQ4c/11) [NO](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/j-WoBNCNKvkKiBbcMdNeOLyPvoXT5kZxGBxSqgBDvUtHCRRulE6yiE5oavUodLKy7MOVVL4spuqeuHqfs4JAltyvjtIOY2qwu7W4aMhN_DeaRW-cKwC5TN5qtliuGZcO9-3fw654PgVuIfr9siuuF9Y1Mhv1n8hzM2mLrJwgwHwriCWSyMcsooe2uEGd439ozt-GpMCNWA9F6hjXZh2PfMZcQfYI0IC2UM07bQYGLyUoy3aRJgDUb6_4pgzCdCY9KHyYazywTiA49ws8mqU63BP3TCxYrQbndxZOsr9SGXTfQ_IDV36-cUSfm6k2s56pfkwR7IpJS7qgr3-L4nervDepVbQnFXpB3VrhBG-OmQaFSKUZDMIowi08eqUKMcAeuOhH0vWGz-62h05lV_p07WoPmrbnnFEAvlsskRlqbNeGHwtMhnpjuKM0cUcNanf-nvRk5CFHIy00CPEEgVhi3A2LTTkpwVPdTEkotUWM6399w0u5Y5GQI3VmI_Nm1q3ztNzPJZt6TbYfUGq90TrF7aET11-mSZIQdcNNnwvF-mGDS-B8moHDWPaJY7IB8J8ys9akboAxpwAHTN8dYY6nC3RJ8HfohH1WaLNSUDi1NasNkFwBwY1Z56Dd20J7S7KO-QnNAQgW8y6OStKOnYKGN3rGyJGpIf0WwrrKi6ApE6owSnruB-DPKLIyJlMzjKE8tj_77nES65haSgwrIdJw3epzfWd7v39umA/brIdmZ47uW6WRDpEzELTs6bE1I-VR-DG/11) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/rP7rrowHYITrQz1E77FCgbZ80kP0CIdgI17Dlw12HoMybEulwgyjSVB02sGoInChnEkLK-utd2h9paCorxYygPaE-SQV0gC-u3LWADuAttruAYupKj93Be2491sz6hA7_Ny_QsDl6-AaVK3HI7WdE7b-I2WqN0VL02wk35GGRRaFxa5RU7og0H1x4yIIqYW0GsVNiQvyfvIdxJDyXDKggMmmGui5_9Z35SSF8nqFCcrMXxS5oKIXCx_cbPmXFjKfI0PjwwXqERSpsTyMUl3b8P8NiP737r-cLow8Ad1LCNhF6diKqzuaQEl5CF7C4I2ZlLDWQGgO6ByvfPeygW24-E2M7RWTSX7RDIF8VdpzIyOzGxrjDEgqrxyFVuqSjsVve874Zc_iudha5LO915QXfSECaAOemXpjG3fLR9DCmYqw9_FD3N4H6vNowz50souMkQ1vOOpW4afy0L_BLGPgxrqX-a0VRI4juVE9MbN2qxTrCYgbABHR9RjN5f4dM6y0omNxfoCkfOPPTOj4gdo5kSOV2Jvw3ZwfhbgNBq90lR7hsaI6EBYZe2Opctr3QVxitTNIYhV51osRL5tSCUcI2OHzWpKLEIaikBXm9a_h5h7n5bjtS0eJtKFNpCQVGEqB5a7buBiLB5LNw5-OrWuEdJN2G8XWMN4YmfE_cFwhDvpddvCrQUf7JUaMz_nbWq2UDbo8IgEFZNPfmsfTv0vOYZzIJkXzKVYbPA/6yclGJml8-ufZTpbPmdVKbZD182C95kz/11)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/O4mTGB9yIykBsuavDliugRlJ7AMIsfhqDJg5IScd0r825Gvl75ktJGNqtKn4-KX5QkyceLyYw60i70cGnq0bbmA8RFSX0T2IAO6rMG-WqKqgl7Cd0BARCIzeiiqZUdWH1Oj85wYePwpPWRtGsOqSy2ZmrR0i2KE6Z0_IXwzpD2FqMmhFkYD1p8ASyBUeVW_hgjAjq9TsG_ry3SalFBvCkw9XS86h_bzP5gsrrATvOXFygDGs3Q6Z9FnOreu86ubY9c-zMsH9wZiL5G2aLRaFulH2u6TUn1kXjERxV6_QZVmpqFWMtNz0tuBYtqT-dLpdHzEHBnkxc72jc13ohEV00-MVm2GSdAEBTTyl9KfUoiIDOJ2BA3DCsjhr7XgKjLSWLJQEuHUk1urpm_Qo7rNAli_T-6yesV7P8ZpB47gVsTZm9xbE_COksGMHFU-_d001gmtMz6MelKsMTAtGYKRg-XB8L1tSMkK02lim7cnW7dGs2R7rDVTXfqO5xF76S7dAFm0rLYwm7742VKPAa3btVkfojSCwcBQBnC6tOHw9yqgR_3ooOoBGvHacL_XJjIfNvfIBIxKtlymE3qdxYUu_GnVYCwZny7T_hc4-Ale7tQhAso3PHTKyMeF4a13KIXH7Fm8fidObHMzFX2PXBuHNL5Dg1nMTWktAHOfTkL2KOEU81zBBmoXUYKLtXpza3Wfz4T6UKc0gG8fAOvDF0hJIi0H3jxeyRGxZiA/I3URk0hXKJgwkjCfEs2bsGc1W43IzZ4B/11)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Republicans want to fire Big Bird
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
What I’ve been up to |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112374971/560299928/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFmYTRiYS1kMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9u-mU8w32epVqW3UMoHHzp8aKKFWoi1O01ijOAze74=&emci=508f4cf9-0c6c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0aafa4ba-d36c-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7878003)
It’s been a busy few weeks in Congress - and what have Republicans spent their time doing?

Cutting health care and defunding PBS and NPR. But I promise you - I’m fighting back. Recently, we did something called “recissions” aka Republicans voted to cave to Trump and cut $1 billion in funding for public media. **So what does that mean? Well first, they’re trying to kill Sesame Street and other educational programs. But it also means that people in rural areas won’t get the local news updates, weather updates, or breaking news they rely on from radio stations like NPR. ** You better believe I voted **hell no. ** And if that wasn’t enough - Trump is reneging on his key campaign promise to release the Epstein files. I was in the room on the Rules Committee when his GOP coconspirators in Congress caved and voted against releasing the Epstein files. These were the same people who campaigned on getting Americans the truth about Jeffrey Epstein. I’m going to keep pushing that we investigate, and**[I hope you’ll stand with me](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112374972/560299929/-960226817?refcode=E14365-20250728-Updates-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFmYTRiYS1kMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9u-mU8w32epVqW3UMoHHzp8aKKFWoi1O01ijOAze74=). ** We are also still seeing the heartlessness of the GOP when it comes to attacking our immigrant communities. And this past week, I called to subpoena Stephen Miller due to instances like this ⬇️ [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112374973/560299930/-960226817?refcode=E14365-20250728-Updates-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFmYTRiYS1kMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9u-mU8w32epVqW3UMoHHzp8aKKFWoi1O01ijOAze74=) They promised that they would be going after criminals, and yet in reality, a six-year-old battling leukemia has been detained. Republicans may not care about holding the administration accountable, but I do. Friend- it’s been a long few weeks, but I can promise you one thing: I am standing with you in the fight against the bullshit. [**I won’t stop, I won’t back down, and I hope you’ll keep standing with me. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112374974/560299931/-960226817?refcode=E14365-20250728-Updates-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFmYTRiYS1kMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9u-mU8w32epVqW3UMoHHzp8aKKFWoi1O01ijOAze74=)
— Eric
| [DONATE TO ERIC »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112374975/560299932/1602011220?refcode=E14365-20250728-Updates-footer-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFmYTRiYS1kMzZjLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9u-mU8w32epVqW3UMoHHzp8aKKFWoi1O01ijOAze74=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump’s takeover of the courts continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8839%2E5257348%2E9zFrEK)
Derek,
Donald Trump is trying to put his sycophants on the federal bench.
He’s furious that some of the judges he appointed from the Federalist Society — including Amy Coney Barrett — haven’t ruled exactly the way he wants in every single case. So now, he’s ditching even the Federalist Society and demanding something else: unending personal loyalty.
That’s what’s at stake with the nomination of Emil Bove to the federal bench.
Bove is no ordinary nominee. He’s one of Trump’s most loyal allies and exactly the kind of judge Trump wants on the bench: someone who will do his bidding, **no matter what the law says.**
Bove has a terrible track record. As a prosecutor in New York, his fellow prosecutors found his conduct so poor that they urged his demotion. At the Justice Department, he spearheaded the dismissal of corruption charges against the Mayor of New York as part of an illicit quid pro quo. And he instructed lawyers at the department that they may need to say F U to the courts and ignore court orders — and then they did.
I’ve been sounding the alarm about Bove’s nomination because it’s bigger than just one court of appeals seat. This is about whether our judiciary will remain independent or become just another tool for Trump to use to consolidate his power.
**I’ll _never_ stop fighting to defend our democracy and hold Trump and his allies accountable. But to keep up this work, especially with our end-of-month deadline just two days away, I need your help.**
**[Will you chip in today to fuel my fight against Trump’s extremist takeover of our judiciary? Just 2 days out from our end-of-month deadline, your support right now is critical.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250729_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8839%2E5257348%2E9zFrEK)**

name: Bo Mitchell
subject: We can’t risk falling behind while Republicans are stockpiling cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Mitchell for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112375528/560301670/1330170104?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250729_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFhNmU1NmItZDY2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ewNvhKw4njeekOzv254usUhmC7dK__2pURAsdJ8-t-k=)

| | Peter, we’re in a rare open-seat race in a district the GOP has taken for granted for years. And now, national Republicans are laser-focused on keeping it red because they know losing this seat brings them one step closer to losing power.

While we’ve been building a people-powered campaign from scratch, Republicans have spent the last several months quietly stockpiling cash. They’ve been raising millions from corporate PACs, dark-money groups, and Trump’s inner circle—while pushing an agenda that’s left everyday Tennesseans behind.

[_**If we don’t act fast, we risk falling behind. That’s why we’ve set a $10,000 end-of-month goal to fund this first phase of our campaign. Will you rush a donation now to help us stay on track?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112375529/560301671/-583358046?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250729_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFhNmU1NmItZDY2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ewNvhKw4njeekOzv254usUhmC7dK__2pURAsdJ8-t-k=)

This race is about whether working people have a voice in Congress—or whether Washington keeps working only for the wealthy and well-connected. It’s about whether we let the GOP continue rigging the system, or whether we rise up and take this seat back.

I’ve spent my career fighting for everyday Tennesseans. I’ve seen what happens when leaders in Washington forget who they’re supposed to serve. And I’m running for Congress to change that.

Tennessee deserves a leader who will stand up for our people—making sure they have access to affordable health care instead of taking it away, and working to lower costs for families instead of handing out tax breaks to billionaires. I’ve spent my career showing up for working people in tough fights—and that’s exactly the kind of leadership I’ll bring to Congress.

[_**I need your help to reach our $10,000 goal before the end of the month so we can flip this seat and give Tennessee the representation it deserves. What we raise will help decide whether we can compete, organize, and win right here in TN-07, so please, chip in now >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112375530/560301672/-583358046?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250729_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFhNmU1NmItZDY2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ewNvhKw4njeekOzv254usUhmC7dK__2pURAsdJ8-t-k=)

Thank you,

Bo Mitchell ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112375531/560301673/-583358046?refcode=BM_ATA_EM_FR_EOM1_250729_all_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkyNTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGFhNmU1NmItZDY2Yy1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ewNvhKw4njeekOzv254usUhmC7dK__2pURAsdJ8-t-k=)**** ****

According to the polls, many Virginians have not yet decided who they'll support in this race.
_Some may see that as a challenge, but I see an incredible opportunity._ As the Democratic nominee in Virginia, the only state where we can flip a governorship this year, I won't settle for a modest victory. I want to win big, and I want to set an example for Democrats in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
But my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has lined up far-right billionaires to foot the bill for millions of ads across our Commonwealth.
So, I need your help to respond: _Will you help us keep our own ads on the air?_
[_**Peter, today is the day I'm counting on your support to flip Virginia blue. clean_body: Will you give $25 or another amount today so we can reach undecided voters? = Peter, it looks like you haven't yet donated to my campaign, so I'll cut right to the chase: I'm counting on your $25 contribution today. Our campaign set an ambitious fundraising goal to flip Virginia blue and needs a few more donors from your area to step up before our end-of-month deadline. = = = = = = = According to the polls, many Virginians have not yet decided who they'll support in this race. Some may see that as a challenge, but I see an incredible opportunity. As the Democratic nominee in Virginia, the only state where we can flip a governorship this year, I won't settle for a modest victory. I want to win big, and I want to set an example for Democrats in 2026, 2028, and beyond. But my opponent Winsome Earle-Sears has lined up far-right billionaires to foot the bill for millions of ads across our Commonwealth. So, I need your help to respond: Will you help us keep our own ads on the air? = = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States
